Name: Grupo DEACERO
Description:
Deacero is strongly committed to a sustainable strategy of growth that benefits our company, the environment, our employees and the communities in which we operate. We are a fully integrated company with an infrastructure for recycling, processing waste, steel mills, finished product plants and distribution centers.

We currently serve diverse industries and markets with a presence in Mexico and in over 20 countries including the United States, Canada, Guatemala, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Peru, Spain and the United Kingdom.

At Deacero, our sustainability initiative is the guiding principle to all facets of our operation, which generates social, economic and environmental value to everything we do. The company owns sustainable developments in advanced technology for steel recycling facilities and its transformation to finish products, while always meeting ASTM and other international quality standards.

We are more than 8,000 employees operating in 21 Recycling Centers, 3 Steel Mills, 15 Steel Wire Facilities and 1 Research & Development Center.
Location: San Pedro Garza García, Nuevo León

Name: CBMM
Description: Tecnologia e inovação fazem parte de nosso DNA e transformar materiais é a nossa forma de transformar o mundo.

Name: SSAB
Description:
SSAB is a Nordic and US-based steel company that builds a stronger, lighter and more sustainable world through value added steel products and services. Working with our partners, SSAB has developed SSAB Fossil-free steel and plans to reinvent the value chain from the mine to the end customer, largely eliminating carbon dioxide emissions from our own operations. SSAB Zero, a largely carbon emission-free steel based on recycled steel, further strengthens SSAB’s leadership position and our comprehensive, sustainable offering independent of the raw material. SSAB has employees in over 50 countries and production facilities in Sweden, Finland and the US. SSAB is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm and has a secondary listing on Nasdaq Helsinki.

For community guidelines, please visit ssab.com/socialmedia.

For our privacy statement, see ssab.com/privacy-statement.

Name: Stegra
Description:
Founded in 2020, Stegra (formerly H2 Green Steel) was created with the purpose to decarbonize hard-to-abate industry. Construction of our first project – an integrated plant producing green hydrogen, green iron and green steel – is well underway in Boden, Sweden. Slashing emissions using green hydrogen and renewable electricity, we’re starting a clean industrial revolution. Steel is just the beginning.

We are building a diverse and rapidly growing team spread across our site and offices in Boden and Stockholm. Together, we focus on delivering green impact – for our people, customers, investors, society and planet.

Name: Tata Metaliks
Description: Tata Metaliks has merged with Tata Steel

Name: Outokumpu
Description:
Outokumpu is the global leader in sustainable stainless steel. Our business is based on circular economy: more than 90% of our production originates from recycled steel which we turn into long-lasting, fully recyclable material. Our customers use our stainless steel in many aspects of life, from civilization’s basic structures to famous landmarks and household appliances. With our total carbon footprint less than 75% of the industry average, we are working towards a world that lasts forever. 

We have an ambitious sustainability strategy and we are strongly committed to 1.5 degree target to mitigate climate change. Our emissions reduction ambition covers all direct and indirect emissions, as well as those of our supply chain.

Outokumpu employs approximately 8,500 professionals in close to 30 countries, with headquarters in Helsinki, Finland and shares listed in Nasdaq Helsinki. Read more: www.outokumpu.com

Name: ArcelorMittal South Africa
Description:
ArcelorMittal South Africa Limited is the largest steel producer on the African continent, with a production capacity of 7.8 million tonnes of liquid steel per annum.

The company has a depth of technical and managerial expertise carefully nurtured since 1928, a reputation for reliability and a sharply defined business focus, which has forged the organisation into a modern, highly competitive supplier of steel products to the domestic and global markets.

This has been achieved through ongoing alignment with international best practices and a comprehensive understanding of the steel business environment, ensuring the company’s continued global competitiveness and participation in international markets.

ArcelorMittal South Africa's global standing is further underpinned through becoming part of the world’s largest steel producer, the ArcelorMittal Group.

ArcelorMittal is the leader in all major global markets, including automotive, construction, household appliances and packaging, with leading R&D and technology, as well as sizeable captive supplies of raw materials and outstanding distribution networks.

With an industrial presence in 27 countries across Europe, the Americas, Asia and Africa, ArcelorMittal has a balanced geographic diversity within all the key steel markets, both developing and developed.

Through this association ArcelorMittal South Africa has access to world-class research and development, best practice processes, aggressive procurement contracts and international market leverage to ensure the company remains at the cutting edge of the international steel industry.

The company’s ability to generate profits and cash throughout the fluctuations of the steel cycle is testimony to the success of years of intensive business re-engineering and the cultivation of a continuous improvement culture that has embedded ArcelorMittal South Africa’s position among the world’s lowest cash cost producers of steel.

Name: Boliden
Description: Boliden’s vision is to be the most climate-friendly and respected metal provider in the world. We are Europe’s producer of sustainable metals and, guided by our values care, courage and responsibility, we operate within exploration, mines, smelters and recycling. We are around 8,000 employees and have annual revenues of approximately SEK 90 billion. The share is listed in the Large Cap segment of NASDAQ OMX Stockholm.

Name: FRISA
Description:
FRISA is a world leading manufacturer of seamless rolled rings and open die forgings. Offering an extensive range of carbon, alloy and stainless steels, titanium and superalloys allows us to service a wide spectrum of industrial markets.

Our world-class standards, strong commitment to quality, exceptional customer service and our state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities have positioned Frisa as a strategic, reliable supplier among the world’s most outstanding OEM customers.
 
Established in 1971 in Monterrey, México as a small forging company, it supplied rings and blanks to local machine shops. Over time, the company started to expand its capacities and diversify its products in response to growing demand.  
 
Nowadays, with four facilities in Mexico and one in the US, Frisa is able to handle big volumes as well as one-piece jobs and provide worldwide door-to-door service, exporting our production to the most demanding industries and markets on five continents.
 
Forging evolution.

Name: LIBERTY Steel Group
Description:
LIBERTY Steel Group is an international business with an integrated offering – from the production of liquid steel made from raw and recycled materials through to high value precision engineered steels and associated services, sold to customers around the world.

With a total rolling capacity of 18 million tonnes, 200+ manufacturing locations globally across 10 countries and more than 30,000 people employed, our comprehensive product range includes iron ore and coking coal, recycled steel as well as semis, long and flat steel products and value added services. These steels are manufactured in a variety of grades and specifications to comply with national and international quality certifications as well as to meet stringent customer specifications.

Located across UK, Europe, Australia, the USA and China, our furnaces, mills, services centres and distribution sites serve many demanding sectors such as construction, energy, oil and gas, aerospace, industrial, automotive, motorsport, yellow and white goods, infrastructure and stockholding.

Name: Boston Metal
Description:
Boston Metal is redefining global metals production with its patented Molten Oxide Electrolysis (MOE) platform technology. MOE produces steel without carbon emissions and recovers valuable metals from mining waste, delivering a sustainable and profitable pathway to unlock new economic opportunities, enable industrial onshoring and accelerate a commercially driven transition to cleaner industry.

Backed by visionary investors and led by a world-class team, Boston Metal is headquartered in Woburn, Massachusetts and has a wholly owned subsidiary in Brazil.

Name: AK Steel Corporation
Description: Former AK Steel is now Cleveland-Cliffs.   AK Steel was acquired in 2020.  Please follow Cleveland-Cliffs.

Name: Ambica Steels
Description:
Established in 1970, AMBICA is a fully integrated stainless steel mill based in India. With a strong reputation for expertise and excellence, AMBICA specializes in producing complex grades within the stainless steel industry. Their state-of-the-art facilities enable them to achieve a remarkable annual production of approximately 80,000 tons of stainless steel.

AMBICA holds several prestigious certifications, including TÜV certifications such as ISO–9001:2000, ADW0/TRD100, P.E.D., ISO-14001:2004, and OHSAS 18001:1999. Recently, they have also acquired certificates from renowned organizations like DNV for Shipbuilding Industry and AS 9100 Certificate for the Aerospace Industry, demonstrating their commitment to quality and industry standards.

The company offers a wide range of standard grades, including Austenitics (303, 304/L, 316/L, 321, 316Ti), Martensitics, Ferritics (410, 416, 420A/B/C, 430/F, 431), Duplex steels (F51/2205/1.4462), and Precipitation Hardening (17-4PH, 1.4542, 15/5PH) in compliance with AMS specifications for the Aerospace Industry. AMBICA also provides materials as per DIN standards.

AMBICA supplies stainless steel long products in various forms such as Bright Bars, Angles, Flats, Squares, Hexagons, Flat Bars, RCS, Continuous Cast Billets, and Forging Ingots.

With a global outlook, AMBICA exports its materials to around 50 countries worldwide, showcasing its international presence and reach.

Setting new industry standards, AMBICA is the first Indian stainless steel industry to possess an in-house state-of-the-art dedicated Radiation Check Lab. Additionally, they have installed Radiation Check Gates for the inspection of incoming materials, reinforcing their commitment to quality control and safety measures.

AMBICA's strengths lie in their unwavering commitment to quality, flexibility in meeting customer requirements, and fast delivery, making them a reliable and preferred partner in the stainless steel industry.

Name: Mangels
Description:
Founded in 1928, Mangels has been a pioneer demonstrating its strength throughout its history. Today, it stands out in the segments in which it operates and offers its products to the largest companies in the automotive, motorcycle, truck, bus, home appliance and gas sectors in Brazil and around the world.

Due to its excellence in production quality and commitment to your history, Mangels is present either through automotive wheels, LPG cylinders, air cylinders or other products in its portfolio.

Name: Albras
Description:
A Albras é a maior produtora de alumínio primário no Brasil e desde 1985 alimenta os mercados interno e externo com lingotes de alta pureza. 
A Hydro é a principal acionista da empresa, com 51% das ações dessa joint venture. O outro acionista é a NAAC - Nippon Amazon Aluminium Co. Ltd., formada por um consórcio de empresas japonesas, tradings, consumidores e fabricantes de produtos de alumínio.

Name: ArcelorMittal México
Description:
Somos la empresa minera y productora de acero líder en el mundo, con presencia en 60 países y operaciones en 19 más. Guiada por una filosofía que privilegia la producción segura y sustentable de acero, somos el proveedor líder de acero de calidad en los mercados más importantes del mundo, incluyendo el automotriz, de construcción, electrodomésticos y empaque, con investigación y desarrollo de clase mundial y destacadas redes de distribución.
Por medio de nuestros valores centrales de sustentabilidad, calidad y liderazgo, operamos responsablemente con respeto a la salud, seguridad y bienestar de nuestros empleados, contratistas y comunidades en las que operamos.

Name: Tuper S.A.
Description:
A Tuper atua como provedora de soluções inovadoras e competitivas em aço visando antecipar as necessidades dos clientes com excelentes serviços e produtos, são atributos que atestam a solidez da Tuper e contribuem para a manutenção de sua liderança.
Sua solidez esta baseada em seus Valores - Cliente, Respeito, Comprometimento, Superacao, Seguranca e Resultado.

Name: Industeel
Description:
Europe's leading supplier of alloy or stainless steel plate, Industeel supplies a large number of specialized industries including the nuclear industry, the oil and gas sector and the military sector.
With several hundred grades of special steels in its catalog, Industeel is one of the few companies in the world to produce a wide range of steels applicable to demanding markets such as the energy, protection, abrasion or molds.

Research, design and production of the steel grade meeting sharp technical specifications, Industeel has the technical skills and historical know-how to offer its customers high-end steels with the most sophisticated nuances.

At Industeel France, we also produce a unique range of sheet thicknesses ranging from 3mm up to 1m. The mold casting technique used allows our engineers to create high quality rolled or forged sheets, custom made to meet the metallurgical and dimensional requirements of each customer.

Name: Atlantic Copper
Description:
Atlantic Copper es el mayor productor de cobre de España y su empresa matriz, Freeport-McMoRan, el segundo mayor del mundo.  Atlantic Copper está situada en la provincia de Huelva, donde la actividad principal es la producción de cobre refinado de alta pureza. Por volumen de facturación, ocupa el #1 del ranking de empresas andaluzas y de exportaciones de la región.

El cobre es un metal imprescindible para el desarrollo sostenible gracias a sus extraordinarias propiedades de conductividad eléctrica y térmica y por su capacidad de reciclaje infinita.

Name: Boston Metal do Brasil
Description:
Com um time inovador, capacitado e comprometido, a Boston Metal do Brasil veio para transformar a produção metalúrgica, de forma sustentável e economicamente viável. 

Por meio da Eletrólise de Óxido Fundido (MOE, em inglês), a companhia utiliza rejeitos da mineração e escórias da metalurgia para produção de metais críticos de alto valor, como ferroligas de nióbio, tântalo e estanho. 

Ela é uma subsidiária integral da Boston Metal, empresa sediada nos Estados Unidos, cuja missão é descarbonizar a produção de aço e transformar a maneira como os metais são feitos.

Name: Steel Warehouse
Description: Steel Processing requires a finely tuned balance between the awesome strength of large, powerful machinery and the know-how of experienced engineers and operators. Steel Warehouse recognizes the importance of continually investing in both to provide customers with quality material that is cost-effectively produced.

Name: ALTRAD ENDEL
Description:
Filiale du groupe ALTRAD, forte de sa position de leader des services à l’énergie, ALTRAD ENDEL accompagne ses clients industriels en leur offrant les solutions techniques les plus appropriées pour répondre à leurs enjeux de performance.

Notre héritage est ancré dans l'histoire industrielle française qu’ALTRAD ENDEL a contribué à façonner, notamment au travers de la construction de la quasi-totalité des réacteurs du parc nucléaire français, de nombreuses centrales thermiques, des sites pétrochimiques, plusieurs sites sidérurgiques majeurs, dont la construction de hauts-fourneaux à Dunkerque, Fos-sur-Mer et Le Creusot et des bâtiments de la Marine nationale.

En 2022, ENDEL rejoint le groupe ALTRAD, apportant à cette entité internationale notre expertise éprouvée dans les métiers de la tuyauterie, du soudage, de la mécanique et des projets complexes. Cette intégration renforce notre capacité à servir nos clients à l'échelle mondiale, tout en maintenant notre engagement envers l'excellence et l'innovation.

Aujourd'hui, avec près de 200 ans d'expérience, nos 4 665 collaborateurs s'engagent à relever les défis les plus exigeants de l'industrie. Nous sommes présents à chaque étape de la chaîne de valeur des projets, de la conception à la maintenance, en mettant l'accent sur la qualité et la satisfaction de nos clients.

Chez ALTRAD ENDEL, nous nous engageons à promouvoir une culture de la sécurité au sein de notre entreprise et à nous conformer aux normes les plus strictes en matière de santé, sécurité, sûreté et environnement.

Au contact de nos clients au quotidien, nous captons leurs enjeux et mettons tout en œuvre pour développer des solutions sur mesure de conception, de réalisation et de maintenance, au cœur des processus industriels partout sur le territoire et de façon croissante à l’international.

Name: Kocaer Steel
Description:
Operating in the steel profile segment of the iron and steel industry, Kocaer Steel is the export champion of the Aegean Region in the iron and steel industry with foreign currency-indexed sales revenue of over USD 500 million and exports close to USD 400 million, and is the company with the highest steel profile exports for 2018, 2019, 2020 and 2021.

With an 800,000 tons/year steel profile capacity, Kocaer Steel currently manufactures in a total area of 280,000 m², 85,000 m² of which is closed, with 3 steel profile factories, 1 Galvanizing Factory, 1 Service Center and a renewable electricity generation facility with a capacity of 15 million kWh/year and provides direct employment to approximately 1,000 people.

Kocaer Çelik is one of Turkey's leading steel profile manufacturers in its segment with over 12,000 products in various types, sizes and thicknesses containing chemical compositions of over 60 different qualities, together with the value-added products added to its product portfolio. The company manufactures high-strength, special quality, different sizes, special lengths and sections of steel profiles for customers operating in the solar energy infrastructure, energy transmission line, structural steel, transportation, mining, tunneling, shipbuilding, agriculture, machinery manufacturing and defense industry sectors and sells them through export, domestic and international distribution channel established in 2015 in the United Kingdom, which is the first in the industry.

Name: Ovako Group
Description: At Ovako, we specialize in clean, high quality engineering steel tailored to the needs of customers in the bearing, transport, and manufacturing sectors. Our high-quality steel not only ensures lightweight and resilient products but also enables more sustainable and environmentally friendly solutions. Committed to sustainability, we achieved carbon neutral operation in January 2022, with a production based on recycled steel and fossil-free electricity. With 2900 dedicated employees and a global presence spanning over 30 countries, along with approximately EUR 1,1 billion in sales, Ovako, a subsidiary of Sanyo Special Steel and a proud member of Nippon Steel Corporation, stands at the forefront of the steel industry. Our purpose is clear: Together we create steel for a decarbonized society. Discover more about our innovative solutions at www.ovako.com, www.sanyo-steel.co.jp, and www.nipponsteel.com

Name: ArcelorMittal Poland
Description:
ArcelorMittal Poland is the largest steel producer in Poland, employing about 9 000 people in six plants located in Silesia, Malopolska and Opolskie province. Thanks to the investments, the value of which in 2004-2024 amounted to more than PLN 11 bn, ArcelorMittal Poland has become one of the most modern steel producers in Europe. 
ArcelorMittal Poland concentrates about 50 per cent of the Polish steel industry’s production capacity. The company is also one of the largest Polish exporters and producers of coke in Europe and in the entire ArcelorMittal group. The production capacity of our coking plant in Zdzieszowice reaches more than 3 million tonnes per year.

Through our core values of sustainability, quality and leadership, we operate responsibly with respect to the health, safety and wellbeing of our employees, contractors and the communities in which we operate.

For us, steel is the fabric of life, as it is at the heart of the modern world from railways to cars and washing machines. We are actively researching and producing steel-based technologies and solutions that make many of the products and components we use in our everyday lives more energy-efficient.

Name: ORI Martin Group
Description:
Founded in 1933, ORI Martin is one of the main European integrated steel groups. It produces high-quality steel for the automotive, fastener, mechanical and building sectors. 
With more than 200 qualities of steel designed for special uses for the mechanical and automotive industries, it is an important player on all the major European and non-European markets, thanks to its strategic geographic location and to a well-established foreign trading system. The ORI Martin Group encompasses eleven companies, on account of a diversification strategy which started in the 60s.

The search for ever more specific niches and the ever-increasing specialisation inspire the growth and the development of ORI Martin, in order to meet the requests of the European automotive industry. The company pursues these goals through a great number of resources and a close attention to innovation, sustainability and research.

Name: Vesuvius Technology
Description: We as Vesuvius are global leaders in molten metal flow engineering. We achieve this by working closely with our customers to develop customised refractories, systems, services and technologies that enable our customers to improve their performance. The three businesses that comprise the Steel division are Steel Flow Control, Advanced Refractories and Technical Services.

Name: Niobium Tech
Description:
Through a range of applications and by creating value, Niobium transforms materials into smarter materials to build greener structures, help make energy cleaner and mobility more sustainable. #BeTheEvolution

Brought to you by CBMM.


About CBMM | Niobium

World leader in the production and commercialization of Niobium products, CBMM will celebrate its 70th anniversary in 2025, serving more than 500 customers in 50 countries. Headquartered in Brazil, with regional offices in China, the Netherlands, Singapore, Switzerland, and the United States, CBMM provides technology for sectors such as infrastructure, mobility, aerospace, healthcare, and energy. To support its growth plans, the Company is aligned with global trends in electrification, urbanization, and sustainability, driving research, development, and the adoption of Niobium across various industries. CBMM has established partnerships and made strategic investments in companies such as Echion Technologies and Battery Streak, aiming for new developments in Niobium-based materials for lithium-ion batteries.

Name: Ulbrich Stainless Steels & Special Metals, Inc.
Description: Ulbrich Stainless Steels & Special Metals, Inc. is a fourth-generation, family-owned and operated, global manufacturer of precision metal products. Ulbrich processes over 160 unique alloys into custom strip, shaped wire, and fine wire products used for automotive, aerospace, energy, medical, chemical, and electrical applications.

Name: voestalpine Steel Division
Description:
As an integral part of the voestalpine Group, the voestalpine Steel Division assumes a leading role in the global steel industry. We are not only a manufacturer of high-quality steel products but also a pioneer in the development of sustainable, low-carbon steel production technologies. Our commitment to innovation, quality and sustainability shapes our actions and our products.

Our vision for a clean and livable future
We set new standards in steel production with our ambitious "greentec steel" roadmap for climate-neutral steel production. As an initial step, we offer all our flat steel products in a carbon-reduced greentec steel edition, and we are continually working on implementing eco-friendly production technologies based on green energy and hydrogen.

Innovation since day one
Since our inception, we have been an innovator and a pioneer in the steel industry. Our history is marked by groundbreaking developments and a constant pursuit of pushing the boundaries of what is possible. This tradition of excellence and innovation continues to drive our efforts today.

The voestalpine Steel Division: your partner for a sustainable future
We are the primary choice for renowned automotive manufacturers and suppliers worldwide and an important partner in the European construction and machinery and electrical industries. We also manufacture heavy plates and cast products for demanding applications in the energy sector and provide tailored solutions for the expansion of renewable energy sources. In the voestalpine Steel Division, we manufacture steel products and act as a visionary and partner to businesses who are looking to shape a sustainable and innovative future. We invite you to be part of this exciting journey and to join us in shaping our common future.

Name: Özkan Steel
Description:
ÖZKAN Steel was founded in 1953 and has its headquarter and production sites in İzmir-Aliağa over an area of 460,000m2. ÖZKAN Steel, having a melting capacity of 1,200,000 tons and rolling capacity of 700,000 tons per year, has been active in producing special steel profiles for the Shipbuilding, Offshore, Onshore, Automotive, Mining, Tunneling, Railways, Agriculture, Earth Moving, Material Handling, Machinery, Energy and Commercial Construction sectors.

ÖZKAN Steel is exporting to more than 120 countries yearly and has established itself worldwide as a well known and trusted brand name in these sectors for its high quality, on-time delivery flexibility, customer specific solutions and high customer satisfaction.

By regarding the production of value added products as a corporate principle, ÖZKAN Steel has been using its over 72 years of experience in hot rolling special profiles to increase its product portfolio continuously.
ÖZKAN Steel's product portfolio is comprised of over 4,200 different sizes of profiles produced in three rolling mills with a rolling capability of 3.5 kg/m to 600 kg/m steel profiles.

This accumulated experience grants ÖZKAN Steel the ability to be one of the leading steel companies in the production of special steel grades and special steel profiles throughout the world.

Name: UK Metals Expo  -  The Only Event for the Entire Metals Supply Chain
Description:
Join us at the NEC, Birmingham on 10 and 11 September 2025 for the highly anticipated 4th edition of our industry-leading exhibition and conference.

Building upon the resounding success of our 2023 event, the 2024 edition promises to be 50% bigger, offering an even more extensive showcase of the latest innovations, technologies, and advancements in the metals sector.

 Why attend? With the expanded scale of this year's exhibition, we're thrilled to welcome a broader audience and an enhanced show makeup. This makes it an unmissable experience for all professionals across the entire metals supply chain, consolidating its status as a must-attend event for the UK metals sector. Whether you're involved in production, manufacturing, fabrication, distribution, innovation, or any facet of the industry, our exhibition offers unparalleled networking opportunities and a comprehensive display of cutting-edge technologies.

 By the industry, for the industry: Our commitment to fostering collaboration and knowledge-sharing remains at the core. We proudly stand supported by esteemed associations within the UK Metals Council, including the Aluminium Federation (ALFED), Cast Metals Federation (CMFED), British Stainless Steel Association (BSSA), Galvanisers Association, and many more.

Mark your calendars and secure your spot at the forefront of the metals industry's latest advancements! Together, let's shape the future of the UK metals sector.

#MetalsIndustry #Innovation #Networking #Event2024 #UKMetalsSector

Name: Jindal Steel Oman I جندال للحديد عُمان
CECAL Industria e Comercio Ltda
Description: Founded in 1971, Cecal is a leader in manufacturing of high technology components such as cast copper coolers to steel and base metal smelting industry. Cecal's products include cast and machined copper coolers, copper launders, copper tapping blocks, copper staves, tuyeres and tuyere coolers, and many others. Cecal also provides cathodes for electrolysis, high electrical power transmission elements, and bimetallic plates produced by explosion welding (clads). Cecal facilities include departments of copper and copper alloys foundry, precision machining, metal conformation and special welding, such as explosion welding.

Name: Aluminium Dunkerque
Description:
Un aluminium vertueux pour un monde durable

Dernière grande usine d’aluminium primaire implantée en France, Aluminium Dunkerque est spécialisée dans la fabrication de plaques et de lingots, dans une grande variété d’alliages, pour des applications à forte valeur ajoutée dans les secteurs de l’automobile, du transport et de l’emballage notamment.
Acteur majeur de la production d’aluminium primaire, le site de production est implanté à Loon-Plage, dans le Nord de la France, depuis 1991, au cœur d’un territoire aujourd’hui fortement engagé dans la décarbonation de ses industries.

L’usine comprend 4 secteurs :
-	Le Carbone qui fabrique les anodes
-	L’Electrolyse où est produit l’aluminium primaire
-	La Fonderie qui coule les plaques et les lingots
-	La Maintenance qui réalise l’entretien et l’exploitation des utilités du site.
-	
Figurant parmi les leaders mondiaux de la production d’aluminium bas carbone, Aluminium Dunkerque a baissé de 17% ses émissions (scope 1,2) depuis 2013 et émet quatre fois moins de gaz à effet de serre que la moyenne mondiale du secteur.
Forte de ces atouts, l’entreprise entend jouer un rôle majeur dans la production européenne d’aluminium bas carbone au service de ses clients et de ses communautés. Elle accélère sa transition énergétique et environnementale dans le cadre d’un ambitieux projet de décarbonation baptisé LowCAl pour Low Carbon Aluminium.

Name: Manganese Metal Company (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Manganese Metal Company, ‘Creating Strength’ for over 50 years.

A key player in the global Mn sphere, MMC has risen to the top of the ‘Ore To Manganese’ supply structure, and more notably, has been recognized as the world’s largest refinery of 99.9% Selenium Free Electrolytic Manganese Metal (EMM).

Our latest project, High Purity Manganese Sulphate Monohydrate (HP MSM), is in an advanced planning phase. The chemical processes have been exhilarating, as the global race to meet supply and demand for the Lithium-ion battery industry, is on.
We will provide ongoing updates as our project progresses from confirmed laboratory success to us breaking ground for the construction of our Brownfield processing plant. 

Our dedication to maintaining a diminutive footprint on the beautiful lands of Mbombela has always been a non-negotiable for us. We aim to minimize waste, focus on sustainability awareness, lower carbon emissions, and steer ourselves towards an eco-friendly infrastructure.

We are a proudly South African Company, motivated by our people and its history, with our sights set firmly on growing our presence on an international platform.

Name: MINASLIGAS S.A
Description:
A MINASLIGAS, fundada em 1980, é uma empresa com quatro décadas de atuação, produzindo Ferro Silício, Silício Metálico e Microsílica, atendendo às demandas dos mercados nacional e internacional. 

NEGÓCIO / PROPÓSITO /VISÃO
Produzir e comercializar Silício e suas ligas com qualidade, atendendo as necessidades de seus clientes, acionistas e empregados, com responsabilidade socioambiental. Manter-se entre os principais competidores globais com uma equipe engajada, maximizando os resultados financeiros.

As atividades produtivas da Minasligas se iniciaram em 14/03/1980 com a operação de um forno de redução com potência de 15 MVA, cuja capacidade de produção era de 35 toneladas/dia ou 12.000 toneladas/ano de Ferro Silício 75%. Em 1981, foi desenvolvido um projeto de expansão que contemplava a instalação de três novos fornos de 15 MVA cada, para a produção de Ferro Silício 75%, aumentando a capacidade de produção para 48.000 toneladas/ano. Em 1988  diversificou sua produção para o produto Silício Metálico com a construção do quinto forno com capacidade de 18.000t/ano. Em 1996, continuou investindo e duplicou a capacidade de produção de Silício Metálico com a instalação do sexto forno. 

Nos anos 2000, modernizou os transformadores dos fornos, incrementando a potência de 15 MVA para 18,75 MVA, aumentando a capacidade produtiva de Ferro Silício 75% para 60.000t/ano e Silício Metálico para 20.000t/ano. Em 2009, iniciou-se a construção dos sétimo e oitavo fornos para produção de Silício Metálico, que entraram em operação em novembro e dezembro de 2011, respectivamente, totalizando capacidade instalada de 150 MVA. Isso permitiu uma produção anual de 120 mil toneladas de ferro silício 75% ou 80 mil toneladas de Silício Metálico.

A Minasligas é resultado da combinação de importantes fatores: o empreendedorismo e conhecimento de gestão de negócios dos seus fundadores e sucessores, a qualidade técnica o profissionalismo e a paixão dos empregados pelo que fazem.

Name: Litografia Valença
Description:
Na Litografia Valença fabricamos embalagens metálicas, se destacando entre as líderes do segmento. Oferecendo soluções das mais diversas, tendo como pontos fortes tecnologia, sustentabilidade e inovação, visando a excelência no atendimento ao cliente. 
Com forte atuação no mercado, atendendo aos mais diversos segmentos, possuindo três unidades fabris com estrutura e tecnologia capazes de oferecer produtos e serviços com a máxima qualidade e o melhor atendimento.
Somos uma empresa em constante crescimento, com um sólido parque industrial e processos de fabricação pioneiros, capazes de produzir latas para diversas necessidades, incluindo formatos únicos e exclusivos.
Buscamos excelência em todas as relações, atuando com base nas mais modernas e completas normas de segurança do trabalho, industriais e ambientais, além de ter um compromisso com a qualidade total do nossos produtos e serviços.

Name: Electra
Description: At Electra, our clean iron technology uses chemistry and electricity to transform iron ore into 99% pure iron. By reinventing ironmaking from the ground up, we’re unlocking one of industry’s toughest challenges, creating skilled jobs, and delivering the critical materials we need.

Name: Ferroglobe PLC
Description: Ferroglobe is one of the world’s leading suppliers of silicon metal, silicon-based and manganese-based specialty alloys and ferroalloys, serving a customer base across the globe in dynamic and fast-growing end markets, such as solar, automotive, consumer products, construction and energy.

Name: ArcelorMittal Downstream Solutions
Description:
Our diverse team represent 260 sites from across 54 countries, forming part of the world's leading steel and mining company, ArcelorMittal. Our driving force encompasses the ten business divisions of ArcelorMittal Downstream Solutions, servicing customers from industry segments like aerospace, automotive, construction, consumer goods, defense, energy, medical and manufacturing.

In this fast-paced global economy, we at ArcelorMittal Downstream Solutions encourage entrepreneurial outlook and support our employees to become the future leaders of ArcelorMittal. We aim to give our people every chance to flourish in their career and grow as part of a global company. Our employees at ArcelorMittal Downstream Solutions, have the opportunity to develop their skills and take on fresh challenges in an international environment, offering a diverse and fulfilling career path.

Our people support us in functions linked to the downstream business processes of health and safety, production and supply chain, strategy and business development, sales and marketing, finance, human resources, research and development as well as IT and digital innovation.

Name: Riva Industries
Description:
Riva Industries est un acteur majeur de l’industrie métallurgique au Maroc et une filiale du Groupe Meski Invest. Implantée dans la zone industrielle Med-Z à Jorf Lasfar, notre entreprise s’appuie sur un complexe industriel doté des technologies les plus avancées et conformes aux standards internationaux les plus exigeants.

Forte de son expertise et de son engagement envers l’innovation, Riva Industries joue un rôle clé dans le développement du secteur de l’acier, en proposant une offre compétitive alliant performance, durabilité et excellence. Grâce à une capacité de production dépassant un million de tonnes et un réseau logistique optimisé, nous garantissons une distribution efficace et réactive sur l’ensemble du territoire.

Nous plaçons l’innovation et la responsabilité sociale au cœur de notre démarche, en intégrant un centre R&D et une plateforme universitaire pour le développement des compétences. Notre orientation RSE assure la pérennité et l’excellence de notre écosystème industriel.

Rejoignez-nous pour suivre notre actualité et découvrir nos solutions dédiées à l’industrie de demain.

Name: Haynes International
Description:
Haynes International is a leading developer, manufacturer, and distributor of HASTELLOY and HAYNES high-performance alloys for use in high-temperature and corrosion applications. Formed in Kokomo, Indiana in October 1912, the story of Haynes International spans a century of products, processes and, most of all, people. Haynes International is part of the Acerinox Group.

Our primary markets include aerospace, power generation, chemical processing, and emerging technologies. Our on-going development of patent-protected alloys positions us as one of the industry leaders in research and development-driven products.

Our worldwide service centers’ offer value-added services and capabilities. We are continuously expanding our capabilities to increase efficiency and shorten cycle time. This approach allows us to provide value far beyond the alloys themselves.

Name: Korea Zinc Company, Ltd (고려아연)
Description:
Korea Zinc is the world’s leading non-ferrous metal smelting company, processing over 1.2 million tons of 18 different metals annually, including zinc, lead, silver, indium, and other critical materials essential to advanced industries.

With world-class refining technology and one of the industry’s most advanced environmental management systems, we deliver high-purity metals while minimizing our environmental footprint. Building on this foundation, we are accelerating our Troika Drive growth engine, which focuses on three core areas: renewable energy and green hydrogen, secondary battery materials, and resource recycling.

Through this transformation, we are driving the shift towards a circular, low-carbon economy while strengthening global supply chain resilience and creating long-term sustainable value for communities, partners, and our planet.

Name: Gruppo Riva
Description:
Riva Group is Italy's largest steel producer and the fifth biggest player in the European steel industry. Founded in 1954 by Emilio Riva, a pioneer in postwar Italian steel, the Group has specialised in the manufacturing of “long” products using electric arc steelworks, and in 60 years of business it has achieved an international leadership, expanding in the main European countries, thanks to high production standards and to a focused and steady strategy of growth and investments.
Chaired by Claudio Riva since May 2014, the Group is privately owned and employs almost 5,000 people, with an increasingly qualified presence of high school and university graduates. It has 20 industrial plants located in the following countries: six in Italy, seven in France, three in Germany, two in Belgium, one in Spain and one in Canada. Besides this, nine marketing companies and two scrap recovery centres belong to the Group.
Riva Group produced in 2014 about 7.8 million tons of steel, slightly up compared to the previous year (7.6 million), despite lasting difficulties on the Italian and international steel market. Revenues remained stable at 3.6 billion euros and the Group’s market share in the “long” products improved to 12.6% at the European level, confirming its leadership in this important segment. 
The Group carried out also in 2014 an important investment’s program (worth 70 million euros) aimed at improving the quality of products and processes, of safety conditions in the plants and of environmental compatibility of production. 
The Group supplies different product areas, some of which - for example mechanics engineering, automotive and earth-moving machines - demand especially high quality standards. Production includes drawn, peeled and ground steel items derived from further cold-rolling processing.

Name: Rock Tech Lithium
Description: Rock Tech's vision is to supply the electric vehicle and battery industry with sustainable, locally produced lithium, targeting a 100% recycling rate. To ensure resilient supply chains, the company plans to build lithium converters at the doorstep of its customers, beginning with the Company's proposed Lithium Hydroxide Converter in Guben, Brandenburg, Germany. The second Converter is planned to be built in Red Rock, Ontario, Canada. Rock Tech Lithium plans to source raw material from its own Georgia Lake spodumene project in the Thunder Bay Mining District of Ontario, Canada, and procure from other ESG-compliant mines. Ultimately, Rock Tech’s goal is to create a closed-loop lithium production system. Rock Tech has gathered one of the strongest teams in the industry to close the most pressing gap in the clean mobility story. The Company has adopted strict environmental, social and governance standards and is developing a proprietary refining process to increase efficiency and sustainability further.

Name: Affinerie CCR
Description: L'affinerie CCR, partie intégrante du groupe Glencore, est une affinerie de cuivre et de métaux précieux d'envergure internationale, moderne et concurrentielle. C'est dans ses installations de Montréal-Est, les seules du genre en Amérique du Nord, que l'on donne aux métaux précieux toute leur noblesse, au cuivre sa pureté et aux autres métaux leurs particularités spécifiques.

Name: Grupo Methal Company
Description: Fundada em 2007, a Methal Company trabalha com a produção de conjuntos estampados, soldados e montados, além de sistemas mecânicos para os segmentos agrícola, automotivo e construção civil.

Name: BOZEL BRASIL
Description:
Bozel is the largest producer of Calcium Silicon Alloys in the western world serving the Steel Industry worldwide.
The plant in Brazil has 3 electric furnaces with a total capacity of 30.000 tonnes per year .
Nowadays is producing mainly Calcium Silicon Alloys and Ferro Silicon. 

The high quality products and tradition of more than 40 years,  make it the leader in the market.
Today Bozel exports more than 80 % of its production.

Bozel has now 3 Cored Wire Production Units ( Brazil,  France and USA), supplying a large variety of materials : CaSi, Ferro Manganese, Ferro Silicon, Ferro Boron, Ferro Titanium, Ferro Niobium, Carbon, Sulphur and several others upon demand.
Location: Sao Joao Del Rei, Minas Gerais

Name: European Metals
Description:
European Metals represents Europe’s non-ferrous metals producers and recyclers. 

Our members employ some 500,000 people and generate approximately €120 billion in annual turnover, supplying essential materials to virtually every sector of the European economy. 

Together we are driving towards to a more circular metals economy by unlocking the endlessly recyclable potential of non-ferrous metals.

Name: VDM Metals Group
Description:
Materials for the future

VDM Metals produces a comprehensive range of high-performance materials consisting of sheet and plate, strip, wire, rod and bar, pre-material for tube production, welding consumables, shapes, forged parts and powder of nickel, cobalt and zirconium alloys as well as special stainless steels. However, this is far from all: In addition to exceptional materials, we offer you a wide range of world class services, ranging from classical hire work, practical technical advice and worldwide, prompt deliveries from our Service Centers to materials development in a joint research and development project.

Our materials are able to withstand heavy mechanical, thermal and chemical stresses, sometimes all three simultaneously. They often assist in bringing new ideas and concepts into reality. In this way, our alloys create possibilities for future-oriented, resource-saving and environmentally-friendly construction and solutions.

Today, our company is one of the world's leading suppliers of materials in all semi-finished forms. From its headquarters in Werdohl, Germany, the VDM Metals Group employs about 2,000 people worldwide. VDM Metals ist part of the Acerinox Group. 

Imprint: https://www.vdm-metals.com/en/legal-information-data-protection/ 

Privacy Statement for social media: https://www.vdm-metals.com/fileadmin/user_upload/Downloads/VDM_DSE_Social_Media.pdf

Name: SIJ - Slovenian Steel Group
Description:
SIJ – Slovenian Steel Group is one of the leading producers of stainless steel and special steels in Europe. We are Slovenia's largest vertically integrated metallurgy group. We are committed to global and European climate goals and operate in line with circular economy principles. With our steel and steel products, we are the right partner for facilitating the green transition. Our manufacturing companies are modern recycling steelworks with sustainable production certified by ResponsibleSteel. Our steel is recycled. 

𝗣𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗦𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗻𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆:
In 1987, we ceased operations of its last blast furnace and shifted to utilizing recycled steel scrap as our primary raw material. With this step, we achieved a level of CO₂ emissions three decades ago that is now considered a benchmark for our industry.

𝗗𝗲𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗼𝗻𝗶𝘇𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗺𝗶𝘁𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁:
Even though our CO₂ intensity is notably lower than the global average, we remain dedicated to further reducing emissions. Substantial investments in best available technology (BAT) have already been made, and numerous future investments are planned.
All these investments are part of our strategy to reduce CO2 intensity by 51% by 2030 compared to the 2020 baseline and achieve carbon neutrality by 2050.

Name: voestalpine Meincol
Description:
A voestalpine Meincol, com mais de 80 anos de atuação na indústria de soluções em aço, é reconhecida por seu pioneirismo e excelência. 

Em 2008, a marca caxiense atraiu a atenção do grupo austríaco voestalpine, resultando em uma parceria inédita que impulsionou ainda mais seu crescimento.

Ao longo dos últimos 16 anos, a voestalpine Meincol consolidou-se como líder nas operações do grupo no Brasil e na América do Sul, destacando-se no mercado regional e global.

Com infraestrutura robusta, know-how especializado e alta capacidade produtiva, a empresa se posiciona como uma das maiores do segmento de aço, oferecendo um portfólio completo que inclui tubos e perfis fabricados a partir de aços laminados a quentes, frios e galvanizados, além de telhas, produtos especiais sob medida e processos agregados, sempre com características e tecnologia de ponta.

Todos os produtos da voestalpine Meincol são desenvolvidos em conformidade com as principais normas internacionais, atendendo às especificações e necessidades dos clientes

Name: Innara - Indústria Nacional de Aramados
Description:
Fundada em 2003 na cidade de Indaiatuba, com capital 100% nacional, a metalúrgica INNARA é reconhecida no mercado por sua competência na fabricação de aramados. Essa posição foi alcançada devido à busca permanente por inovação, design e funcionalidade de seus produtos. A empresa desenvolve e fabrica prateleiras, grades, cestos e componentes em aramados com acabamentos cromados e pintados para o mercado de refrigeração comercial, de linha branca e linha automotiva, atendendo as necessidades de seus clientes, priorizando sempre a qualidade nos serviços prestados.

Em 2016 adquiriu a Unidade de Estamparia na cidade de Sorocaba, possibilitando diversificar sua produção e estabelecer parceria com outros segmentos da indústria. Localizada em um ponto estratégico do Estado de SP. Com investimento constante em tecnologia, a empresa busca sempre otimizar seu processo de produção. Estampa peças nos mais diversos tipos de materiais (Aço, Latão, Inox, Alumínio) para o segmento de autopeças, eletrodomésticos e outros, com prensas de 15 a 400 toneladas, hidráulicas e excêntricas. Projeta ferramentas, desenvolve os ferramentais e fabrica as peças em todas as suas etapas (corte, dobra, furação, repuxo, solda, tratamento superficial e etc).

A INNARA possui um dos mais completos parques fabris do setor, respeitando o meio ambiente e os requisitos de responsabilidade social, assegurando um excelente desempenho no atendimento às especificações de seus clientes. Seu parque fabril é composto com máquinas de precisão, operadas por processos manuais ou automáticos.

Name: Gelf Siderurgia S.A.
Description:
Established in 1984, since its startup the Company operates in the Brazilian and international markets, producing high quality pig iron with a broad spectrum of chemical compositions.

After 35 years, youth and experience have come together in a disruptive manner, motivating innovation and reaffirming the Company’s commitment to reliability, quality and sustainability. These values enabled the Company to become a global benchmark in its industry.

As of 2020, it is named GELF SIDERURGIA S.A., and the new logo represents the tradition of offering pig iron with quality, dynamism and a constant pursuit of modernization.

Name: Intercast SA
Description:
A Intercast é uma empresa do grupo ACIPCO – American Cast Iron Pipe Company, líder no mercado norte americano de tubos centrifugados.
 
Somos uma fundição especializada em "midcastings", peças de ferro fundido, cinzento ou nodular de 20 a 250kg. Atuamos no segmento de máquinas agrícolas e construção, caminhões, ônibus e saneamento. 
 
Estamos localizados no município de Itaúna, a 100 Km de Belo Horizonte, capital de Minas Gerais, maior polo mínero-metalúrgico do Brasil.

Name: Fundição Sideral Ltda
Description:
A Fundição Sideral Ltda atua nos mercados de fundidos e ferro gusa. Tem estabelecido um relacionamento privilegiado com diversos clientes de prestígio no cenário nacional e internacional, comprovando sua competência e profissionalismo. O sucesso no atendimento a empresas globalizadas deve-se à experiência consolidada desde 1987, aliada à ética empresarial e posicionamento mercadológico inteiramente focado no cliente.
 
A capacidade produtiva da Sideral Fundição e Siderurgia está estabelecida atualmente em 6.000 toneladas / mês para ferro gusa e 7000 toneladas / mês para fundidos.
 
A capacitação de uma equipe motivada e um engajamento na preservação do meio ambiente e na segurança de seus colaboradores complementam as bases estratégicas, fazendo da Fundição Sideral uma empresa sólida, confiável e diversificada em seus produtos. 
 

Nosso Propósito

Contribuir para um mundo  melhor e mais sustentável .

Nosso Negócio

Soluções seguras em fundidos ferrosos para partes e componentes da indústria de base, agrícola, construção e movimentação e em ferro gusa.


Nossa Missão

Fornecer fundidos ferrosos e ferro gusa agregando valor aos clientes, colaboradores, fornecedores e à sociedade, fundamentados na ética, inovação e trabalho em equipe, contribuindo para um mundo melhor e mais sustentável.

Nossa Visão do Futuro 2030

Estar entre as 5 maiores fundições do Brasil com siderurgia integrada até 2030.

Nossa Visão do Futuro de Curto Prazo

Ser a fundição e siderúrgica mais desejadas para se trabalhar nas regiões onde atuamos em Minas Gerais até 2027.

Name: Aurubis Bulgaria
Description:
Aurubis – metallurgy is our passion. 
We are a leading global multi-metal company and one of the largest copper recyclers worldwide. We process complex metal concentrates, scrap metals, and metal-bearing recycling materials into metals of the highest purity. These metals serve as the basis for key megatrends such as digitalization, renewable energies, e-mobility, and urbanization. Aurubis has about 6,900 employees at sites in Europe and the United States. 
Aurubis Bulgaria is state of the art industrial plant and dynamic organization with a solid history and bright future. Over 1000 highly skilled and motivated employees are actively contributing to that success. We have invested over 750 million EUR in modernization of the production, health and safety measures and environmental efficiency and we’re proud of who we are.

Name: Aluminium France
Description:
Aluminium France est l’organisation officielle qui représente l’industrie de l’aluminium en France auprès des pouvoirs publics, de l’administration et de la société civile. Elle rassemble les producteurs français d’alumine et d’aluminium primaire, les acteurs de la première transformation (laminage, filage, fonderie, forge), les recycleurs et affineurs d’aluminium et les équipementiers. Au total, ce sont plus de 60 usines avec plus de 10 000 emplois directs et environ 100 000 emplois indirects. La production française d’aluminium est à 50% issue du recyclage avec des applications dans des marchés stratégiques comme l’aérospatiale, la défense, la microélectronique, ou des applications indispensables à la vie de tous les jours comme l’emballage, l’automobile, le bâtiment ou la connectique. 
La production industrielle d’aluminium est une invention française et les 3 centres de R&D qui rassemblent plus de 500 ingénieurs chercheurs sont des références mondiales.

Name: ELYSIS LP
Description: ELYSIS, a Canadian Technology partnership delivering disruptive innovation for aluminium smelting, is heralding the start of a new era for the global aluminium industry. In a major step towards a more sustainable global aluminum industry, the ELYSIS technology puts an end to the use of carbon anodes in the aluminium smelting process. This revolutionary technology eliminates all direct greenhouse gas emissions from the aluminium smelting process and is the first technology ever to emit oxygen as its by-product. ELYSIS technology provides a unique solution to significantly reduce the carbon footprint of many products used in our daily lives from the transportation, construction, electrical and consumer goods industries. An unprecedented world-class partnership of two major aluminium industry pioneers - Alcoa and Rio Tinto - led to the formation of ELYSIS in 2018. The Canadian Government and the Québec Government, through the participation of Investissement Québec, are actively supporting this industry revolution. ELYSIS has established its head¬quarters in Montréal and an industrial develop¬ment site in the Saguenay-Lac-Saint-Jean region in Canada. ELYSIS Technology Development teams based in France and the United States are also part of its global organisation. The ELYSIS team is formed by experienced, competent, talented and devoted professionals who are relentlessly working on a common objective of refining the ELYSIS technology, aiming to complete its development and bring it to commercial size.

Name: Finkl Steel
Description:
Drawing on three distinct legacies of superior-quality products and services, Finkl Steel is your premier source for forged die steels, plastic mold steels, die cast tool steels and custom open-die forgings. 

Finkl has a long history of providing industry-leading technical knowledge and creative solutions. And now, by unifying three strong independent businesses – A. Finkl & Sons, Composite Forgings and Sorel Forge – Finkl Steel has further strengthened its commitment to providing the best of both. 

Today, its facilities in Chicago, Detroit, and Sorel Canada boast 296 combined years of experience, 100+ patents, 18 expert metallurgists and a variety of presses ranging from 750 to 8,000 tons. By diversifying its manufacturing base, Finkl Steel is able build and sustain a diverse inventory of products while maintaining stable lead times and consistent delivery performance.

Name: Permetal
Description:
Empresa Líder no setor de metais perfurados, com mais de 60 anos de experiência. 
A aplicação de nossos produtos atende aos mais variados segmentos de atividade: usinas de açúcar e álcool, agrícola, automotivo, de construção civil, equipamentos industriais e mineração, entre outros.
A empresa é associada  a I.P.A ( Industrial Perforators Association ) e seus produtos possuem certificados internacional de qualidade ISO 9001.

Name: Jindal Steel, Oman I جندال للحديد، عُمان
Belmetal Indústria e Comércio Ltda.
Description:
A Belmetal Indústria e Comércio Ltda. iniciou suas atividades em março de1962, na cidade de São Paulo, realizando a distribuição de chapas, bobinas e perfis de alumínio.
Desde então, seu trabalho - marcado por alto profissionalismo, ética, inovação e bom atendimento ao cliente - resultou em uma trajetória de sucesso que hoje permite à empresa ocupar posição de liderança na distribuição de produtos manufaturados e semi-manufaturados de alumínio no Brasil. 

Nossa abrangência nacional  nos permite atender de forma confiável onde quer que nosso cliente esteja localizado, oferecendo soluções e produtos focados em necessidades específicas de três setores fundamentais: Construção Civil, Indústria e Comunicação Visual.

No segmento de construção civil, a empresa detém exclusividade na distribuição dos produtos extrudados e telhas manufaturados pela Votorantim Metais CBA, a maior produtora de alumínio primário do Brasil.
Desde 2008, a Belmetal distribui também produtos classificados como não-alumínio por intermédio de sua Divisão Plásticos, os quais são destinados, sobretudo, ao segmento de comunicação visual.

Visite nosso site: www.belmetal.com.br

Name: Manoir France
Description:
Social commitment, innovation, and growth to meet new challenges

Manoir France, a Paralloy Group Company based in Pitres, specializes in metalworking.

The company develops alloys and uses processes for the manufacture of high-performance metal parts, cast and centrifuged, for the petrochemical, nuclear, oil extraction, energy, and defense markets.

Manoir France recruits across all departments and continually advocates for the metalworking professions through initiatives with schools and partnerships with universities. With the support of local partners, an apprenticeship policy has been implemented to introduce young people to metalworking careers and develop local educational programs leading to diplomas (Professional Baccalaureate in Foundry, Machining Technician Baccalaureate, BTS in Industrial Product Design, and Mechanical and Automation Engineering Diploma), supervised in the field by experienced tutors. Manoir France is proud to share the passion that drives this corporation.

Manoir focuses its Human Resources policy on the development of its teams. This is why a multi-year training plan covers more than two-thirds of the workforce. Its career management policy is operational, with annual performance reviews every year to assess performance and develop a training plan to prepare each employee for their development and advancement within the Manoir group.

Name: Synergy Advanced Metals Limited
Description:
Synergy Advanced Metals Limited an ISO 9001:2015 & AS9100D certified, one of fully integrated Stainless Steel mill in India for Stainless Steel Wire-Rod, Wires & Bright Bars.  

All production activities starting from Scraps / Melting / Hot Rolling Mill’s / Heat Treatment are carried out in-house under the same management.

Synergy has equipped with state-of-the-art industrial set-up with customised plants equipped with the latest technology-driven machinery to produce HRAP Wire Rod, Wire,  Bright Bar.  

Our Wire rod division is well equipped for delivering High-Quality products with in-house facilities for solution annealing and pickling. Our capacity to produce 2 lac ton Stainless Steel annually.

We regularly produce and supply  Grades like  201, 202, 204Cu,  301, 302, 303, 304/L, 316/L, 309, 316ti,  310, 310S, 321, 409, 410, 416, 420, 430, 434, 430F, Electrode Grades, Duplex & Super Duplex Grades like 1.4462, 1.4362  and other 400 series Grades etc.

Our Certifications :      
ISO 9001:2015
AS 9100D 
ISO 14001:2015
OHSAS 18001:2007 
REACH Regulation (EC1907/2006)
RoHS (2011/65/EU)

For further details, you may please visit our company web site: www.synergysteels.com

Name: Permetal S.A.
Description:
Empresa Líder no setor de metais perfurados, com mais de 60 anos de experiência. 
A aplicação de nossos produtos atende aos mais variados segmentos de atividade: usinas de açúcar e álcool, agrícola, automotivo, de construção civil, equipamentos industriais e mineração, entre outros.
A empresa é associada  a I.P.A ( Industrial Perforators Association ) e seus produtos possuem certificados internacional de qualidade ISO 9001.

Name: Magrathea
Description: Developing a new generation of electrolytic technology for making carbon neutral magnesium metal from seawater and brines for the era of electrification and decarbonization.

Name: Alumind - Perfil de Alumínio
Description:
Nos orgulhamos de nosso passado e somos empolgados com nosso futuro. De um início simples em 1979, chegamos a um presente desafiador e recompensador. 

Hoje, a Alumind vai além da simples extrusão de perfis de alumínio. Nos dedicamos a atender o mercado industrial de alta exigência, com foco em desenvolvimento de produtos exclusivos, soluções sob medida e atuando sob o conceito “One-Stop Shop”.

Name: EXTRUAL S.A.U.
Description:
EXTRUIDOS DEL ALUMINIO S.A. (EXTRUAL) is a consolidated company in the manufacture and sales of aluminium sections by means of the extrusion process, with numerous application solutions both in the industrial field and in building systems.

The versatility of the modern industrial installations, with the maximum level of automation in all the processes, allows EXTRUAL to have one of the most complete ranges of sections in the market, both standard and made to measure for each client.

Quality, service, innovation and access to new markets are the identity signs that characterise EXTRUAL activity. With more than 25 years of experience, it has a large part of the national production with 5 extrusion presses, a vertical coating plant, two anodising plants, one for wood-effect and another one for Thermal Bridge Break. All this at its premises of more than 40,000 square metres.

Name: TEI ALAŞIM A.Ş. - TEI ALLOYS, INC.
Description:
TEI Alaşım, Türkiye'nin metal endüstrisinde öncü konumda bulunmaktadır. Modern çelik üretim tesisi, sektördeki en gelişmiş teknolojilere sahiptir ve uzman mühendislik ekibiyle birlikte, çeşitli sektörler için özel çözümler sunmaktadır. Takım çelikleri, paslanmaz çelikler, titanyum, nikel ve kobalt bazlı süperalaşımlar gibi çok geniş bir ürün yelpazesine sahip olan TEI Alaşım, uzay, savunma, enerji, medikal, denizcilik, otomotiv gibi endüstrilerin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için çalışmaktadır.
TEI Alaşım'ın üretim tesisi, en son teknolojiye sahip ekipmanlarla donatılmıştır. Sürekli olarak yenilikçi çözümler geliştirmek için Ar-Ge çalışmalarına yatırım yapılmaktadır. Bu sayede, şirket müşterilerine yüksek kaliteli ürünler sunmayı ve sürekli olarak sektördeki taleplere cevap vermeyi başarmaktadır.
TEI Alaşım, Türkiye'nin stratejik metal alaşımlarının üretiminde öncü bir role sahiptir. Özellikle titanyum, nikel alaşımları ve özel paslanmazlar gibi nadir metallerin üretimindeki uzmanlığı, ülkenin endüstriyel kapasitesini önemli ölçüde artırmıştır. Bu malzemeler, havacılık, savunma ve enerji gibi kritik sektörlerde kullanılarak ülkenin ulusal güvenliğine ve ekonomisine katkı sağlamaktadır.
TEI Alaşım'ın üretim süreci, sıkı kalite kontrol standartlarına tabidir ve uluslararası standartlara uygun olarak gerçekleştirilir. Şirket, çevre dostu üretim yöntemlerini benimseyerek, atıkların en aza indirilmesine ve kaynakların verimli kullanılmasına özen göstermektedir.

Steel is critical to everything – everything is either made with steel or using steel. It is core to the Net Zero future and a circular economy, and 96% of steel used in construction and infrastructure in the UK is recovered and recycled to be used again and again.

Name: Blastr Green Steel
Description:
The steel industry is a major source of greenhouse gases, accounting for 9% of global CO₂ emissions. Established in 2021, Blastr Green Steel aims to decarbonize steel production by creating an integrated steel value chain leveraging Nordic advantages. The company will utilize local raw materials and fossil-free energy and apply a circular economy thinking throughout the value chain to produce cost-competitive, ultra-low CO₂ steel with ~90% lower scope 1-3 CO₂ emissions than conventional steel production. 

Blastr will establish a state-of-the-art steel plant with integrated hydrogen production at Inkoo, Finland, producing 2.5 million tonnes of flat-rolled steel annually. Blastr will also establish an iron ore pellet plant producing 6 million tonnes of high-quality direct reduction pellets to supply its steel plant, as well as the world market for direct reduction pellets. 

Blastr Green Steel is part of Vanir Green Industries and it will be one of the largest industry start-ups in the Nordic region

Committed to excellence, sustainability, and lasting partnerships, Feralloy empowers industries like automotive, construction, energy, and manufacturing to build a stronger future. Nous intervenons dans le domaine de production et fourniture des cornières en L, fer plat, le T profilé, les poutrelles UPN, le Fer Carré Plein ainsi que le Fer Rond Lisse utilisés dans l’industrie spécifique et standard, destinés aux différents secteurs d’activité telle que la construction métallique, le bâtiment et travaux publics afin de répondre au besoin du marché algérien et conquérir le marché mondial.

Name: ELLWOOD Aluminum
Description:

Our mission is to be a world-class supplier and a true partner to our customers through our metallurgical expertise, cutting-edge technology, and by supplying large aluminum ingots and billets.

Round Aluminum Ingots & Billets
- Diameters from 10'' - 32''

Rectangular Aluminum Slabs

Aluminum Cast Plates

Why ELLWOOD Aluminum?

We have state-of-the-art technology with capabilities for casting, processing, and quality monitoring of large aluminum ingots in round and rectangular slabs. Cutting edge equipment and experienced team members allow ELLWOOD Aluminum to meet any customer specifications and be a true partner to our customers.

Capabilities

-Dedicated melting and holding furnaces with a casting pit capable of lengths up to 360 inches
-Two 40-ton cranes for material handling
-JIT delivery

Industries Served

-Aerospace
-Transportation & Infrastructure
-Automotive

Name: Hindustan Gold Industries Private Limited
Description: Hindustan Gold (formerly Goldfarb) is a trailblazer in India, pioneering the development of a hydrometallurgical processing unit for precious metal concentrates. Utilizing cutting-edge technology and stringent environmental controls, the company has achieved efficient and eco-friendly operations. Hindustan Gold proudly boasts the establishment of India's premier merchant precious metals concentrate and ore processing facility in Changodar, Sanand District, Gujarat. Furthermore, Hindustan Gold maintains a world-class laboratory, equipped with advanced instruments such as ICP, AAS, XRF, and a Fire Assay Facility. This laboratory holds NABL accreditation, and the company's products are BIS Certified. We are also proud to announce that Hindustan Gold is ISO 9001:2015 certified, underscoring our commitment to quality management and continuous improvement.

Name: Aurubis Richmond
Description:
Aurubis - Metals for Progress 

Aurubis is undertaking trailblazing work with a new recycling plant in the US: for about € 300 million, the company is building the first secondary smelter specializing in multimetal recycling in the US, thus making a targeted investment in expanding its own recycling business. 

In the future, a state-of-the-art plant in Augusta (Richmond County) in the state of Georgia will process about 90,000 t of complex recycling materials annually. The plant is a key contribution to Aurubis’ commitment to the circular economy and to the company’s goal of being carbon-neutral well before 2050.

The construction started in June 2022. The plant should be commissioned in the first half of 2024.

Further information at www.aurubis.com/richmond

Name: Siderúrgica Sevillana, S.A.
Description:
Siderúrgica Sevillana S.A.  es una empresa radicada en Alcalá de Guadaíra (Sevilla) que pertenece al sector de la siderurgia no integral y que valoriza chatarras férricas para convertirlas en productos utilizables en otros sectores básicos de la actividad económica del país.

Su actividad se centra en la fundición y laminación de aceros en caliente, que viene desarrollando desde mediados de los años sesenta, formando parte integrante del Grupo Riva.

El Grupo Riva es el primer operador siderúrgico italiano a nivel mundial y uno de los principales grupos europeos del sector del acero.

Fundado en 1954 por Emilio Riva, pionero de la siderurgia en la Italia de la posguerra, el Grupo se ha especializado históricamente en la fabricación de productos "largos" con acerías de arco eléctrico y, en más de 60 años de actividad, ha logrado alcanzar un liderazgo reconocido internacionalmente -en expansión en los principales países europeos- gracias a sus elevados estándares de producción y a una estrategia precisa y constante de crecimiento e inversiones.

Dirigido desde junio de 2014 por Claudio Riva, el Grupo cuenta con capital totalmente privado y emplea a más de 5.300 personas, con una presencia cada vez más cualificada de bachilleres y jóvenes licenciados y con centros de producción situados en los siguientes países: Italia, Francia, Alemania, Bélgica, España y Canadá.

Name: US Strategic Metals

Name: ArcelorMittal SSC Europe

Name: USIPE
Description:
