O Negócio da USIPE é fabricar e comercializar produtos metálicos sob encomenda, no mercado de Fundidos, Usinados e Caldeiraria. Fabricamos peças conforme as especificações dos desenhos e projetos dos clientes, de acordo com as normas técnicas internacionais. 
Priorizamos o atendimento, confiabilidade e alta tecnologia, investindo sempre em equipamentos, modernização, tecnologia e mão de obra qualificada, resultando na conquista de um mercado amplo para seus produtos, com parcerias duradouras com empresas referências no mercado nacional e internacional.

Name: UIMM Loire-Atlantique
Description:
L’UIMM Loire-Atlantique est une organisation professionnelle patronale dont la vocation est de contribuer à la compétitivité des entreprises industrielles.
Dotée d’une expertise notamment en droit social appliqué, l’UIMM Loire-Atlantique joue aujourd’hui un rôle central dans l’assistance et l’accompagnement de ses adhérents sur l’ensemble des thématiques du droit du travail, de la protection sociale, des ressources humaines, de la santé, la sécurité, l’environnement, la performance, la formation.
L’UIMM Loire-Atlantique c’est avant tout une communauté de plus de 300 entreprises du territoire représentant près de 35 000 salariés, dirigée par ses pairs au sein d’un Comité Directeur. Cette gouvernance oriente la politique locale de la branche et adapte les moyens de sa structure aux besoins de son réseau d’adhérents.
La diversité des secteurs d’activité des entreprises du territoire constitue une véritable spécificité et richesse locale (aéronautique, naval, EMR, mécanique, électronique, biens d’équipements, automobile, transformation des métaux…)

Name: Arania S.A.
Description:
ARANIA S.A. is a private, independent company with more than 70 years of experience in the manufacture of cold-rolled steel strip..

ARANIA is a company whose expertise lies in integrating its customers' production processes and management knowledge in order to achieve maximum quality and reliability throughout the value chain. The auxiliary automotion sector, along with several users of steel with specific requirements, is the international target of ARANIA's unique production flexibility. Anunequivocal exporting vocation, which is reflected in that currently 70% of our production is intended for markets abroad. Our products are sold throughout Europe, Central and South America.

ARANIA has a production plant located in Amorebieta. Its location and the available transport infrastructures nearby offer excellent communication possibilities which are key factors for Arania’s service: Direct access by motorway to Bilbao (Port/airport) and to the south of France.

ARANIA S.A. is active in the sector of precision steel strip, offering alloyed and micro-alloyed cold-rolled low and high carbon steel strips and stripping process. 

We have the most advanced technology currently available on the market to provide a competitive product which is adapted to our customers' needs.

Our production plant is located 30 km from the port, in the vicinity of Bilbao airport and on one of the main land communication networks in Europe.

Name: Bendco Houston Pipe Benders
Description:
Since 1960, Bendco Houston Pipe Benders has delivered pipe bending, structural steel rolling, and coiling solutions. From stadiums to pipelines, subsea to process piping, we serve a wide range of industries. We handle materials from ½” to 36”, including carbon steel, stainless steel, aluminum, and more. 

Whether it’s easy way or hard way rolling, tight-radius bends, or custom coils for vessels, barges, or heaters, our team has the tools and experience to get it done. Our six-acre facility near the Port of Houston is built for fast turnaround and consistent quality. With in-house non-destructive testing and pipe end preparation like beveling and taper boring, we deliver products that are ready to go to work. 

Our specialty is when right now matters. Call us 24 x 7 x 365 to inquire about standard or expedited delivery options.

Pipe Bending | Steel Rolling | Coiling | Fabrication & Finishing

Name: Adukia Industries
Description: Adukia Industries has earned a distinguished reputation in the Metal Casting, Iron & Steel Industry as a trusted name. Founded in 1971 with a vision to achieve excellence in the industrial sector, the company has grown rapidly and established a strong presence in India and global markets.

Name: Super Ligas Metais
Description:
A Super Ligas é uma empresa constituída por capital 100% nacional, fundada em 1996 por profissionais com larga experiência no mercado de mineração e fundição.

Nosso parque fabril está localizado na cidade de Piracicaba, interior do estado de São Paulo, onde contamos com uma estrutura moderna e equipamentos que possibilitam-nos a execução do beneficiamento e fundição do minério de cassiterita, originando o Estanho puro.

Através de processos internos de refino, nosso Estanho atinge elevadíssimo grau de pureza que excede especificações de qualidade das Normas Brasileiras e Internacionais da ASTM. Nosso Laboratório é dotado de modernos instrumentos que conferem confiabilidade e segurança as análises químicas dos nossos lotes de produção.

Industrializamos e comercializamos, além do Estanho Puro, uma extensa linha de ligas específicas que atende ao mercado de siderurgia, metalurgia, fundição, metal-mecânica, automobilística, hidráulica, eletrodeposição, confecção de bijuterias, galvano-química, eletroeletrônica e outros.

Através de uma filosofia empreendedora e participativa, atuamos ativamente com nossos clientes no intuito de apresentar soluções adequadas às suas realidades. Contamos com colaboradores internos e Representantes Comerciais totalmente envolvidos com as diretrizes da Empresa e com as necessidades de nossos clientes.

O Compromisso com a qualidade dos produtos e serviços, somados a busca pela satisfação de nossos clientes, levam-nos diariamente a implementar ferramentas tecnológicas que garantam resultados positivos com a utilização de nossos materiais.

Estamos certificados na Gestão da Qualidade com base na NBR ISO 9001:2015.

Name: Balajee Group Of Industries
Description:
Balajee Group is one of the largest and well-managed organisations of Chhattisgarh. We are the leading Billet, Bloom, Ingots, Round, Flat, Structural Steel, TMT Re-Bars and ERW Tube manufacturers in Central India. Established in 1988 with the vision to add muscle to the development of the nation, we manufacture and supply all types of Structural Steel, and Reinforcement Steel. We have a commitment towards our customers, employees, and environment, and believe in delivering the promises we make, with utmost care and quality. We work keeping the Kaizen philosophy in mind, a Japanese term which means continuous improvement. This philosophy enables us to enhance the quality of our products and services.
Our Brands: 
BALAJEE STRUCTURE, CONCRETE TMT, CONCRETE STRUCTURES & CONCRETE PIPES

Name: Riva Group
Description: Riva Group contributes to the dynamics of a healthy economy based on the principles of environmental sustainability and respect for mankind. The main goal is to improve the quality of life of stakeholders through direct contribution to economic, social and environmental dynamics. Founded in 1954 by Emilio Riva, a pioneer in postwar Italian steel sector, the Group has specialized in the manufacturing of “long” products using electric arc steelworks, and in more than 60 years of business it has achieved an international leadership, expanding in the main European countries, thanks to high production standards, steady strategy of growth and investments. The production activity is based on circular and non-extractive economy that promotes recycling of end-of-life steel. Chaired by Claudio Riva since May 2014, the Group is privately owned and boasts over 5.500 employees, with an increasingly qualified presence of high school and university graduates. Italy, with its Headquarter, France, Germany, Belgium, Spain and Canada are the countries in which Riva Group contributes to the local and international economy. The Riva Group maintains an important market share in “long” products - over 10% in the European Union area - which confirms its leadership position in this important market segment. The Group implements yearly a significant investment program aimed at innovating the steel recycling process, improving the qualitative aspects of products and processes, the safety conditions of the employees in the plants and the environmental compatibility of production. The Group supplies various product sectors, some of which - such as mechanics, automotive and earthmoving - require particularly high-quality standards. The production includes, among other items, drawn, peeled and grinding products deriving from the further cold processing of the rolled products.

Name: CELSA Huta Ostrowiec
Description:
Celsa Huta Ostrowiec is part of CELSA GROUP, the largest Spanish-owned steel company and the second largest European long products producer. The multinational consists of eight large business groups with steel producers, rolling mills, processing plants, distribution companies and recycling centers. With more than  9,300 employees worldwide and with an industrial presence in Denmark, Spain, Finland, France, Norway, Poland, Sweden and the United Kingdom.

In autumn 2003 CELSA Group acquired Huta Ostrowiec - steel plant in Poland of almost 200 years of experience in steel products manufacturing. 

Today Celsa Huta Ostrowiec is an industrial enterprise consisting of two divisions: 
Rolled Products Division equipped with continuously casting melt shop, rolling mill of bars and rolling mill of profiles. 
Forged Products Division equipped with melt shop and modern machines producing completely finished products with mechanical and thermal treatment focused on developing solutions for the energy sector.

Name: Finkelstein Metals Ltd. & Finkestein Metals USA
Description:
100 years of expert activity in the manufacturing of Non-Ferrous Metal Castings and Extrusions have resulted in Finkelstein Metals Ltd gaining a high reputation in the Non-Ferrous Metal business. The modern technology used in its manufacturing processes, its constantly growing range of products, commitment to precision, quality, accurate delivery times and long-term service to its ranks of satisfied and loyal customers in many parts of the globe attest to this reputation. New customers who constantly join the team of Finkelstein Metals' users will vouch for its well-earned name.

ISO • AS9100 • ASTM • EN • BS • DIN • UNI • SAE • AMS • ASME • QQB • QQC

From a small family metal casting workshop until becoming Israel's leading specialist in Continuous Casting and Extruded Bronze and Copper Alloys Finkelstein Metals also offer a wide range of high quality extruded Brass products. 

Finkelstein Metals mill products are stocked in Chicago!
The new North America warehouse brings our mill products closer to our up-growing number of customers, allowing much better service. Large off the shelve stock, next day shipping, smaller quantities per order, mixed orders (alloys, sizes & shapes), quality products & competitive pricing.

It is our aim to maintain highest international standards and to keep up with product and marketing trends. In order to do this we employ the most advanced equipment resulting in the most efficient and economical manufacturing processes and methods. Thus we can use modern induction melting and holding furnaces to produce the highest grade Continuous Casting and Extrusion systems and provide the best quality dense alloys and finely structured grains, giving negligible porosity, the highest tolerances and the finest finish to our products.

Our state-of-the-art cleaning systems give the customer high quality surface finishes. A Certificate of Analysis (C.O.A.) is issued to the customer for every batch.

Name: IPP-LEDA Ltd. (Special Steels & Nickel Alloys - Bar Division)
Description:
IPP-LEDA is a newly formed stockholder, processor and distributor of special stainless steels and nickel alloys in solid round bar and sawn blank form. 

Whilst the website is under construction please contact us by email sales.leda@ippgrp.com or telephone @ +44 (0)7795 841040

Name: Samuel Advanced Fabrication
Description:
Samuel Advanced Fabrication specializes in diversification. The extraordinary variety of the work we perform attests to the can-do attitude that permeates our organization. Samuel Advanced Fabrication solves and delivers products and services for the complex challenges and requirements of our customers by using our vertical integration offering of services. *Engineering *Design *Automation *Technology *Manufacturing  *Precision Machining *Integration & *Maintenance Services

Our Vision
To be a global leader in innovation, technology and a manufacturer of product based solutions that enable our customers’ success. “Your Complete Solutions Provider”
 
Our Mission
We are a customer focused growth oriented company committed to delivering quality products while maintaining a constant focus on value creation for our shareholders.
 
We will accomplish this by:
 
Promoting a culture of ownership and responsibility while fostering a culture of strong teamwork and collaboration.
Exceeding customers’ expectations by always delivering a quality product on time.
Partnering with our customers to make sure they succeed.
Investing in our people, our equipment and our facilities to offer our customers the best value possible.
Creating a better customer experience and produce products thru innovation, creativity and ingenuity.
Being a complete solutions provider and our customers’ most valued business partner.
Being the most respected company in our respective industries.
Maintaining strong vendor relationships to ensure best prices, quality and delivery.
 
Our Values
Conduct business with the highest level of professionalism and integrity.
Be responsible corporate citizens and improve the communities where we work and live.
Put quality first, Do it the right the first time.
Adhere to responsible financial management providing long-term company stability.
Respect the environment and the health & safety of our employees.
Commit to continuous improvement as our way of life.

Name: REAL Group - GK TMT
Description:
GK TMT, the name has become our company's identity. This brand has sent waves across the nation and Real Ispat & Power Ltd. is proud of its most famous product. 

Real Ispat & Power Ltd. is an integrated manufacturing firm and one of the fastest growing companies with a strong presence in the steel and Power sector. The company’s success story is backed by an extraordinary history. Under the leadership of three brothers, Mr. Rajesh Agrawal, Mr. Umesh Agrawal and Mr. Ramesh Agrawal, the growth of the company has always been ahead of the curve. A dream of creating a world-class company that pushes the boundaries of manufacturing technology through innovation, disruption and a unique management style was seeded a long time ago.

RIPL entered the steel sector in the year 2000 and has slowly and steadily increased its contribution in the same ever since. The company has always believed in stabilizing and perfecting the existing set-up before moving on to the next step and it is this approach that has become our signature for success. RIPL caters to its clients through unparalleled quality, personalized service and development of a bond unmatched by any other. The multiple plants under the RIPL umbrella are all well versed with the latest technologies and are led by teams that cease to surprise in terms of commitment, dedication and creativity. These traits, which are valued quite highly and are a source for inspiration and motivation, are reflected in our products and services.

RIPL’s true identity is imbedded in its contribution towards society. The company is well known for its CSR activities that span through every aspect of human life and the world we live in. We take immense pleasure in knowing that our efforts are helping build a greener environment, a developed society and a much more sustainable future.

Name: Perfipar Manufaturados de Aço
Description:
A Perfipar foi fundada em 1969 e desde então, cresceu e foi cada vez mais sendo reconhecida pelo mercado.
Atualmente, a empresa é um dos maiores fabricantes de tubos de aço de pequeno diâmetro do país.  O portfólio é composto por tubos em aço carbono com costura  e  materiais rodoviários.
Sem que você perceba, os produtos fabricados e comercializados pela Perfipar compõe a estrutura de diversos produtos que fazem parte do seu dia a dia.
Para estar presente na vida das pessoas, fornecemos materiais de qualidade para proporcionar bem-estar a elas. Por isso contamos com uma completa infraestrutura, com capacidade para processar 90 mil toneladas de aço por ano, composta por uma administração central e unidade fabril, em Colombo.
A empresa também mantém uma rede de vendedores e representantes, para atender de forma plena no mercado nacional.

Para conhecer mais sobre a empresa, acesse: www.perfipar.com.br | facebook.com/perfipar

Name: Metal Powder Works
Description:
MPW was founded in 2017 by John E. Barnes and Christopher Aldridge , veterans of the aerospace and defense markets with profound knowledge of additive manufacturing and powder production. Their experience in the space drove them to think about powder production in a revolutionary new way resulting in the patent pending MPW process which produces tailorable powders in a wide variety of alloys. It represents the first true invention in powder manufacturing in over 50 years. 

The company hit success early with awarded contracts from the Department of Energy and APRA-E via UC Davis and Carnegie Melon University.

Successful initial demonstrations of MPW’s DirectPowder have been completed in multiple additive manufacturing processes including Laser Powder Bed Fusion and Cold Spray.

Name: Vardhman Tube Mills
Description: Vardhman Tube Mills is a leading manufacturer and exporter of supreme quality Pipes and Tubes in Mumbai, India. Our Pipes and Tubes are available in Stainless Steel and Duplex Steel in various types like seamless, welded, square, rectangular, polish pipes, hydraulic pipes and so on. With the new technologies, we have a well-equipped infrastructure that enables us to deliver a wide range of products.

Name: Neo-Z Arames
Description:
Somos a Metalúrgica Nhozinho, uma empresa nacional com mais de 60 anos, atuando no mercado de arames e trefilação de aço. Acreditamos que o sucesso de qualquer relacionamento, seja ele pessoal ou empresarial, se baseia na confiança.
Nosso compromisso com a qualidade dos nossos produtos e serviços é uma das nossas maiores prioridades. 
Temos orgulho em dizer que nossa empresa é sinônimo de excelência em qualidade e serviço. Trabalhamos com profissionais altamente capacitados e equipamentos com tecnologia e expertise para garantir que nossos produtos sejam os melhores do mercado. Atendemos diversos segmentos como automotivo, linha branca, máquinas e equipamentos industriais .
Nosso relacionamento com nossos clientes é baseado em confiança e honestidade. Se você busca comprometimento, agilidade e diferenciação, a Nhozinho é o lugar certo para você.

Name: Marcegaglia Stainless Sheffield
Description:
Marcegaglia Stainless Sheffield is part of Marcegaglia, an Italian industrial group leading the European and Worldwide steel market. Marcegaglia offers a unique combination of a dynamic Italian family business model with great operating capacity and presence in the international markets.
 
Marcegaglia Stainless Sheffield has three sites across Sheffield, they include our own Melting Shop called SMACC (Stainless Melting And Continuous Casting), that produces semi-finished products such as slabs, billets, blooms and ingots; ASR (Alloy Steel Rods), our rolling mill that produces wire rod, bar and rebar and SSB (Sheffield Stainless Bar), our bar finishing unit.

Name: Produr
Description:
PRODUR est le spécialiste français des solutions anti-usure. Notre expertise incontestable et notre large gamme de matériaux anti-usure nous permettent de répondre aux besoins de nos clients, voire de les surpasser.

 Client first : Chez Produr, la satisfaction de nos clients est au centre de tout ce que nous faisons. Chaque solution que nous proposons est adaptée à vos besoins et à vos problématiques.

 Équipe Exceptionnelle : Notre équipe dévouée, composée de femmes et d'hommes, est la gardienne de notre expertise unique, transmise de génération en génération. Ensemble, nous formons une équipe agile et proactive, prête à relever tous les défis.

 Performance et Durabilité : Nous nous engageons à fournir des matériaux durables qui évitent les pertes de temps, d'argent et d'énergie humaine et matérielle dans la production industrielle. Notre objectif : vous offrir des solutions fiables et pérennes.

 Innovation Continue : Nous sommes constamment en recherche de solutions innovantes grâce à notre expertise approfondie des matériaux et des processus industriels. Chaque jour, nous relevons de nouveaux défis pour vous offrir le meilleur.

Vous cherchez des solutions anti-usure de pointe pour votre entreprise ? Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour discuter de vos besoins à l'adresse info@wa-produr.com. 

Nous sommes toujours à la recherche de talents passionnés pour rejoindre notre équipe. Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure où la performance, la qualité et la satisfaction client sont au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons.

Ensemble, nous créons l'excellence industrielle.

 Site Web : www.wa-produr.com

Name: Nucor Steel Gallatin
Description:
At Nucor Steel Gallatin, we believe in forging a brighter future and being part of something bigger. As a division of Nucor, a Fortune 100 company, and ranked No. 1 in our industry on the list of the World’s Most Admired Companies, and America’s largest recycler and manufacturer of steel and steel products, we're not your run-of-the-mill steel company. We're a powerhouse of innovation, strength and community focused on sustainability and efficiency. 
 
Nucor Steel Gallatin’s Compact Strip Production operations began in 1995. We extended our business into the galvanizing market in 2019 by installing our Pickle Galvanizing Line at our facility on the Ohio River banks in Gallatin, KY. And now, after recent expansions, our sheet mill has the capacity to produce more than 3 million tons of hot band coils annually, which go into making many of the items in our homes, autos, factories and farms. We're proud to be part of the Nucor family and our commitment to sustainability and excellence by recycling more than a million pounds of scrap steel each year.
 
But it's not just about steel for us. It's about people. Our family of more than 700 full-time teammates is a force to be reckoned with — dedicated, talented and passionate about what we do. We give our teammates the safety, freedom and opportunities to band together under a common purpose: to shape the world with our steel, one beam at a time.
 
Beyond our factory walls, we're deeply rooted in the community. We believe in giving back, supporting local initiatives and fostering a culture of growth and opportunity. We're here to make a positive impact within our organization and the world around us through recycling, renewable energy and sustainable steelmaking.
 
Follow our page for exciting updates, behind-the-scenes peeks into our operations and stories of the incredible individuals who make Nucor Steel Gallatin tougher than steel itself.
 
Together, let's build a stronger, safer and cleaner future.

Name: Reelotek Metals
Description:
Reelotek Metals is a fast-growing non-ferrous metals trading company with a strong presence in Delhi and Haryana. We specialize in the procurement and distribution of zinc ingots, aluminium ingots, and aluminium wirerods, serving clients across various industrial sectors.

Backed by deep market insight, operational agility, and a commitment to quality, we aim to provide reliable supply solutions to our customers while maintaining competitive pricing and efficient service.

Our focus is on building long-term relationships, scaling responsibly, and staying ahead in an evolving metal economy.

Headquartered in Delhi NCR, with active operations in Haryana.

Name: Raykam Alloys LLP
Description:
Raykam Alloys LLP is focused on developing a high-quality Ferrous and Non-Ferrous raw material supply chain which results in customers' benefit with better prices and well-planned logistics. We are focused on procuring superior quality material at competitive prices to ensure our customers are catered to with a steady supply of quality material per their needs.

• Nickel Alloys
• Aluminium Alloys
• Titanium Alloys

Name: Metalúrgica Garden
Description:
Desde 1980, a Garden tem se destacado como referência nos setores de construção civil, jardinagem e hidráulica. Com 45 anos de trajetória, a empresa consolida sua posição no mercado ao oferecer soluções que aliam qualidade, resistência e eficiência.

Somos líderes na fabricação da maior linha de torneiras de boia do mercado, além de produtos especializados para jardinagem e conexões em metal. Nossos itens, reconhecidos pela durabilidade e desempenho, são produzidos com matérias-primas de alta qualidade, como latão, ZAMAC, alumínio e plástico.

Com uma planta industrial moderna e automatizada, garantimos eficiência nas entregas, controle rigoroso de qualidade e uma produção 100% nacional. Nosso compromisso com a inovação e o aprimoramento contínuo nos permite atender a um portfólio diversificado e competitivo.

Atendemos mais de 20 mil clientes ativos em todo o Brasil, marcando presença em distribuidores de materiais de construção, indústrias e construtoras. Nosso foco está em crescer com propósito, fortalecendo a confiança que construímos ao longo de décadas.

Metalúrgica Garden – 45 anos de confiança e inovação, criando soluções que fazem a diferença no dia a dia.

For over 40 years, we have been staying ahead of industry trends with innovative, exceptional displays and fixtures at competitive costs. Perryman Company is the first fully vertically integrated manufacturer of specialty titanium products. From melt to finished product, our process and technical expertise ensure we meet the highest industry standards while remaining flexible to evolve with our customers’ needs as they grow. 

Our certifications and accreditations: ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D, NADCAP Certificate #212782, BSI Certificate ISO 13485:2016, and Scope of NADCAP Accreditation.

Description:
Stark Mounting designs and manufactures high-quality steel mounting systems for photovoltaic power plants. 

With 16 years of engineering experience, we provide rooftop, ground-mounted, and carport structures made from high-strength steel protected by an Al-Mg-Zn coating for superior corrosion resistance.

Our modular systems are designed to optimize installation processes and reduce long-term maintenance costs, supporting companies in delivering durable and future-ready solar projects across Europe and beyond.

Fabricação de peças e acessórios para veículos automotivos. 

Compromisso com a qualidade, sustentabilidade e segurança. Nossa Política Integrada é sinônimo de excelência.

Na Polimetri, nossos princípios de Recursos Humanos, detalhados em nossa Missão, Visão e Valores, são o alicerce de nossa atuação. Sustentabilidade, Qualidade e Liderança são os pilares que sustentam nossas operações. Estamos comprometidos em desenvolver nossos colaboradores como motores de excelência, alinhados com as melhores práticas e regulamentações globais e locais.

Name: Companhia Metalúrgica Portuguesa
Description:
COMP, it's a young and dynamic organization, with a progressive mindset, rooted in the principles of rigor and tradition.

Our mission it's built on the fundamental values of expertise and a strong commitment in quality and excellence.

Name: SONHA SSP VIETNAM
Description:
Established in 2015, Son Ha SSP Vietnam is a member of Son Ha Group - one of the leading diversified conglomerates in Vietnam with many subsidiaries, 9 factories inside and outside the country, 100 branches, 20,000 distributors, and 3,000 employees. Son Ha SSP inherits and continues the strengths of production technology and business of the Group, becoming a major stainless steel tube manufacturer in the world.

The stainless steel tube products of Son Ha SSP Company have been distributed nationwide through the distribution system and exported to over 45 countries worldwide, including demanding markets with high requirements such as the US, France, Turkey, Russia, Brazil... and proud to be the only Vietnamese enterprise granted the PED certificate by the international organization TUV (Germany).

Name: Alter Steel
Description:
To make the cleanest steel in Australia, something needs to change — Alter Steel is leading this important shift. 

The proposed Pinkenba Steel Mill is set to become Queensland’s first producer of clean, sustainable reinforcing steel, producing the lowest carbon reinforcement in the country. Leveraging global technology and having secured the Pinkenba site, the project aims to drive economic growth, community engagement, and local responsibility. Construction is set to begin in 2025, with operations expected to commence in 2027, setting new standards in the steel industry.

Name: SIJ Acroni
Description:
SIJ Acroni specializes in producing hot- and cold-rolled steel products. Besides being the largest Slovenian steel manufacturer, SIJ Acroni is among the leading European manufacturers of stainless steel heavy plates and one of the most important manufacturers of high-strength, wear-resistant, tool and electrical steel. Our products are used in the energy sector, oil and gas sector, construction machinery, agricultural machinery, mining equipment, machine manufacture, construction, shipbuilding, and the automotive industry.
SIJ Acroni makes small batches of high-quality steel products with high added value for niche markets. We are a flexible company, constantly following progress in the market, and we pay a lot of attention to the development of new, tailor-made products. The focus of our operations are the customers, with whom we build long-term partnerships and cooperative ventures. In cooperation with them and for them we develop products which best fit the intended purpose of use.

Name: Ducab Metals Business - DMB
Description:
Ducab Metals Business (DMB) is a reliable and responsible supplier of high-quality copper and aluminium solutions. It is committed to delivering pioneering sustainable metal solutions globally. Established in 2020 as part of the Ducab Group, DMB builds upon a legacy of trust and over two decades of heritage, offering tailored copper and aluminium solutions.

With two state-of-the-art facilities and a total installed capacity of over 235,000 tonnes per annum, DMB is a leader in industry innovation. The company is dedicated to increasing process efficiency, sustainable sourcing, recycling, and reducing its carbon footprint. DMB's approach integrates sound financial strategies and a robust supply chain designed to address the evolving needs of various industries effectively.

Name: Najd Steel
Description:
We are one of the leading steel melting factories with management philosophy of passion, creativity and challenge.

NAJD STEEL started manufacturing in 2011 and always takes a step forward to the future with the constant quality improvement and technology development.

NAJD STEEL is acknowledged for its excellence in quality not only by prestigious clients in Saudi Arabia but also in Jordan, UAE and countries in Africa & Asia.

We produce hot billets taken out directly during casting process of steel.

Hot billets produced in a square cross-section with variant lengths. They fall under the category of semi-finished casting products. NAJD STEEL has a high production capacity can match high technical specifications as per the client requests.

We launch new products in various fields through new technologies based on know-how.

Name: Headmade Materials GmbH
Description:
Headmade Materials is an innovator in the field of material and process development for metal additive manufacturing.   

With our roots in material science, we distribute our self-developed, in-house produced standard feedstocks or adapt individual alloys according to customer requirements. 

With our smart materials, we actively contribute to the future of metal 3D printing by opening new possibilities and making it more accessible to ultimately increase its general acceptance in the industry.

Name: Aramebras
Description:
A Aramebras é uma empresa 100% nacional que possui know-how de 30 anos no mercado.

Nesse longo caminho percorrido, nós passamos por muitos desafios e adaptações. Apostamos em inovação para aprimorar nossa produção, com atenção ao uso de recursos naturais e às práticas sustentáveis.

Description: Petitjean is located in France, next to Troyes city, on an industrial site of 30 hectares where masts of all dimensions are designed and manufactured. Research and development, industrialization, cutting, welding, galvanization, painting, all design and manufacturing steps are achieved on site in order to provide french and worldwide customers.

Description:
WHY CHOOSE THREE D METALS
Three D Metals is a service-driven company focused on the slitting and distribution of value-added ferrous and non-ferrous metals. We offer an extensive inventory of high carbon spring steel, cold-rolled steel, copper, aluminum, and brass materials.

THREE D METALS IS A WORLD-CLASS METAL SUPPLIER
There’s a lot that sets us apart, but the reasons our customers continue to choose us is our industry knowledge, range, and depth of inventory, quality, reliability, our world-class customer service, and our commitment to sustainability.

CONSOLIDATED DEPTH AND RANGE OF INVENTORY
Our customers turn to us as their “one-stop-shop” for all metal supply and servicing needs. Our exceptional inventory includes aluminum, copper, high carbon steel, bronze, brass, and welding filler metals in a huge range of sizes, thicknesses, and weights suitable for a variety of industries.

Visit our website to explore our products »

Name: Steel tubes and pipes | Železiarne Podbrezová
Description: Železiarne Podbrezová is a significant manufacturer and supplier of steel tubes, tube semi-products and tubular fitting in Central Europe.  The core production rests in manufacturing of steel in modern steelworks and continuous casting of units. Main share is represented by hot rolled steel seamless tubes and precise cold drawn tubes from carbon and low alloy steel within size range of 3–140 mm. Tubes are designed for use in various fields of industry, in particular in engineering, automobile production and energy sectors.

Name: Jackwal S.A
Description:

Name: Huta Pokój Profile Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Historię śląskiego i polskiego hutnictwa współtworzymy już od 1840 roku. Taki bagaż doświadczeń, gromadzonych przez wielopokoleniowe rzesze ludzi, którzy całe swoje życie związali z hutą i jej rozwojem – stanowi bardzo solidną opokę. Dzięki temu głównie, przez cały ten czas, pomimo wielu burzliwych zawirowań historii oraz skomplikowanych przemian politycznych i gospodarczych, należymy do grupy przedsiębiorstw wiodących w branży. W ostatnich latach, po wydzieleniu ze struktur Huty Pokój, skoncentrowaliśmy się na doskonaleniu tej części hutniczego rzemiosła, która polega na produkcji wysokiej jakości kształtowników stalowych. Nasze wyroby sygnujemy odtąd marką Huta Pokój Profile, a od 2020 roku stanowimy też znaczący element grupy kapitałowej WĘGLOKOKS.
Jesteśmy dzisiaj dużym, ambitnie rozwijającym się i inwestującym w nowoczesne technologie przedsiębiorstwem. Dla odbiorców, produkowanych i dystrybuowanych przez nas wyrobów stalowych, wyróżnikiem naszej marki jest już nie tylko najwyższa ich jakość, lecz także rzadko spotykana na rynku elastyczność i umiejętność spełniania ich specjalnych wymagań. Dbamy również o nieustanny rozwój pracowników i dobre relacje z otoczeniem społecznym, bo… ci pierwsi, to często przedstawiciele „któregoś kolejnego pokolenia hutników” w rodzinie, ci drudzy zaś, to zazwyczaj nasi byli pracownicy. A poza tym jesteśmy przecież „stąd” i na dobrej przyszłości tego miejsca zależy nam najbardziej.

Name: KBM Affilips group
Description:
KBM Affilips B.V. (KBMA) is the marketing & sales company for the master alloys manufactured by its production companies KBM Master Alloys B.V. (KBM) and Affilips N.V.; both founded in the early sixties of the last century. Production takes place in 3 metallurgical plants in Holland + Belgium:

KBM – Delfzijl (the former Kawecki-Billiton plant, the first AlTiB producer in EU, previously owned by Shell/Billiton.) + Oss (NL) has established a reputation as an innovator and cost leader in the production of Aluminium Titanium Boron grain refiners for the aluminium industry, offering a wide range of advanced products in this field. Other products include Aluminium Strontium and alloying tablets/briquettes.  

Affilips in Tienen (B) has built an excellent reputation as a producer of aluminium-, copper-, nickel-, cobalt- and zinc-based master alloys. Affilips's customers use these special master alloys in the manufacture of a wide range of highly specialised metal products, including special steels and superalloys for aircraft engines, nuclear reactors and other demanding applications. Thanks to its extensive use of recycled raw materials, where suitable, Affilips can achieve both environmental and economic objectives at the same time.

The merger between KBM and Affilips resulted in a valuable mixture of knowledge and experience, allowing KBMA to present itself as a global partner for a wide range of industries. As one of the major players in the int. market KBMA is a totally export-driven organisation that ships over 40.000 mtpa of master alloys to 80 countries. Consistent and excellent product quality is assured by independently certified quality and environmental management systems, modern laboratories and R&D facilities.

KBMA, KBM and Affilips as a group employ approx. 250 people and are wholly owned subsidiaries of Roba Holding B.V. which has its registered office in IJsselstein - NL.

Stainless steel is used in the manufacture of many products primarily for its corrosion resistant properties. Elements such as aluminum, copper, silicon, titanium and others are added to the specific alloy to modify the physical and chemical properties. The addition of alloying elements to the chemistry produces alloys that can be easily machined or may have superior strength or corrosion resistance. Our products are used in the following industries, but not limited to Aerospace, Automotive, Medical Devices, Electronics, Food Service, Brewing and Pulp/Paper, Marine and Power Generation.

As a part of Armstrong International, solving problems with innovative and intelligent products is at the heart of what we do. Making business refreshingly simple and pleasant for our customers is how we do it. You’ll find intelligent system solutions from Armstrong at work in thousands of companies across dozens of industry categories from food and beverage processing and chemicals and refining, to health care, education, industrial manufacturing and more. 

While our solutions have evolved and expanded greatly over the 110 years we’ve been in business, our fundamental way of doing business has not. As companies grow they can become complex and bureaucratic. At Armstrong, we empower our people to respond and take action. No waiting for a decision from someone in the corner office. That’s why we remain one of the swiftest and simplest companies to do business with on the planet. 

It all translates to many more enjoyable experiences for you. Pure and simple. 

More information on : 
http://www.armstronginternational.com
http://www.devatec.com/en

Name: Forjaria Brasileira de Metais
Description:
A FBM Forjaria é uma reconhecida empresa de forjamento, com atuação em metalúrgicas, indústrias agrícolas e no segmento de autopeças de todo o território brasileiro e regiões da América Latina. A fabricante é reconhecida pela sua eficiência de produção, bom atendimento e alto padrão de qualidade de seus produtos, bem como ótimos prazos de entrega. Além de ter anos de experiência no mercado, ao lado de uma equipe de colaboradores muito bem treinados e uma solida estrutura de trabalho. Dessa forma, a empresa se mantém com destaque no segmento, sempre em busca das melhores soluções para seus clientes, demonstrando todo o seu comprometimento e credibilidade.

Missão - Ser  uma empresa especializada no forjamento à quente de peças em aço, para a indústria metal-mecânica, atendendo a diversos segmentos: automotivo, máquinas e implementos agrícolas, infraestrutura ferroviária, construção civil, indústria naval e aeronáutica, entre outros. 

Visão - Ser uma empresa de excelência no ramo de fabricação de forjados em aço, transmitindo aos seus clientes confiança e credibilidade , atendendo de forma integral às suas expectativas quanto à qualidade do produto, prazo de entrega e custo de nossos produtos e serviços.
Ser uma empresa que evolui a cada dia em termos de qualidade de processos e produtos,  o que possibilitará um crescimento da empresa de forma organizada, estruturada e sustentável.

Valores
 - Praticar a honestidade e a seriedade em todas as nossas relações profissionais.
 - Construir parcerias duradouras com clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores.
 - Buscar a evolução contínua (produtos, colaboradores e organização).
 - Entender e atender às necessidades dos clientes.
 - Ter visão futura de longo prazo com foco em resultados.
 - Promover o respeito aos nossos colaboradores, à sociedade e ao meio ambiente.

Name: PROQUAI
Description: Spécialiste dans l'installation, la maintenance & la réparation des fermetures industrielles & les équipements quai. Nous proposons également des projecteurs de marquage au sol et des barrières de protections impactables afin de sécurité les collaborateurs sur site.

Name: 3G Engenharia LTDA
Description:
MISSÃO: Prestar serviços de engenharia com eficiência e qualidade no ramo petrolífero, portuário, industrial e de fabricação de estruturas metálicas por meio de uma equipe altamente qualificada e experiente.

VISÃO: Ser referência no desenvolvimento da indústria regional. Nosso objetivo é atender com excelência as demandas específicas das regiões Norte e Nordeste, promovendo soluções eficientes e contribuindo para o fortalecimento da economia local.

VALORES: Qualidade – Somos Comprometidos em entregar serviços e produtos com excelência, superando as expectativas dos clientes.
Segurança – Garantimos um ambiente de trabalho seguro, priorizando a integridade e bem-estar de todos.
Excelência – Focarmos na experiência do cliente, oferecendo soluções eficientes e atendimento diferenciado.
Reconhecimento – Investimos no crescimento e valorização dos nossos profissionais, promovendo um ambiente de trabalho justo e motivador.

Name: Kimtin Welding
Description:
Over the past 23 years of establishment and development, Kim Tin has risen to become a leader in welding consumables manufacturing and trading industry. Kim Tin also expanded its scale to become a conglomerate, diversifying in many industries such as welding consumables, non-ferrous metals, MDF boards, MDF products, mining, logistics...

Kim Tin constantly researches and produces the best products to serve customers across the country. We are also proud that our welding consumables have been exported to 5 continents. Kim Tin sets a target by 2025 to account for 35% of the welding materials market share in the country.

Name: Diversified Specialty Metals formally Diversified Ulbrich of Canada Inc
Description:
Diversified Specialty Metals is a full line stainless steel service center and distributor specializing in sheet, bar, plate, tubing, structural angle as well as rolled and slit coil. Aluminum sheet, plate and Specialty Metals are part of our product line.

In addition to providing our standard stock sizes, we can shear, level, plasma, roll, slit or cut to length our products to your exact specifications. Our stainless alloys include the following: 200 series, 300 series, 400 series, Duplex Grades, Invar, as well as 3003 H14 and 5052 H32 aluminum.

Stainless steel is used in the manufacture of many products primarily for its corrosion resistant properties. Elements such as aluminum, copper, silicon, titanium and others are added to the specific alloy to modify the physical and chemical properties. The addition of alloying elements to the chemistry produces alloys that can be easily machined or may have superior strength or corrosion resistance. Our products are used in the following industries, but not limited to Aerospace, Automotive, Medical Devices, Electronics, Food Service, Brewing and Pulp/Paper, Marine and Power Generation.

Aluminum Sheet is used in Marine, Electronic, Food Service and Commercial Applications.

Strategically located in Montreal and Toronto, Canada, we service all of Eastern Canada and the Maritimes.

Diversified Specialty Metals Products
Stainless Products

Stainless Sheet in Standard Sizes and Custom Lengths – Special Finishes, PVC and Paper Interleave
Stainless Plate in Flat and Diamond Pattern
Stainless Rolled Strip and Slit Coil (Also Available in Special Metals)
Stainless Round Tube, Square Tube, Rectangular Tube
Stainless Round Bar, Flat Bar, Square Bar, Hex Bar
Stainless Steel Angles in Equal Leg and Unequal Leg
Aluminum Products

Aluminum Sheet in Standard Sizes and Custom Lengths – PVC and Paper Interleave Available

Name: Rajendra Industrial Corporation
Description:
Welcome to Rajendra Flanges, your trusted source for high-quality stainless steel flanges. Based in Mumbai, India, we specialize in manufacturing, supplying, and exporting a wide range of stainless steel flanges that meet diverse industrial needs.

 Our Specialty:
We offer an extensive selection of stainless steel flanges, including:
- Weldneck, Slip-on, Blind, Socket Weld, Lap Joint
- Spectacle, Ring Joint, Orifice, Long Weldneck, Deck
- DIN, PN, SORF, WNRF, BLRF, Plate, JIS, Spectacle Blind, Drawing Flanges

Sizes: 1/8" NB to 48" NB  
Classes: 150, 300, 400, 600, 900, 1500, 2500  
PN Ratings: PN2.5, PN6, PN10, PN16, PN25, PN40  
Materials: Stainless Steel grades like 304, 304L, 316, 316L, and more.

 Why Rajendra Flanges?
- Quality Assurance: Stringent quality control for top-notch products.
- Comprehensive Stock: Extensive inventory for prompt fulfillment.
- Customer-Centric Service: Exceptional service and support.
- Global Reach: Serving clients worldwide with reliable flanges.

For detailed specs, our products adhere to ANSI standards B-36.10, B-36.90, B-16.5, B-16.9, B-16.11 & B-16.28.

Name: Institut Mecasem
Description: MECASEM est votre prestataire qualité incontournable. Nous réalisons des essais mécaniques, essais de fatigues, essais d’endurance, examens métallographiques, analyses chimiques, essais climatiques, essais de vieillissement, traitements thermiques, contrôles non destructifs. Nous bénéficions de l’accréditation Cofrac selon la norme ISO 17025 pour les prestations d’essais mécaniques, d’essais de fatigue et d’usinage. De plus, nous usinons nos propres éprouvettes pour un service complet et clé en main. Quel que soit votre domaine d’activité aéronautique, défense, transports, BTP (Infrastructure & Habitat), Energie, pharmaceutique et médical, agroalimentaires ou fournitures industrielles, Mecasem vous propose des essais industriels (essais mécaniques, essais de fatigue, essais d’endurance) adaptés à vos spécificités.

Name: Aluminium Foundry France
Description:
Aluminium Solutions Group (ASG), leader européen de l’aluminium, implante sa première unité de production de billettes issues d’aluminium recyclé dans les Hauts-de-France, territoire pilote de la réindustrialisation verte en France. Soutenu par France Relance et lauréat France 2030, « Aluminium Foundry France » est une réponse innovante aux enjeux de souveraineté, de décarbonation et de circularisation de la filière stratégique de l’aluminium en France et en Europe, essentielle à la transition écologique. ASG investit 50 M€ dans cette fonderie nouvelle génération développée sur une friche industrielle à Ham en Picardie, à la frontière entre la Somme et l’Aisne.
Aluminium Foundry France sera la 1ère  usine française d’aluminium bas carbone par sa capacité de production (80 000 tonnes de billettes/an). Elle va permettre au groupe ASG de sécuriser ses
approvisionnements tout en fournissant d’autres extrudeurs français et européens en aluminium bas carbone.
A la clé : la création d’une centaine d’emplois sur le territoire à l’horizon septembre 2025 !

Name: Alumetal SA
Description:
Alumetal Group is one of the biggest,
most modern and constantly developing manufacturer of secondary aluminium casting alloys and primary alloys.
The production capacity of Alumetal Group plants is 275,000 tons per year. In addition to high-quality casting alloys based on secondary aluminium Alumetal Group also offers the highest quality primary alloys, AlTiB wire for grain refinement, aluminium for steel deoxidation, as well as fluxes and salts. About 80% of our customers are from the automotive industry. 
Our production complies with the highest quality requirements on the market and enables us to cooperate with the biggest automotive concerns, both in Poland and abroad, such as VW Group, Nemak and Federal Mogul Group, as well as many other companies. 
Close cooperation with our customers, especially the automotive industry, results in continuous development, improvement of work standards and establishing long-term partnerships. The greatest value of every company are its employees. Therefore, we have a highly qualified and well-coordinated team that by combining competences, talents and determination achieves the goals of the Group, and above all, is close to our customers to follow the market needs.


Experience, the highest and reproductible quality, broad production capacities, flexibility and performing orders on time are the features that make Alumetal Group a reliable and stable business partner.

Name: Korel Elektronik San. Tic. A.Ş.
Description:
Korel  Elektronik San. Tic. A.Ş. ,1988 yılında , Beyaz Eşya sektörüne hizmet etmek üzere  kurulmuş  bir aile şirketidir. Korel A.Ş., bugün 30 yıllık tecrübesi ile özellikle soğutma ve otomotiv sektörlerinin aranan bir firması olarak gerek yurt içi ve gerekse yurt dışında faaliyet gösteren Beyaz Eşya üreticilerinin tamamı ile çalışmaktadır. Yaklaşık 65.000 m² lik kapalı üretim alanı ile, Eskişehir, Manisa ve Çerkezköy´de bulunan  5 üretim fabrikasında , tüm müşteri  taleplerini karşılayacak tasarım ve kalitede soğutma sistemi elemanları,  ısı pompası elemanları, defrost ısıtıcıları ve yine soğutma sektörü ile otomotiv sektöründe kullanılmakta olan hassas alüminyum borular üretmektedir.

Korel A.Ş., üretim konularının tamamında ; AR-GE, ürün geliştirme ve dünya kalitesindeki üretimleri ile ürünlerinin %50 sini yurtdışına ihraç etmektedir. Şirket ürünleri, dünya normlarına uygun, çevre ve  doğaya zarar vermeyecek proseslerde, ISO ve TS standartlarına uygun olarak üretilmektedir.

Korel Elektronik San. Tic. A.Ş.’ nin soğutma ve otomotiv sanayi uygulamaları dışında , Turizm ve Hayvancılık sektöründe Afyon ‘da bulunan yatırımlarının yanında ; yine Eskişehir’de ‘’Corelli’’ markası ile bisiklet üreten yeni bir yatırımı mevcuttur. Bu tesiste bisikletin tüm alüminyum parçaları ve kadrosu yerli olarak üretilmektedir.

Name: Sanchez y Piccioni SA
Description: Empresa de primera línea entre las fundiciones de hierro gris y nodular del país, contando con los medios necesarios para proveer a sus clientes más exigentes, satisfaciendo sus necesidades de precio, calidad y entrega.

Name: FRALSEN
Description:
For more than fifty years, Fralsen, located in Besançon, has been recognized for its know-how in the manufacture of precision microtechnical parts from small to large series.

As an expert in high precision, Fralsen puts its skills at the service of industrial sectors with high technological value, such as defense, connectors, medical and space...

Our design office in France is in close collaboration with our R&D center in Pforzheim (Germany). Moreover, we benefit from the competitiveness of our production center in the Philippines for the assembly of mechanical sub-assemblies in series.

Name: Foundrion Group
Description:
Welcome to The Foundrion Group's official LinkedIn page, a group of eleven leading sand-casting businesses in North America.

With a wealth of combined experience exceeding 600 years and a vast library of over 8000 patterns, we leverage cutting-edge technologies, a team of highly experienced and skilled professionals, and premium raw materials to deliver bespoke solutions tailored to your unique needs and requirements.

Trust us to handle your customized and specific orders with utmost professionalism and excellence.

Name: WS Metals
Description:
WS Metals is a company in the metallurgical sector serving the Fashion and Furniture markets. Our headquarters is located in Araricá-RS, 69 km from Porto Alegre.

We started our activities in 2017. Although still a young company, our management team consists of managers with over 25 years of experience in the sector, which has enabled the company to quickly establish itself in the market. Our factory has a structure of 3,000 m² and a production capacity of 2,500,000 pieces per month.

We have a solid structure, with departments for creation and trends, marketing, machining, tooling, state-of-the-art stamping, zamak and plastic injection, galvanic and rotating baths, painting, metallization, and a team of qualified professionals. As a result, we offer agile development of our metals, presenting a differentiated finish of high quality, to bring even more shine to the collections and products of our partners.

Name: SILFER
Description:
Em 1983, a Silfer iniciou a sua atividade no setor da serralharia, a sua localização ainda é em Barco, periferia de Guimarães. O fabrico de produtos em ferro, desde estruturas metálicas, escadas, gradeamentos e portões é a sua especialização. 
Realizam montagens nacional e mundialmente, prova disso são trabalhos efetuados em Franca, Suíça e Cabo Verde. Em 2007, iniciaram o seu processo de fabrico para exportação.

Name: ALTRAD ENDEL SN EUROPIPE
Description:
Filiale à 100% du groupe ALTRAD ENDEL, leader français de la maintenance industrielle et des services à l’énergie. SN EUROPIPE est le Spécialiste de la tuyauterie industrielle depuis plus de 30 ans.
Compétences multi-techniques pour préfabrication et le montage dans les domaines du Oil & Gas, de l'Energie ou de la Défense.
Nos Atouts : Réactivité, Adaptabilité, Technicité, Productivité, Maitrise règlementaire, Notre outil industriel.
Nos Valeurs : Respect, Solidarité, Courage, Humimlité, Convivialité.

Name: HYDROMETAL France
Description:
Bienvenue chez HYDROMETAL France

HYDROMETAL France - une entité appartenant au groupe JGI-HYDROMETAL, fondée en 2021 à Dunkerque.

Notre site est à l'avant-garde des solutions durables dans l'industrie du recyclage des métaux non ferreux. Notre approche innovante se concentre sur les processus hydrométallurgiques pour recycler des matériaux secondaires complexes, ciblant principalement les métaux non-ferreux.

Chez HYDROMETAL France, nous sommes spécialisés dans le traitement écologiquement responsable de matériaux complexes chargés en zinc, visant à produire des sels de zinc . 

Nos techniques hydrométallurgiques avancées garantissent une utilisation efficace des ressources tout en minimisant l'impact environnemental.

Avec un engagement envers l'excellence technologique et la responsabilité environnementale, nous sommes dédiés à façonner un avenir plus vert grâce à nos initiatives de recyclage. Notre installation, prévue pour démarrer ses opérations en 2024, sera le témoignage de notre engagement envers la durabilité et l'innovation.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre mission visant à révolutionner l'industrie du recyclage des métaux non-ferreux.

Suivez-nous !

#HydrometalFrance #jgihydrometal #Recyclage #Hydrométallurgie #Durabilité #Innovation #MétauxNonFerreux #RecyclageDuZinc #ÉconomieCirculaire #zinc #Dunkerque

Name: PROFORM
Description:
A European leader in the cold forming of tubular parts by bending, forming or hydroforming (diameters 6 to 609 mm), we manufacture and market a wide range of fittings in stainless steel and other nickel alloys (titanium, inconel, aluminium): elbows, tees, reducers, flanges, caps, collars and other specific tubular products meeting the most demanding requirements of all types of industries: automotive, aeronautics, aerospace, chemical, petrochemical, food, pharmaceutical, etc.

We have a multilingual and multicultural sales force on site and export 60% of our production directly through our network of distributors located all over the world.

With more than 50 years of existence, Proform is today part of a group with multiple synergies offering its 220 employees a dynamic and rigorous working environment, where know-how and technicality are expressed on a daily basis.

Name: Medena Commerce
Description: Medena Commerce is established in the year 1993, with trade as it’s main business activity. In 1995 an idea about creating a metal working workshop came to life. With the construction of the first production facility in 1998, the production of metal parts was initiated.
Location: Tešanj, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: Monett Metals, Inc.
Description:
Forget apple pie — America runs on steel!  

And at Monett Metals, Inc. — since 1975 we have been serving up a heaping helping of the good stuff  

Located in Monett, Missouri — we're not just a specialty steel foundry, we're a team of passionate, metal-loving craftsmen dedicated to producing the highest quality castings in the nation. 

How do we do it... You ask? 

With a potent mix of skill, innovation, and a whole lot of heart  (plus, maybe a few top-secret techniques whispered down from our Foundry Fathers  over the past 50 Years!). 

The team at Monett Metals brings unparalleled expertise, fiery  passion, and a dash of good ol' fashioned Missouri "Show-Me" grit to every steel and stainless-steel casting made within our foundry walls. 

We are a niche-market provider of short-run, low-volume castings with the capability of quick turnarounds — specializing in producing quality sand castings and lost-wax investment castings in a wide range of alloys such as 300 & 400 grade stainless-steels, nickel base & cobalt base alloys, as well as carbon and high alloy steel grades. 

Established in the heart of Ozarks — our team of skilled foundrymen and casting engineering professionals pour their hearts (and molten metal) into molds to produce castings that exceed customer specifications and expectations. 

From intricate lost-wax investment castings weighing only a few ounces — to large valve bodies pushing over 1000-pounds, we're the foundry that makes the impossible possible. 

We proudly serve (but most certainly not limited to) the following industries: 

●Chemical and Petrochemical 
●Power Generation and Energy 
●Oil and Gas
●Pulp and Paper
●Food and Beverage 
●Water and Waste Treatment 
— Just to name a few industries! 

Ready to experience the Monett Metals difference? Let's mold and pour something great together. 

#MonettMetals #TeamMMI  #AmericasBestSpecialtyFoundry

Name: Welding Group SAS
Description: Spécialisé dans la réalisation d'ouvrage chaudronnés, de pièces mécano-soudées et de tuyauterie… Notre équipe est à votre écoute pour répondre à vos besoins et vous accompagne de l'étude jusqu'à la réalisation finale, en vous assurant un suivi de qualité et personnalisé !

Name: SIVPL- Shree International Vyapar Private Limited
Description:
Established in 2004, Shree International Vyapar Pvt Ltd (SIVPL) has grown into one of India’s most trusted and future-ready industrial solutions companies. We operate across five synergistic verticals — Integrated Steel Plant By-Product Management, Mining & MDO Services, Mines & Minerals, Concrete Solutions, and Renewable Energy — delivering high-efficiency, sustainable, and technology-driven outcomes for some of the nation’s largest industries.

Our core expertise lies in hot slag handling, slag & scrap processing, metal recovery, internal logistics, and yard management within integrated steel plants. Through continuous innovation and in-house R&D, we deploy advanced crushing systems, automation, and circular-economy practices to maximise resource recovery and reduce environmental impact.

In mining, SIVPL provides end-to-end Mine Developer & Operator (MDO) capabilities — including planning, overburden removal, haulage, beneficiation, stockyard management, and responsible mine rehabilitation. We also operate and trade in key minerals such as gypsum, aggregates, limestone, and iron ore, supported by strong quality systems and logistics integration.

Our Concrete Solutions division manufactures RMC, precast blocks, pavers, and sustainable concrete products, while our Renewable Energy initiatives focus on solar power generation and green energy adoption.

Across all operations, SIVPL stands for zero-harm safety culture, environmental stewardship, operational excellence, and responsible growth. With a commitment to research, technology, and continuous improvement, we strive to build safer, smarter, and more sustainable industrial ecosystems for India’s future.

Name: 6K Additive
Description:
6K Additive is a US-based manufacturer of premium metal powders and alloy additions made from sustainable sources. Headquartered in Burgettstown, PA, our manufacturing process allows us to produce powders that are truly spherical, void of porosity and satellites with better flowability than competing technologies. We utilize our innovative UniMelt microwave plasma process, where we leverage domestically sourced feedstock such as certified millings from CNC, grindings, used additive powder or even the support material used in AM. Our premium powder offerings include, Nickel 718, Nickel 625, Titanium 64, SS316L, Copper 18150, and refractory powders that include, Tungsten, Rhenium, Niobium C103 and Tungsten-Rhenium to name a few. 
6K Additive is also a recipient of a $23.4M DPA Title III grant where the company will be taking components from the military depots and turning critical material such as titanium and nickel back into powder and pre-ingots to be used for military applications.

Name: AIC PROD SRL
Description: Welding, stainless steel welding, nitrogen installations, pipe replacement, mechanical works

Name: Quality Engenharia e Serviços
Description:
Quality Engenharia e Serviços was founded on the commitment to transform challenges into opportunities, combining expertise and innovation to deliver comprehensive engineering solutions. From the very beginning, we have stood out for our pioneering spirit and relentless pursuit of excellence, integrating cutting-edge technology with a people-centered management approach that values and empowers talent.

Guided by a passion for building and transforming, we operate with a focus on quality, safety, and sustainability. Our unique advantage lies in the synergy of a highly skilled team and efficient processes that create real value for our clients, suppliers, and society as a whole.

We are dedicated to continuous investment in technology and innovative methods, enhancing our processes to deliver solutions that revolutionize industrial environments. We believe the future begins today, with social and environmental responsibility at the core of everything we do, ensuring each project is a hallmark of excellence and progress.

Our mission is to drive development through integrated solutions, fostering a safe, ethical, and inspiring work environment. At Quality Engenharia e Serviços, every project is executed with passion, commitment, and the conviction that together, we build a better future.

Name: Innovcable
Description:
We design and nationalize cables for the transmission of voice, data and energy for industrial, marine, offshore, railway, defense, sucroenergetic, mining, aerospace, robotics, furniture and ... All products manufactured by Innovcable are thoroughly tested. The largest companies in Brazil already buy from us. We offer a wide and wide variety of products, we can manufacture more than 50,000 types of cables, nobody offers a diversity as big as us.
Specific insulation, from the simplest to the most complex. Fixed or mobile applications. Resistant to abrasion, impact, ozone, grease, oils, weather, heat, flame, nuclear radiation, acids, gasoline, diesel, benzol, toluol, aurora borealis, halogens or not, besides other characteristics that meet your need.
Tailored solutions is our specialty, differentiate yourself from your competitor. Gain competitive advantage. Successful projects ask for our agility. We can help you meet the requirements by not exceeding your budgets so that your schedule does not fail.

Name: LYON CINTRAGE SEIGNOBOS
Description:
Implanté en région Lyonnaise, Lyon Cintrage Seignobos est au service de ses clients depuis plus de 100 ans. Son savoir faire repose sur le cintrage technique de tubes grâce à son parc machine très complet et à ses compagnons expérimentés et d'autre part, un savoir-faire très spécifique en assemblage mécano-soudé 3D de pièces tubulaires. Elle est spécialisée dans la fabrication de prototypes, de petites et moyennes séries et de pièces de rechanges constructeurs sur de nombreux secteurs industriels comme la défense, la mobilité, l’énergie, l’aéronautique et même l’art !

Le cintrage du tube :
Les solutions très techniques de Lyon Cintrage Seignobos
Cintrage de tubes de toute forme et de tout métal.
Du prototype à la moyenne série.
Cintrage en 3D de tubes à rayons multiples pour la réalisation de tubulures, ensembles tubulaires et pièces spéciales mécano soudées.
Découpe laser sur tubes et profilés ouverts et fermés.
Parachèvement et déformations d'extrémité.
Finitions : revêtement, traitement de surface, isolation thermique, ...

Name: Milano Equipamentos Hidráulicos Ltda.
Description:
Instituída em 1998, a Milano Equipamentos Hidráulicos vem se destacando em todo território nacional, oferecendo soluções para o mercado hidráulico. Pensando na satisfação total de seus clientes, a empresa se diferencia pelo seu arrojado investimento tecnológico e humano, promovendo continuamente reciclagens e capacitações de seu pessoal. Esses são alguns motivos que fazem da Milano uma empresa notável e sólida que proporciona confiança a todos os seus clientes.

Name: Mi-Tech Tungsten Metals, LLC
Description:
Mi-Tech Tungsten Metals is a US based manufacturer of Tungsten Alloys, Copper Tungsten and Silver Tungsten Metals. 
With a full service machine shop, we have capabilities to furnish components complete to customer specifications. 

Our Indianapolis, IN facility is both ISO9001 and AS9100 Certified. In addition we are both ITAR and DFARS Compliant.

The high-density properties of tungsten are useful as aircraft weights & counterbalances, radiation shielding and durable electrical contacts.

We serve leading Aircraft Manufacturers, Defense Contractors, Medical Equipment Builders, Machine Tooling Manufacturers and Oil & Gas Measurement Instrument Makers.

Our focus on customer satisfaction has facilitated the grown of our company. With over 1,100 active customers and machining over 5,000 different part numbers, we still maintain an On-Time-Delivery rating of 96%.

Name: IDEM Innovation Design Esprit Métal
Description:
IDEM - Le métal comme matière d’innovation depuis 40 ans.

Chez IDEM, nous donnons forme au métal avec précision, créativité et exigence. Situer à Cholet, notre équipe imagine, élabore et réalise des solutions sur-mesure pour des projets techniques, esthétiques et ambitieux. Acier, inox, aluminium, laiton : nous maîtrisons la transformation de tous les métaux.

 Notre cœur de métier :
Élaboration technique avec nos clients 
Découpe, pliage, assemblage, finitions, débit

Name: CIBOX - créateur d'espaces hall d'entrée
Description:
Cibox est une entreprise familiale créée en 1971 dans le cadre d’une diversification d’activité des Ets FELIX Père & Fils, entreprise de métallerie du bâtiment dont l’origine remonte à 1960.
 
L’activité commence avec la fabrication de boîtes aux lettres collectives en métal répondant aux nouvelles normes PTT dites à ouverture totale. Ce produit initié par l’Office HLM de Valence s’est très rapidement développé sur l’ensemble du territoire national, et tout particulièrement dans la réhabilitation des immeubles sociaux grâce à ses caractéristiques anti-vandales. 

Durant cette même période et dans un souci permanent de diversification, une nouvelle gamme de produits de portes d’accès d’immeubles à fermeture électro-magnétique voit le jour. Cibox, qui bénéficie d’une notoriété grandissante grâce à sa gamme de boîtes aux lettres, utilise cet effet de levier pour promouvoir son nouveau produit. Le succès est au rendez-vous. 

Depuis, Cibox n’a cessé de compléter ses gammes pour proposer une offre complète de produits dédiés à la création d’espaces hall d’entrée.  L’entreprise bénéficie aujourd’hui d’une excellente image de marque qu’elle doit à la robustesse de ses produits, à sa capacité de design mais aussi à sa volonté d’innovation afin notamment d’anticiper les nouvelles exigences normatives du marché.


GAMME DE PRODUITS CIBOX :
• Portes d’entrées d’immeubles métalliques 
	Gamme Sécurité Renforcée 
	Gamme Décor
	Gamme Résidence
	Gamme Cib’Isol
	Gamme Cib’AEV 
	Gamme Cib’Slide (portes automatiques coulissantes) 
• Portes coupe-feu métalliques Cib’Feu
• Portes secondaires métalliques (caves, parking,…)
• Boites aux lettres métalliques collectives

Name: N'GENIUS Materials
Description:
The N'GENIUS Series of High Strength Austenitic Stainless Steels is a next-generation series of Austenitic Stainless Steels that offers higher strength and vastly improved corrosion resistance compared to conventional 300 series grades.

The N'GENIUS Series has been designed to achieve two key aims:

1) Out-perform, supersede and replace the majority of the conventional 300 series Austenitic Stainless Steels 

2) Offer a genuine alternative to the use of other materials such as Duplex, Super-Duplex and nickel alloys.

The N'GENIUS Series is a complete ‘family’ of High Strength Austenitic Stainless Steels that can be used across an unlimited range of products, markets, industries and applications.

KEY ENGINEERING DESIGN FEATURES

•	High Mechanical Strength with excellent Ductility and Toughness
•	Higher Allowable Design Stresses
•	Superior resistance to Localised Corrosion and General Corrosion relative to conventional Austenitic Stainless Steels
•	Excellent Toughness at Ambient, Sub-zero and Cryogenic temperatures
•	Distinct minimum Pitting Resistance Equivalent values

An extensive range of High Strength Austenitic Line Pipe grades have been specifically developed as part of the N’GENIUS Series which will enable significant utilisation in the onshore and subsea line pipe packages, pipe packages, riser pipe packages to the Oil & Gas Industry.

Furthermore, the N’GENIUS H2 Series has also been developed for use in hydrogen applications.

Name: Ulbrich Solar Technologies, Inc.
Description:
Ulbrich Solar Technologies Inc., is a world leader in PV Ribbon products that interconnect and transmit current for crystalline solar cells and thin film.  Our PV Ribbon products are for use with traditional solder methods as well as conductive adhesives, tapes, pastes and hybrid solder technologies.  Ulbrich Solar is an experience, innovation and global company that partners with each customer for a customized solution and experience.

Our Products Include:

•	Tinned Copper Flat Wire for Solar Cell Tabbing and Interconnect Wire including Tabbing and Interconnect Wire for Conductive Adhesive Applications
•	Bus Wire for Crystalline Silicon 
•	Bus Wire for Thin Film 
•	Preformed and Cut Bus Wire (L Shape and I Shape)
•	Substrates for Thin Film

Our most innovative product to date is LCR-XP and LCR-SP.  This high efficiency grooved solar cell tabbing/interconnect wire replaces traditional smooth wire used to connect solar cells together within a module.  Both were developed to increase the efficiency of a solar module by reflecting more light back onto the surface of the cell.  This innovative grooved interconnect wire steers the reflected light back to the glass/air interface allowing total internal reflection back onto the cell surface.  Up to 80% of the incoming light that strikes the LCR ribbon is recovered significantly higher than the 5% recovery of traditional solar cell tabbing and interconnect wire.

Name: Nu-Tech Precision Metals Inc.
Description: Nu-Tech Precision Metals was established in the mid 1950's to manufacture by extrusion, cold drawing and finishing, zirconium alloy pressure tubes for the Canadian nuclear industry. Industries served now include aerospace, nuclear, mining, chemical, military, defense, naval and sub-sea, metal sputtering and glass coating, water treatment, offshore etc. Nu-Tech hot extrudes specialty metal seamless pipe, tube, shapes, bar, rod, wire and bi-metal extrusions from materials such as all grades of titanium, zirconium, hafnium, niobium, copper, nickel alloys, high purity aluminum, specialty steels and others. Our extrusion capabilities range from approx 1" OD up to 14" OD with custom wall thicknesses starting at approx .125" and up. Our "near-net" extruded shapes used to a large extent in the aerospace industry must fit within a 12" circle size. Nu-Tech proudly operates two electron beam welders to meet your joining requirements. Our extensive on-site equipment includes centreless grinding, ID honing and boreing, draw bench, hot stretch and bump straightening, pickle, anneal, autoclave, heat treat as well as complete in house certified non destructive testing. Our staff metallurgists, engineers, technicians and others are available to assist you with your design questions. Certifications including AS9100C, ISO 9001-2000, CSA N285.0, ASME III NCA3800 Material organization as well as others.

Name: AMG Aluminum Wenatchee Plant
Description:
AMG Aluminum is an employee and customer-focused, technology-driven organization dedicated to innovation, quality, technical expertise, and rapid response to customer needs.

For more than 50 years, AMG Aluminum has earned a trusted reputation for reliable delivery of consistently dependable aluminum grain refiners anywhere in the world.

Headquartered in Cambridge, OH, AMG Aluminum, a business unit of AMG Advanced Metallurgical Group N.V., is the combination of AMG Aluminum North America, LLC, AMG Aluminum UK Limited, AMG Aluminum Brazil (aluminum activities of LSM Brazil S.A.), AMG Aluminum Mexico, S.A. de C.V., and AMG Aluminum China Limited.

The success of the aluminum industry is dependent on alloys that, for example, reduce automobile weight, promote forming for various products such as aluminum beverage cans, and increase the performance of electric transmission cables. AMG Aluminum’s development of grain refiners has helped to facilitate these innovations.

From the earth’s crust to a red slurry and then white powder to a shiny piece of commercially pure metal, aluminum’s journey finds its way into our daily lives, from the car we drive to the electricity that enters our homes and businesses. From beverage cans to sports and leisure equipment to aircraft and electronic equipment, the life-cycle restarts with the recycling back to the shiny metal.

AMG Aluminum’s products are used in several stages of the life cycle of aluminum. We provide grain refiners used during melting and casting of aluminum and its alloys.

Nowoczesny zakład produkcyjny zlokalizowany jest w Specjalnej Strefie Ekonomicznej w Zaczerniu koło Rzeszowa. Innowacyjne technologie, przestronne magazyny, profesjonalne laboratorium oraz własna flota transportowa pozwalają nam sprostać nawet najwyższym wymaganiom stawianym przez naszych Klientów. 

Na przestrzeni lat, dzięki naszemu zaangażowaniu oraz wysokiej jakości świadczonych usług,  staliśmy się niezawodnym partnerem biznesowym nie tylko dla polskich, ale i zagranicznych Kontrahentów. Budowanie dobrych relacji z Klientem nie byłoby możliwe bez ludzi, czyli naszego zespołu, który służy fachowym wsparciem i chętnie podejmuje wyzwania dążąc do jak najlepszych efektów.

Name: KUTLUK TEUTOGUSS
Description:
Neustart mit internationaler Stärke: Integration in die Kutluk Group
Nach einer erneuten Phase der Restrukturierung wurde unser Unternehmen 2025 erfolgreich in die international tätige Kutluk Group integriert – eine in der Türkei ansässige Gießereigruppe mit langjähriger Erfahrung in der Herstellung von Grau- und Sphäroguss, Stahlguss sowie Aluminiumguss im Handformverfahren und Aluminiumdruckguss.
In diesem Zuge firmiert die Teutoguss GmbH künftig unter dem neuen Namen KUTLUK TEUTOGUSS GmbH. Mit der Umbenennung tragen wir der neuen Zugehörigkeit Rechnung und unterstreichen die internationale Ausrichtung unseres Unternehmens.
Durch diesen Zusammenschluss sichern wir nicht nur den Fortbestand unseres Standorts, sondern gewinnen auch Zugang zu modernem Know-how, erweiterten Fertigungsmöglichkeiten und einem starken internationalen Netzwerk. Die Kutluk Group investiert gezielt in zukunftsweisende Technologien – darunter 3D-Sanddruck, moderne Bearbeitungszentren und Prozessoptimierung – und setzt damit ein klares Zeichen für den langfristigen Erhalt und die Weiterentwicklung unseres Unternehmens.
Dieser Schritt markiert einen wichtigen Meilenstein in unserer Geschichte und bildet die Grundlage für nachhaltiges Wachstum im internationalen Wettbewerb.

Name: Tecnolaser Ltda
Description:
A Tecnolaser foi fundada em 2001 com o objetivo de suprir a demanda de corte a laser de chapas metálicas para indústria metalmecânica da região. A empresa iniciou suas atividades com quatro funcionários e alocada em um pequeno pavilhão.

O nome da Tecnolaser difundiu-se no mercado rapidamente, e no ano seguinte a empresa teve que mudar de endereço para poder ampliar a sua área fabril. Desta maneira foi possível atender a demanda crescente de seus clientes.

Em 2003 a empresa foi em busca da certificação ISO 9001, vindo a certificar-se no ano seguinte. Este importante passo levou a conquista de novos clientes e mercados fazendo com que a empresa alavanca-se as suas vendas.

Em 2012 a empresa iniciou um novo projeto, a construção de um prédio próprio de 5.500 metros quadrados com escritórios, refeitório, fábrica e um amplo local para manobra de cargas, facilitando o carregamento e descarregamento de caminhões. Este projeto foi concluído em dezembro de 2013, com a mudança da empresa para as novas instalações.


Desde então seguimos em constante evolução, maximizando nossos processos e investindo em tecnologia para melhor atendermos nossos clientes, construindo parcerias sólidas e oferecendo soluções para as necessidades e demanda do mercado.
