Name: H&H Castings, Inc.
Description:
The company's reputation for quality began in 1965 when the Haugh family opened a full service aluminum foundry in Wrightsville, PA.

Founded on the principal that quality builds loyal business, H&H initially focused operations on small run jobs with an emphasis on technicality. Operations continued in this manner for the next 24 years until demand exceed production and the need for a larger facility was necessary.

In 1989, a new foundry was built in Hellam Township with modern Sinto automatic molding machines and bigger capabilities. After two subsequent additions, the current production capacity in our facility exceeds 90,000 square feet and currently consists of three automatic Sinto molding machines and one air-set (No Bake) molding line.

Our aluminum sand casting foundry currently consists of two complimentary processes; Green Sand and No Bake. Our No Bake Division was introduced in 2008 to expand our production ability to include large scale molding and castings.

In December 2019 we installed our newest molding line: Robert Sinto FBO V. The new automatic molding machine will handle molds as large as 32” x 32” x 11”.

The company is privately owned and family operated. 

We commemorate our founder Ken Haugh, who passed away in 2020, and continue to honor his legacy at H&H Castings.

Name: Nexa Metals & Industrial Solutions
Description:
NEXA Metals & Industrial Solutions SpA is an integrated manufacturing company focused on delivering high-precision metal components, advanced fabrication systems and engineered industrial solutions for global supply chains. Our capabilities combine modern metallurgical processes, laser-based consolidation technologies, CNC machining, structural steelwork and specialized foundry operations designed to support medium and large-scale production environments with consistent quality and reliability.

We operate with a strong commitment to innovation, efficiency and traceability, ensuring that every component produced at NEXA meets demanding mechanical and dimensional standards. Our teams work across multiple stages of the production cycle, from design support and prototype development to serial manufacturing, finishing, testing and quality certification.

In addition to our metalworking and engineering facilities, NEXA develops durable wood-based platforms, supports and logistics solutions for the safe transport and storage of heavy industrial products. These systems are engineered to withstand high loads, harsh environments and complex handling requirements, providing an optimized interface between manufacturing output and supply chain operations.

Our operations are built on three pillars:
• Industrial engineering excellence through modern foundry and metal fabrication capabilities.
• Laser and precision technologies enabling high-accuracy consolidation, joining and finishing.
• Integrated logistics solutions using engineered wood structures for material handling and storage.

NEXA Metals & Industrial Solutions SpA is dedicated to enabling long-term industrial growth through robust engineering, responsible manufacturing and continuous process improvement. We focus on building reliable partnerships across sectors that require quality, consistency and scalable production capacity.

 Legacy of Craftsmanship & Innovation

 Fully-Equipped Manufacturing Facility

Name: Aim Alloys LLP
Description:
AIM Alloys LLP is a leading manufacturer of Ferroalloy Powders and Metal Powders, serving the global metallurgical, welding consumables, and foundry industries. With advanced manufacturing facilities in Bhiwadi, Rajasthan (India), we take pride in being India’s first producer of Atomized Ferrosilicon Powder, setting new benchmarks for quality, innovation, and process excellence.

Driven by a team of metallurgists, engineers, and innovators, AIM Alloys is committed to developing high-purity, precisely engineered metal powders such as Atomized Ferrosilicon, Silico Manganese, Nickel Powders, and other custom ferroalloy formulations. Our products are integral to welding electrodes, flux-cored wires, alloy steels, and sintered components—delivering superior performance, consistency, and reliability.

At the core of our operations lies a deep commitment to Research & Development and Sustainable Manufacturing. Through circular production practices, we upcycle alloy residues and metal by-products into value-added powders, minimizing waste and environmental impact. This aligns with our vision of responsible growth, contributing to a greener, more resource-efficient metallurgy sector in India and beyond.

Our mission is to continuously innovate, collaborate, and deliver materials that enable industries to build stronger, weld cleaner, and manufacture smarter. By integrating technology, quality, and sustainability, AIM Alloys LLP is redefining the future of metal powder manufacturing—made in India, for the world.

 Website: www.aimalloys.in

 Email: info@aimalloys.in

 Location: Bhiwadi, Rajasthan, India

Name: Strategic Steel Sourcing

Welcome to Strategic Steel Sourcing, your dedicated resource for mastering the intricacies of Steel & Metal Procurement.

In todays dynamic market, effective metal procurement demands more than just sourcing; it requires deep understanding of advanced buying processes. Our mission is to bridge the knowledge gap, transforming challenges into opportunities for our community. 
What you'll discover here:
 
* Procurement Process *
Guidance to optimize your entire procurement lifecycle, from demand planning and supplier selection to negotiation tactics & contract management. 

* In-Depth Material Knowledge *
Deepen your understanding of various steel grades, metal alloys, products, their properties, application, industry standards, critical consideration for purchasing

* Strategic Insights *
Explore best practices for risk mitigation, sustainable sourcing, market volatility analysis, and leveraging technology for smarter, more efficient metal acquisition. 

* Practical Wisdom *
We translate complex technical & market information into actionable strategies you can apply directly to your day-to-day purchasing decisions.

Who We Serve:
This page is an essential hub for Procurement Managers, Sourcing Specialists, Buyers, Supply Chain Directors, and any professional responsible for strategic acquisition of Steel & Metal Products across Manufacturing, Construction, Energy, Oil & Gas, and other industrial sectors.

Name: STEEC
Description:
Créée en 1979 par Paul Rolland, l'entreprise STEEC fait partie du groupe PRF.
Au fil des années, STEEC s'est forgée une réputation en France et en Europe dans le domaine de l'usinage laser et la micro-mécanique de haute précision. Grâce à ses savoir-faire spécifiques, STEEC est capable de répondre aux demandes les plus complexes nécessitant des moyens d'usinage de haute technologie.

L'entreprise collabore aujourd'hui avec des secteurs aussi exigeants que l'aéronautique, le spatial, l'automobile, le médical, la recherche, la défense, le nucléaire ou même la haute horlogerie…

Fort de sa certification ISO 9001, STEEC a défini en interne un processus très précis de management de la qualité. Ce processus permet une compréhension parfaite de la problématique client, une mesure fiable et systématique de la performance et une amélioration permanente du système. De la gestion du planning au contrôle qualité, STEEC met tout en œuvre pour atteindre l'objectif zéro défaut et garantir votre sérénité sur chacune de vos réalisations.

STEEC s'est dotée de tous les moyens, techniques et humains, pour atteindre la haute performance dans l'infiniment précis : des ateliers entièrement climatisés, un parc de machines sans cesse renouvelé, des outils informatiques de dernière génération et une formation continue de son personnel. Ces investissements sur le long terme permettent à L’entreprise de micro-mécanique de pouvoir apporter des solutions toujours plus innovantes à chacun de ses clients. STEEC est également homologuée au Crédit d’Impôt Recherche depuis sa création.

Pour promouvoir son savoir-faire et son expertise dans l'usinage de haute précision, STEEC participe à de nombreux salons professionnels. L'entreprise a ainsi reçu plusieurs trophées qui saluent son esprit d'innovation.

Name: Kobaloni Energy
Description:
Kobaloni Energy is developing Africa’s first cobalt sulphate refinery in Zambia. Once in production, our cobalt sulphate will provide automotive manufacturers with a reliable supply of traceable battery grade cobalt for their electric vehicles. 

Using tried and tested minerals processing technology, we will produce an initial 6,000 tpa of cobalt sulphate (metal contained). Our aim is to produce cobalt for 1 million EVs per year, with the potential to double production. Key project attributes include:
•	Located close to sources of feedstock
•	Experienced management team
•	Ability to supply global automotive customers, reducing the time to market, transport costs, and emissions.
•	Sustainability credentials—our refinery will be powered by renewable energy and produce ‘zero waste’
•	Situated in an established mining and mineral processing hub, with access to reliable infrastructure
•	Traceable and responsible supply chain.

We have completed a Class 3 Feasibility Study and are backed by Vision Blue Resources.

To learn more about Kobaloni Energy and our team, visit our website.

Name: Revex Technologies
Description:
REVEX Technologies is building U.S. domestic midstream processing infrastructure for critical minerals, aligned with national security priorities that now classify processed critical minerals and derivatives under Section 232 authorities.
We lead in sustainable production of nickel concentrate and other critical minerals—essential for energy transition/AI infrastructure, defense, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing—by converting waste feedstocks like mine tailings, spent lithium-ion batteries, and manufacturing scrap.
Our platform accelerates permitting, slashes capital/operating/closure costs for tailings storage facilities (TSFs), and eliminates acid mine drainage—the mining industry's top environmental challenge. By reclaiming value from waste, REVEX delivers domestic, auditable, FEOC-free supply that collapses time-to-market, boosts project economics, and mitigates long-term liabilities.
Operating as an independent, non-exclusive processor, we partner with U.S. and allied miners/recyclers to integrate upstream recovery, midstream processing, and downstream recycling—advancing circular, defense-aligned solutions that enhance U.S. industrial resilience and support local communities.
In 2025, REVEX secured a $145 million contracted award from the U.S. Department of Energy to advance our flagship REV Nickel project, affirming the platform's technical maturity and national-scale impact.

Today, Bharti Enterprise exports its components across the USA, UK, Europe, Australia, and other international markets. Our precision, reliability, and customer-focused approach have earned us long-standing partnerships with global clients.

Continuously investing in technology, process innovation, and workforce training, we are committed to exceeding customer expectations while contributing to sustainable and high-quality manufacturing.

Name: Fibre Technology (Fibretech)
Description:
Fibre Technology (Fibretech) is a world leading manufacturer in Rapid Solidification Technology (RST) for the production of stainless-steel fibres and filaments. With more than 40 years of research and development, Fibretech has made novel advances to the traditional RST process, to develop i-melt - a unique advancement in RST that allows Fibretech to consistently produce high-grade materials for use in a wide-range of applications. 
Through 40+ years of continuous development, Fibretech is a proud manufacturer of amorphous, semi-amorphous and fine crystalline fibres and filaments in a wide range of alloys.

Refractories
World Leaders in the manufacture of high-performance Stainless-Steel Fibres, which are a key component in all monolithic Refractories where they significantly improve refractory life.

Petrochemical
A reliable and Cost-effective addition to FCCU’s for more than 40 years.

Automotive
Unique filamentary material used in exhaust systems that can withstand extremely high temperatures in high performance vehicles, whilst retaining noise attenuation over high and low audible frequency range. 
Custom designed alloy fibres/filamentary materials providing an advantageous surface area for catalytic processes, filtration and battery technologies. 

Construction
Specially developed alloys incorporating coarse surfaces and deformed shapes provide superior reinforcement in comparison to steel rebar and cut-wire alternatives. 

Aerospace
High-temperature performance fibres used in space program launchpads. 
Lightweight self-reinforced stainless-steel sheets provide the strength of steel at the weight of Aluminium.  

Fibretech has established locations across the UK and Europe:
- HQ - Nottinghamshire, UK which primarily serves the UK regions.
- Fibretech Europe – located in Italy to service European markets following the UK’s departure from the EU. 

Fibretech has a manufacturing facility located within the UK, with current production capacity in excess of 1800t.

À PROPOS
Une croissance empreinte de qualité depuis 1956

Évoluant au rythme des développements technologiques et des besoins d’une clientèle très diversifiée, notre entreprise familiale a fait des progrès considérables depuis sa fondation en 1956. Cet avantage indéniable tient aussi à la qualité des relations tissées avec nos clients au fil des ans. Celles-ci nous ont permis de mieux anticiper les besoins du marché et de réagir en conséquence. C’est ainsi qu’en 2003, nous ajoutons l’aluminium à l’éventail de nos produits et qu’en 2009 l’acier inoxydable s’est rajouté.

La clé du succès de La Corporation d’Acier Alliance a été sa capacité de se mouler littéralement aux besoins de ses clients tout en améliorant continuellement ses services, produisant du matériel de très grande qualité, assurant une livraison à la fois rapide et accommodante et en maintenant des prix compétitifs. Nous travaillons en étroite collaboration avec notre clientèle pour assurer qu’ils reçoivent le meilleur service possible, approprié à leurs besoins, pour leur plus grande rentabilité.

Name: William Lee Ltd
Description:
William Lee has existed as an iron foundry for over 100 years and spent the majority of its time on Callywhite Lane.  It has deep history since it began in 1860 as a family business at Montrose Works, Sheffield.  The company moved to Callywhite Lane in 1901 and in 1924 the business was no longer owned by the Lee family.  The foundry specialised in the production of malleable iron castings under various owners, such as William Prestwich and Sons in 1924, Tarmac in 1963 and Parkfield Group in 1986.  During the Parkfield years the foundry started the move away from Malleable iron to spheroidal graphite iron (SG iron) as the business moved more towards truck and automotive iron castings. 

In 1991 the company was acquired by Castings PLC, and since that time the business has seen significant investment in new buildings, plant and equipment heading towards £50M.  

Today William Lee is one of the largest foundries left in the UK, following the demise of the UK foundry industry due to lack of investment, productivity and intense Worldwide competition.  It is continual investment in plant, processes and a dedicated workforce that has enabled the company to remain in business. The company’s old 4 tonne ladles mark the entrance to Dronfield in two strategic places.  These ladles where used for the production of malleable iron produced through cupola melting.  Iron being transferred from the cupola receiving drum into these ladles for transferring into a large holding furnace.

Name: CMC Poland
Description:
Firma CMC Poland Sp. z o.o. obecna na polskim rynku od grudnia 2003 roku, kiedy przejęła udziały Huty Zawiercie S. A. Prowadzi działalność w branży metalurgicznej, która skupiona jest na recyklingu, produkcji i przetwórstwie stali. Dzięki temu CMC Poland jest liderem wśród polskich hut sprzedając swoje wyroby na rynek krajowy i zagraniczny. 

CMC Poland produkuje wyroby gorąco walcowane długie w oparciu o wsad pochodzący z własnej stalowni elektrycznej. Dobrą markę produktów CMC gwarantuje ponad 120 lat doświadczenia i tradycji, a równocześnie najnowocześniejsze rozwiązania technologiczne w zakresie produkcji, ochrony środowiska i bezpieczeństwa pracy. Narzędziem do osiągania podstawowych celów firmy jest Zintegrowany System Zarządzania spełniający wymagania ISO 9001, 14001 i PN-N-18001. CMC Poland jest nowoczesną hutą posiadającą znaczącą pozycję w strukturze produkcyjnej i finansowej CMC, z bardzo dobrymi perspektywami rozwoju na przyszłość. 

W CMC Poland LICZY SIĘ WNĘTRZE, co oznacza, że swoje działania skupia na ludziach, którzy swoim codziennym zaangażowaniem tworzą markę CMC. Na świecie CMC zatrudnia około 11 tys. pracowników, w Polsce ok. 2850 pracowników.

CMC Poland w swoich bieżących działaniach bierze pod uwagę otoczenie społeczno-gospodarcze. Koncentruje się na zapewnieniu optymalnych warunków dla harmonijnego rozwoju pracowników, zapewniając konkurencyjne wynagrodzenie, szereg benefitów finansowych i bogatą ofertę wypoczynkowo- rekreacyjną. Wspiera lokalne działania m.in. na rzecz dualnego systemu kształcenia, tworząc miejsce przyjazne uczniom szkół technicznych do podnoszenia swoich kompetencji a także wspiera drużyny sportowe, które cieszą się zainteresowaniem pracowników: męska siatkówka Aluron CMC Warta Zawiercie oraz KS Viret CMC Zawiercie- klub męskiej piłki ręcznej.

Przedsiębiorca uzyskał pomoc w ramach programu rządowego pod nazwą: „Pomoc dla przemysłu energochłonnego związana z cenami gazu ziemnego i energii elektrycznej w 2024 r.”

The steel produced by our Ontario steel plant, while using recycled steel scrap from various industries, is amongst the greenest in Canada and the world.

Canada Metal Processing Group strives to offer the best customer experience by delivering high-value and sustainably engineered steel products across North America. Description:
Jesteśmy fachowcami i wiodącym producentem stali w Polsce, specjalizującym się w produkcji stali surowej oraz szerokiej gamy wyrobów hutniczych. Jako zintegrowany pionowo producent samodzielnie pozyskujemy złom stalowy, który przetapiamy na stal wysokiej jakości, wzbogacając ją w odpowiednie dodatki.

Jesteśmy jedynym w Polsce producentem stali nierdzewnej, blach pancernych (w tym dla kołowych transporterów opancerzonych Rosomak) oraz stali żaroodpornej. W naszej ofercie znajdują się także pręty gładkie, kwadratowe, płaskowniki, kątowniki i pręty ze stali stopowych. Realizujemy zamówienia w szerokim zakresie gatunkowym, w tym również w nietypowych gatunkach stali.

Obecnie budujemy nowoczesną walcownię w Siemianowicach Śląskich, wyposażoną w innowacyjne technologie, które umożliwią dalszy rozwój i podniesienie jakości produkcji. Dodatkowo, nasze oddziały zajmują się produkcją wyrobów z metali nieżelaznych, usługami transportowymi oraz działalnością deweloperską.

Name: Swedish Steel Prize
Description:
Swedish Steel Prize is an international award for companies, institutions, and individuals in the steel industry. Since 1999, we’ve been recognizing and rewarding those who fully utilize the potential of steel to improve not only their business or industry, but also society.

All entries are assessed by an independent jury. Together they review each entry based on its level of innovation, creativity, sustainability, performance and competitiveness. Entries addressing the environment, digital solutions and new trends in the economy are especially encouraged.

The announcement of the winner is a major highlight at Swedish Steel Prize Awards in Stockholm, Sweden – but that is not all. Swedish Steel Prize Days is an event packed with knowledge, inspiration, and great opportunities to meet people working with steel in a variety of fields.

In addition to the media exposure that comes with this nomination, the winner will receive a diploma and a statuette designed by Jörg Jeschke. In conjunction with Swedish Steel Prize Awards, SSAB makes a SEK 100,000 donation to charity.

For our privacy statement, please visit steelprize.com/privacy-statement.

#steel #steelprize

Name: KPM - KEMET Precious Metal
Description:
KPM Group started its distinguished journey from a small retail shop 
in Suez city in 1935.
Now in its fourth generation, the family-run business has been 
through an inspirational journey of success, building a longstanding 
relationship of trust and integrity with its customers.
The Second Generation of the Nassar Family believed the time was 
right to bring their expertise to Cairo, starting their first gold jewelry 
shop in the capital. 
The strong reputation built in Suez City was extended to Cairo on a 
foundation of a high-end gold portfolio and an assuring return policy.
The Third Generation marks the beginning of the Group’s industrial 
era. Building Egypt’s first gold factory in the late 90s, the Nassars 
applied global quality benchmarks to both the industrial process and 
the retail experience.
Having realized the urging need for well-trained and qualified jewelry 
experts, the Nassars established Egypt’s first vocational training 
center, in cooperation with the Egyptian Ministry of Labor.
The Fourth Generation expanded to unmarked territory, building 
Egypt’s first fully integrated Gold and Diamond factory in the early 
2000s. 
The new factory allowed the group to continue its unstoppable 
growth, their continuous growth now sees them cover 90% of jewelry 
retailers across the Egyptian market.

OUR BRANDS:
Bullion Trading Company BTC, GD&M, EG Antique, The Travel Boutique, Odyssey, Gemeva and Egypt Gold School

Name: Befesa Zinc Metal
Description:
Befesa Zinc Metal (BZM)  is located near the intersection of growing Rutherford, Cleveland, Spartanburg, and Cherokee counties and is the only plant in the world producing zinc solely from recycled sources.
Our technology converts steel byproducts that would have ended up in a landfill into sellable commodities that can be reused in thousands of construction and household products.
At Befesa Zinc Metal, we strive to operate with the highest levels of safety, integrity, efficiency, and sustainability. We are committed to managing our business to provide for the health and safety of our people and to protect the environment.

Name: Trilok Steel Industries
Description:
Trilok Steel Industries (ISO 9001:2015 Certified Company), a dynamic group promoted by the Munot family, has been one of the leading manufacturers, exporters, importers, and Indenting houses of stainless steel industrial products since 1993, with local presence in India, China, the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, Singapore, and Turkey.

We have been exporting to 23 countries in Southeast Asia, Northern Africa, Europe, and North America. We have been working very closely with Indian-origin EPCs having their projects shipped overseas, like L&T, Technip, Angelique International, Va Tech Wabag, Fluor Daniel, FLSmidth, Kevlion, etc. Our ongoing projects include Sewage and Drainage Systems in Djibouti; Water Treatment Plants in Cameroon; Expansion of Breweries in the Philippines; a cross-Country Pipeline in Saudi Arabia; and the UTSTP Project with the Singapore PUB.

Apart from being a specialist in Stainless Steel products, what makes us unique is our wide array of product list which includes Stainless Steel, Mild steel / Carbon Steel, Alloy Steel, Copper, Bronze, Aluminium and High Nickel Alloys in the shapes of Pipes, Tubes, Plates, Sheets, Coils, Circles, Flats, Strips, Designer Sheets, Bars, Round bars, Square Bars, Hexagonal Bars, Rectangle Bars, Triangle Bars, I-bars, Angles, Columns, Billets, Bloom, Forged Fittings, Industrial Pipe Fittings and Boiler quality items etc in various grades of respective steel and specifications confirming to various national and international standards viz. ASME, ANSI, ASTM, API, MSS, DIN, BS, JIS, IS, AFNOR, NACE, AMS IBR etc. all under one camp i.e. Trilok Steel Industries.

With an experience of more than three decades and a commitment as strong as steel, Trilok Steel Industries has been successfully Delivering Metal Solutions Globally!

Name: Leoni Metalúrgica
Description: A METALÚRGICA LEONI, fundada em 03 de janeiro de 1994, está localizada na cidade de Guaramirim, próximo à Jaraguá do Sul, norte de Santa Catarina, um dos principais polos industriais do Brasil. Conta com uma estrutura física avançada e com profissionais qualificados, sempre voltados a atender as necessidades dos clientes e as exigências do mercado.

Name: THY MARCINELLE
Description: Le groupe Riva est le premier opérateur sidérurgique italien au monde et l'un des principaux groupes européens du secteur de l'acier. Fondé en 1954 par Emilio Riva, pionnier de la sidérurgie dans l'Italie de l'après-guerre, le Groupe s'est historiquement spécialisé dans la production de produits "longs" avec des aciéries à arc électrique et, en plus de 60 ans d'activité, a réussi à atteindre un leadership reconnu au niveau international - en se développant dans les principaux pays européens - grâce à ses normes de production élevées et à une stratégie précise et constante de croissance et d'investissements. Dirigé depuis juin 2014 par Claudio Riva, le groupe dispose de capitaux entièrement privés et emploie plus de 5 300 personnes, avec une présence de plus en plus qualifiée de diplômés et de jeunes diplômés universitaires, opérant avec des sites de production situés dans les pays suivants : Italie, France, Allemagne, Belgique, Espagne et Canada.

Name: Alle Alumínio Ltda
Description:
Localizada em Betim, Minas Gerais, a ALLE tem em seu DNA a excelência, inovação e confiabilidade, o que nos torna a maior empresa mineira na produção de ligas de alumínio secundário. 
Sendo referência no mercado nacional de alumínio, oferecemos aos nossos clientes, produtos reconhecidamente líderes em qualidade e confiabilidade, contribuindo para a manutenção do nosso ecossistema, gerando oportunidades de negócios para a sociedade e fomentando a economia circular. 
Utilizando matéria-prima infinitamente reciclável, entregamos ao mercado produtos com a pegada “alumínio verde”. Atuamos em diversos segmentos e produzimos ligas de alumínio líquido, lingotes de alumínio, pó de alumínio, desoxidantes em forma de gotão, granulados e tarugos para extrusão. 
Pautada pelas mais modernas regras de governança, a ALLE ALUMÍNIO dissemina em todas as relações o seu código de ética e conduta, demonstrando e fazendo cumprir seus valores, como transparência, integridade e equidade. Para monitorar este cumprimento, um rigoroso programa de compliance acompanha nosso passo a passo.
Na ALLE, somos movidos pela paixão, entregando soluções sustentáveis, sempre contribuindo para um mundo melhor.

Name: Alinabal, LLC
Description:
Outperform with Specialized Components, Assemblies and Sub-assemblies.
From co-design to delivery, Alinabal’s full-service solution gives customers single-source access to deep engineering expertise and a broad range of manufacturing capabilities to accelerate speed-to-market and profitability. Serving leading OEMs and blue-chip companies in the Aerospace & Defense, Medical, Military and Recreational & Power Sports markets, customers count on Alinabal for a broad range of complex engineering, fabrication and assembly capabilities.

Details: 
Decades of engineering experience gives Alinabal the critical 360-degree perspective that quickly turns our knowledge of specialized metals into products with optimal strength, durability and performance. Leveraging our understanding of the unique properties of specialized metals and an exceptional supply chain network, our products excel in harsh, high-temperature and corrosion-prone applications. Materials we use include:
•	Nickel Alloys
•	Aluminum Alloys
•	Stainless Steels
•	Tinanium Alloys
•	Inconel Superalloys
•	Hi-Temp PEEK
•	Performance Teflon Compounds
•	And More

Coupling this engineering expertise with in-house comprehensive manufacturing capabilities across four U.S.-based manufacturing facilities, Alinabal can launch new products faster, streamline your supply chain and scale production. Our capabilities include:  
•	Stamping
•	Machining
•	Welding
•	Custom Laminations & Stack
•	Complete & Sub-Assemblies
•	Laser & Water Jet Cutting
•	Wire EDM
•	Metal to Plastic Conversion
•	And More

Alinabal LLC. is part of Alinabal Group, a growing company of precision manufacturers who serve customers across diverse markets – accelerating success through niche expertise, highly-engineered solutions and a customer-centric approach.

Name: Grupo Combustol & Metalpó
Description:
Há mais de 60 anos o Grupo Combustol & Metalpó vem se destacando nos mercados onde atua, tendo a qualidade como seu objetivo principal.
O Grupo atualmente é composto por quatro empresas e é referência em seus segmentos de atuação:

Combustol Fornos – Uma das maiores empresas nacionais do segmento, produz e exporta equipamentos e peças de fornos da mais alta confiabilidade. Cresceu rapidamente com o desenvolvimento de tecnologia própria e também através de acordos de cooperação tecnológica firmados com empresas internacionais.

Combustol Tratamento Térmicos – Prestação de serviços de tratamentos térmico, nitretação e pintura eletrostática à pó. Oferece completos centros de prestação de serviços para terceiros e é capacitada para atender praticamente todos os tipos de tratamentos térmicos de metais, dentro das mais rigorosas exigências de qualidade, em três plantas: São Paulo - SP, Rio de Janeiro - RJ e Contagem - MG.

Combustol Refratários – Oferece uma linha de produtos voltada para aplicações especiais em que a resistência e a estabilidade mecânica e química em altas temperaturas são características primordiais. Fornece seus produtos para as principais indústrias siderúrgicas, metalúrgicas, metais não ferrosos, vidros, cerâmicas sanitárias, cerâmicas técnicas, isoladores cerâmicos e porcelana.

Metalpó – Dedicada exclusivamente à metalurgia do pó, produzindo pós metálicos não ferrosos e peças sinterizadas em ligas ferrosas e não ferrosas. Atualmente é uma das principais fabricantes de pós atomizados e sinterizados do Brasil e atende a diversos tipos de indústria, tais como: metalúrgica, automobilística, mecânica, elétrica, eletrônica e agrícola. Também exporta seus produtos para vários países.

Além da melhoria contínua da qualidade, a responsabilidade com o desenvolvimento do país e da sociedade, o aprimoramento contínuo de recursos humanos e a busca por tecnologia diferenciada são os conceitos que guiam o grupo.

Name: ACI Building Systems, Inc
Description:
With over five decades of manufacturing expertise and a combined 300 years of building sales and service experience, ACI Building Systems is a trusted leader in custom metal building solutions. Operating from a 270,000-square-foot facility in Batesville, Mississippi, and supported by technical offices across five states, our team is dedicated to delivering innovative, high-quality structures that exceed expectations.

Our expertise spans a wide range of applications, from commercial and industrial buildings to self-storage facilities and complex architectural projects. We offer fully engineered steel buildings, roofing systems, and metal building components, all designed to meet the unique needs of each client. Whether you're constructing a large-scale industrial facility or a specialized storage solution, ACI provides the reliability and precision that your project demands.

At ACI, we manage every aspect of your building project in-house, ensuring efficiency, flexibility, and streamlined solutions that adapt to evolving requirements. Our team is committed to keeping you on task, on budget, and on schedule—so your building is ready when you need it.

When you partner with ACI, you’re not just getting a supplier; you’re getting a dedicated team invested in your success. Let’s build something exceptional together.

Name: Sommet Group
Description:
With over 25 years in the business, Sommet is a leading Manufacturer and Exporter of an extensive range of non ferrous metals, alloys, wires and rods. 

Our vision is to create a trusted brand in non ferrous metals known for delivering consistent quality and customer satisfaction.

Name: U.S. Aluminum Extruders Coalition
Description: The U.S. Aluminum Extruders Coalition (USAEC) is a coalition of 14 American extruders. The coalition and the United Steelworkers union (USW) are seeking help from the U.S. government to stop unfairly traded imports of aluminum extrusions from 14 countries, which are injuring U.S. manufacturers and workers.

Name: Direct Metals Company, LLC
Description:
Since 1996, Direct Metals has been a nationwide distributor of specialty metal and fiberglass products. We are an ISO 9001:2015 certified company owned and operated by a select group of personnel with a combined 100 years of experience.

WIRE MESH
Wire mesh, also known as wire cloth or wire fabric, is a versatile metal product that can be used effectively in countless applications globally. Popular uses for wire mesh include stainless steel wire mesh for filters, steel wire mesh for partitions, and PVC wire mesh for machine guards.

PERFORATED METAL
Perforated metal is one of the most versatile and popular metal products on the market today. This specialty metal ranges from light to heavy gauge thickness and type of material.

EXPANDED METAL
Direct Metals offers expanded metal, a versatile and economical product made from a high-quality metal sheet. Our expanded metal sheets are available in various sizes, openings, and material types.

BAR GRATING
Direct Metals supplies bar grating products that can be used for a variety of applications. Bar grating is an ideal choice for projects ranging from trenches and stair treads to decking and steel flooring.

SAFETY GRATING
Metal safety grating from Direct Metals is designed to help you engineer a more secure workplace. This type of metal floor grating helps prevent injuries and reduces overall operation costs.

FIBERGLASS GRATING
Molded fiberglass grating and pultruded fiberglass grating from Direct Metals provide unmatched corrosion resistance properties, especially when compared to steel flooring products.

ARCHITECTURAL METAL
Architectural metal products from Direct Metals are versatile, lightweight, and economical.

FABRICATION SERVICES
We offer various value-added fabrication processes to our complete line of specialty metals and fiberglass inventory.

Name: Core Scientific Precious Metals Refinery
Description:
Core Scientific is committed to providing the highest quality precious metals refining services for our Dental & Precious Metal Professional customers. 

Don't just throw your precious metals scrap away!  Our team and customer portal make it easy for you to track your material, request replacement containers, and schedule pickups at your convenience. We provide free shipping, superior customer service, quick turnaround times, and thrive on helping you maximize your company's performance. 

Our precious metals analysis and advanced refining process performed completely in-house, exceeds industry standards for accuracy and consistency, providing you with a larger maximum yield return over cash buyers and other refiners. 

Contact us today 877-308-2388 / info@core-scientific.com and we'd be more than happy to discuss your refining and recycling needs. 

Visit:  https://core-scientific.com/requestcollectioncontainer/  for a free shipping kit & collection container.

Name: Ateliers ROCHE - Le sur-mesure industriel
Description:
Ateliers Roche : Le sur-mesure industriel

Ateliers Roche, filiale dédiée du Groupe CIF dans la mécanosoudure, l’usinage de moyenne dimension et la gestion de projets d'industriels complexes. Notre spécialité réside dans la production sur-mesure, unitaire ou en petites séries, grâce à une gamme complète de services adaptés aux exigences uniques de nos clients.

 Nos Domaines d’expertise :
 Mécanosoudure de 15 à 80 tonnes, avec soudeurs qualifiés, potence et robot de soudure.
 Usinage jusqu’à 8m de diamètre, et salle dédiée au contrôle tridimensionnel.
 Montage et Assemblage : un bâtiment spécifiquement dédié pour vous offrir des prestations globales.
 Gestion et Suivi de Projet : une gestion de projet complète, du début à la fin, par nos chargés d'affaires.

 Nos Atouts :
 Qualifications en Soudure : nous avons la certification de soudure EN3834, dans la Construction EN1090 et le Ferroviaire EN15085 Classe 2 ainsi que de nombreux QMOS.
 Banc d'Essai et Tests d'Épreuve : nous garantissons l'excellence de nos produits par des tests rigoureux, y compris des épreuves d'étanchéité au gaz et hydraulique.
 Intégration de Projets Multi-Compétences : notre expertise couvre l'engineering, l’industrialisation, les approvisionnements, la mécanosoudure, l'usinage, les assemblages ainsi que les tests et enfin le suivi, assurant une intégration de projet sans faille.

 Votre Projet, Notre Engagement :
Nous comprenons l'importance cruciale d'un projet industriel réussi, de l'ingénierie à l'industrialisation avec un suivi méticuleux. Notre engagement est de coordonner chaque étape avec précision pour assurer la réussite de vos ambitions industrielles.

voestalpine Iberia S.L. es la oficina comercial de la Península Ibérica del grupo voestalpine , ubicada en Barcelona, España.
voestalpine es un grupo líder mundial en tecnología y bienes de capital con una combinación única de experiencia en materiales y procesamiento. Con sus productos de alta calidad y soluciones de sistemas que utilizan acero y otros metales, es uno de los socios líderes para las industrias de la automoción y de bienes de consumo en Europa, así como de industrias de petróleo y gas en todo el mundo.

Name: Riva Stahl GmbH
Description: Die Riva-Gruppe ist das erste italienische Stahlunternehmen der Welt und eine der wichtigsten europäischen Gruppen im Stahlsektor. Die 1954 von Emilio Riva, einem Pionier der Stahlerzeugung im Nachkriegsitalien, gegründete Gruppe hat sich seit jeher auf die Herstellung von Langprodukten in Elektrostahlwerken spezialisiert. In den mehr als 60 Jahren ihrer Tätigkeit ist es ihr gelungen, dank ihrer hohen Produktionsstandards und einer präzisen und konstanten Wachstums- und Investitionsstrategie eine international anerkannte Führungsposition zu erlangen und in den wichtigsten europäischen Ländern zu expandieren. Die Gruppe, die seit Juni 2014 von Claudio Riva geleitet wird, verfügt über ein vollständig privates Kapital und beschäftigt mehr als 5 300 Mitarbeiter, darunter immer mehr Abiturienten und junge Hochschulabsolventen, die an Produktionsstandorten in folgenden Ländern tätig sind: Italien, Frankreich, Deutschland, Belgien, Spanien und Kanada.

Le groupe Cèdres Industries s’impose comme un acteur clé dans le domaine de la tuyauterie, la chaudronnerie, les réseaux de chauffage urbain, la mécanique d’usinage ainsi que la maintenance machines-outils depuis 1996.
Grâce à ses 11 sociétés, son expertise s’étend sur toute la France et intervient dans de nombreux secteurs tels que l’agroalimentaire, l’automobile, l’énergie, la cimenterie, la pharmaceutique et la sidérurgie.

Name: Amari Precision Tubes
Description:
Amari Precision Tubes was established in January 2016 through the merging of H. Rollet, Blackheath Tube and Cole & Swallow Materials. This merger represented a pooling of expertise and knowledge of three major tube manufacturing and processing firms. This has led to significant investment in new premises, stock, plant and equipment; strengthening our technical capabilities and commitment to excellence while securing a long-term, highly competitive future.

Our unrivalled depth of knowledge and wealth of experience combined with our outstanding technical capabilities means that we can make or source high quality materials. We are highly skilled in all manufacturing processes which allows us to produce tube to extremely tight tolerances - meeting national and international standards while incorporating our customers' unique specifications.

As the only UK manufacturer & stockist of Defence Standard tube in 90/10 and 70/30 copper-nickel and copper, our commitment to producing the highest quality tube has led to Amari Precision Tubes becoming a valued supplier to a number of 1st tier military sub-contractors.

Additionally, we are the only manufacturer and stockist of rigid, circular and rectangular waveguide tubing in the UK and Europe. Our unrivalled depth of knowledge and wealth of experience has built our impeccable reputation as a trusted supplier and producer of high quality, precision-engineered waveguide components.

For our customers we are not only a tube manufacturer but also a development partner and supplier offering a full spectrum of tubular products. We are committed to delivering superior products, meeting customer's specifications and supplying products on time and to budget.

Name: Moxba Group
Description:
MOXBA’s head office is located in Almelo, the Netherlands. Moxba B.V. was founded in 1974 and became a worldwide known specialist in recycling spent catalyst and metal containing residues in a responsible, trustable and environmentally friendly way.  Three recycling facilities in two continents are operated; Europe and South America. A complete full loop recycling chain has been well established; turning waste materials back into first class products. Recent third party analyses showed 85% CO2 savings on produced alloys compared to conventional mining!

Total-solution services offer sampling, analyzing, recovering, and recycling. More over, services include waste management, logistics arrangement, legal documentations/licenses settlements, and general consultations. Flexibility and reliability play a prominent role for success in both one-off and long-term solutions. We take care of all necessary steps of the recycling processes.
Last but not least, Moxba's products coming out of our recycling facilities, whether a fertilizer ingredient or alloy, they are REACH certified where required.

Please feel free to contact us for any questions and inquiries. 
We are more than happy to hear from you.

Contact:
info@moxba.nl
+31 (0)546 577 400

Name: Jalalabad Metal Limited

The company produces Cold Rolled Steel, Galvanized Steel, Galvalume Steel, and Color Coated Steel for numerous industrial and commercial applications.

The company has a strong nationwide supplier. In its short history, JML has carried out extensive large scale expansion activities to enhance production. With the latest expansion, the company now has a capacity of over 240,000 Metric Tons per year. 

The company has played an important role in developing the large scale industrial manufacturing sector of Bangladesh. JML’s high quality steel serves as an essential input for various upstream and downstream industries of the country. JML believes in sustainability of operations and aims to maintain good relationship with all its stakeholders.

Name: Metals Innovation Initiative
Description:
The Metals Innovation Initiative (MI2) is a Kentucky-based nonprofit that provides collaborative, industry-led executive leadership to attract and promote advanced research, sustainability, commercialization, and talent development in Kentucky’s metals industry–and, ultimately, for Kentucky to be seen as the preeminent destination for metals innovation.

Kentucky’s metals sector has grown to become one of the state’s most substantial industries, composed of more than 230 facilities across the Commonwealth and responsible for approximately 25,000 full-time jobs.

MI2 was founded by some of Kentucky’s leading metals companies with support from the Kentucky Cabinet for Economic Development’s KY Innovation. The launch was supported by Western Kentucky University, the Kentucky Science and Technology Corporation, AccelerateKY, and other support organizations.

Name: POSCO AAPC
Description:
POSCO AAPC has experienced substantial growth in 7 years since it was founded in 2010 at Alabama. As the global leader in the steel industry, we give our priorities to employee’s safety and happiness along with customer’s trust and satisfaction. We provide a broad business platform to you given the various types of products from slitting plates to producing wire rod. We are working with stampers directly as a bridge between mills and automobile manufactures. Knowledge of both mill and automobile manufacturers' position is one of our differentiate features from other processing centers. 

In September 2017, POSCO AAPC opens the wire rod processing center in Jeffersonville, Indiana, at the center of the fastener industry.

We are mainly deal with the Cold Drawn Bar and Wire rod through cost saving process with the non-heat treated steels for fastener industry. Our facility is consist of 2 heat furnaces (STC Type), 1 pickling and coating line, and 4 drawing machines, which can produce the capacity of 25,000 Ton per Year. To build up a strategic partnership with Fasteners and forging companies, POSCO aim to supply the right products at the right time with the competitive guarantee price and quality by directly negotiate with the bar manufacturer. 

To provide our customers with products that meet or exceed their quality requirements, we will continuously strive to improve the quality and delivery time.

Name: TMK (Uzbekistan Technological Metals Complex)
Description:
TMK: Powering the Future of Critical Raw Materials

Uzbekistan Metals and Technological Company (UzTMK) is driving the future of critical raw materials (CRMs) with a fully integrated approach to mining, processing, and industrial production. As the state-owned enterprise (SoE) responsible for Uzbekistan’s CRM assets, UzTMK is positioned to become a key global supplier for clean energy, advanced manufacturing, and high-tech industries.

With over 50 projects in development — including 30+ greenfield exploration sites — UzTMK is building one of the world’s most advanced and diverse CRM portfolios. Our focus includes tungsten, molybdenum, lithium, graphite, germanium, copper, cobalt, nickel, tantalum, and more.

A Fully Integrated Supply Chain

We operate across the entire CRM value chain, ensuring efficiency and long-term security:

 Upstream – Exploration & development of CRM deposits
 Midstream – Processing, refining, and smelting
 Downstream – Manufacturing of industrial end-products

Backed by an initial $200 million equity commitment from the Uzbekistan Reconstruction and Development Fund, UzTMK offers unique investment and partnership opportunities in a rapidly evolving global CRM market. We actively seek strategic collaborations in advanced technologies, processing innovations, and responsible resource development to position Uzbekistan as a trusted, competitive supplier.

Why Partner with UzTMK?

 Strategic Access – Unlocking high-potential CRM resources through global partnerships
 Innovation & Sustainability – Advancing responsible mining and ESG-aligned practices
 Investment Growth – Long-term opportunities in the evolving CRM supply chain

 The future of critical raw materials starts here. Let’s build it — together.

Name: Alumec
Description:
Alumec foi fundada em 1988, e vem se desenvolvendo nacionalmente, como protagonista em peças técnicas de injeção sob pressão em alumínio.

Instalada em uma área de 7.000m², contando com 120 colaboradores, com produção industrial de 24 horas em 3 turnos e uma frota própria para atender seus clientes.

Somos referência em qualidade e atendimento na fabricação de peças no segmento automotivo, buscamos sempre promover soluções relacionados aos produtos e seus processos, através de uma equipe técnica e administrativa altamente qualificada.

Somos certificados na IATF 16949:2016, ISO 9001:2015, atendemos aos requisitos da VDA 6.3, com profissionais qualificados pela VDA- QMC.

Nosso parque fabril de injetoras, estão entre 280 a 1200 toneladas ,com capacidade de produzir e fornecer peças de 100 gramas até 5 kg.

A Alumec está em busca constante de crescimento e novas tecnologias, para melhorar e desenvolver os processos produtivos e administrativos. 

Nossa ferramentaria conta com um quadro altamente técnico, capaz de fazer todas as manutenções e alterações necessárias em moldes, quando necessário.

Description:

Gracias a estos procesos de vanguardia, nuestros productos cumplen con los más altos estándares de calidad, posicionándonos como un socio confiable en la industria.

Nuestra amplia gama de productos incluye una gran variedad de aleaciones y medidas listas para envío inmediato, incluyendo bronces STD, SAE 62, SAE 64, SAE 660, SAE 68, bronce naval y bronce al manganeso (SAE 430B).

Conecta con nosotros para recibir asesoría personalizada y descubre por qué somos la elección número uno en el mercado del bronce en México!

Name: Badger Alloys
Description:
WORLD-CLASS CASTINGS DELIVERED.

Name: IRBI MÁQUINAS E EQUIPAMENTOS
Description:
A IRBI Máquinas e Equipamentos Ltda, é sucessora da indústria “Irmãos Biagi” que atua a mais de 65 anos no mercado. O negócio que surgiu como oficina de consertos de armas de fogo e equipamentos em geral, se transformou em uma grande indústria de equipamentos para o setor sucroalcooleiro e construção civil.

O fundador da empresa Sr. Alexandre Biagi, com apenas 17 anos chegou a Araçatuba-SP em 1910, sendo reconhecido como um dos pioneiros na fundação da cidade. 

O inicio dessa saga de empresários e indústrias deu-se quando o Sr. Alexandre decidiu em 1926 montar uma oficina, onde na época ainda nem se quer existiam: razão social ou registros. “O dia-a-dia era consertar rodas de carroça, janelas, motor a gasolina e principalmente armas de fogo”, recorda.

O crescimento de Araçatuba com a chegada das maquinas de beneficiar café e algodão, também fez dos Biagi especialistas de maquinas do tipo.

Quando a “oficina” completou 20 anos (1946), Alexandre passou o comando para os filhos Ivo e Nilo Biagi, na época com 21 e 20 anos respectivamente, e que já trabalhavam com o pai. Autodidatas e com grande vontade de aumentar produção e faturamento, montaram várias cerâmicas na região e conquistaram novos clientes. A partir daí a “oficina” se instalou em galpão maior e passou chamar IRMÃOS BIAGI LTDA.

Em 1957, os irmãos adquiriram novo terreno na Avenida Baguaçu e montaram a primeira fundição do Noroeste Paulista aproveitando o bom momento que a cidade e região viviam, com a instalação de grandes indústrias como: Frigorífico T. Maia e Nestle.

Atualmente, com o comando da empresa nas mãos da terceira geração através do Eng. Paulo Sérgio Biagi a IRBI também desenvolve projetos e equipamentos para o setor sucroalcooleiro aliado a construção civil torna a empresa referência nos dois setores dentro e fora do Brasil.

These steels significantly reduce wear on parts of machinery and equipment operating under extreme conditions, resulting in lower maintenance costs and longer service life.

Thanks to the use of Hard from Edge to Edge technology, Miilux wear-resistant products guarantee the highest quality and service life.

Technology Hard from edge to edge.

This technology eliminates completely heat affected zones in the material.
The final result of the component made in „hard from edge to edge “ technology covers a price reduction but maintains wear resistance parameters. It extends life expectancy of the component and eliminates additional financial outlays for downtime or services of machinery and equipment.

In addition to abrasion wear plates, standard Miilux products include, among others:
- excavator bucket components
- mining conveyors
- stringer plates for crushers
- sieve
- lip plates
- vehicle beds for crushed rock and gravel

The high dimensional accuracy makes that Miilux products may be delivered in the form of elements ready for further assembly in machines and industrial equipment. Miilux technologies are trusted by the major manufacturers of mining, road and armored vehicles in the world.

Name: MTL Materials
Description:
MTL Materials is het online platform dat stilstaande metaalvoorraad omzet in waarde.
Wij verbinden bedrijven die te veel voorraad hebben met bedrijven die juist materialen zoeken.
Zo maken we de metaalhandel sneller, transparanter en duurzamer.
We maken stilstaande voorraad weer liquide. Dit doen we snel, transparant en zonder tussenhandel.
In de metaalsector liggen enorme hoeveelheden waarde stil:
Bedrijven hebben magazijnen vol platen, profielen, buizen en andere reststukken.
Die voorraad kost geld, neemt ruimte in en veroudert.
De verkoop van restvoorraden is traag, onoverzichtelijk en vaak niet rendabel.
Ondertussen zoeken andere bedrijven precies diezelfde materialen, maar kopen nieuw duurder en met langere levertijd.
Kort gezegd: Waarde ligt stil. Handel is versnipperd.
MTL Materials maakt die voorraden zichtbaar, bereikbaar en verhandelbaar.

Via ons online platform kunnen bedrijven:
- Direct hun overtollige voorraad aanbieden.
- Zien welke materialen beschikbaar zijn bij andere bedrijven.
- Snel kopen, verkopen en leveren zonder onnodige schakels.

We brengen transparantie, snelheid en efficiëntie in een markt die dat hard nodig heeft.

Atlas Materials
Description:
We have developed the Atlas Process - a breakthrough process technology - for making magnesium products and battery grade nickel with almost zero CO2 and no waste or other emissions while increasing the amount of ore available to make battery grade nickel by 50%.  

Until now, saprolite ores, which account for approximately one third of the world’s nickel resources, have not been available for battery grade applications.

Atlas has assembled a world-class management team to develop its technology, design and commission a plant and market a range of industrial materials. 

The Company is working with global industry leaders to construct its first commercial scale plant in North America with support from a reputable group of engineering companies, equipment suppliers, and laboratories.

Name: Laserkeskus Oy
Description:
LASERKESKUS OY

Vuonna 2003 perustettu Laserkeskus Oy on erikoistunut metalliteollisuudessa toimivien yritysten esikäsittelypalveluiden tuottamiseen ympäri Suomea. Toimimme nykyaikaisissa n. 4 700 m2 tiloissa Laitilassa. Nykyaikaiset laser-, hienosädeplasma-, polttoleikkaus-  ja särmäyskonettamme sekä hitsausrobotti takaavat kustannustehokkaan toiminnan.  Lisäksi tarjoamme tuotteen viimeistelyyn koneellista hiontaa tai rummutusta. Henkilökuntaamme kuuluu noin 50 kokenutta ja osaavaa esikäsittelypalveluiden ammattilaista. Toimintamme aikana henkilöstömme vaihtuvuus on ollut erittäin vähäistä, mikä on taannut avainasiakkaidemme tuotteiden valmistuksessa tarvittavan erikoisosaamisen säilymisen yrityksessämme. Liikevaihtomme vuonna 2013 oli n. 8,5 miljoonaa euroa.

Oman tuotannon lisäksi olemme vuosien mittaan hankkineet luotettavia yhteistyökumppaneita, jotka perustavat toimintansa samoihin arvoihin. Nämä yhteistyökumppanit tarjoavat meille mm. pintakäsittelyä ja koneistusta niin, että koko tilaus- ja toimitusketju valmisosissa on meidän käsissämme. Toimitamme valmisosat tarvittaessa juuri oikeaan aikaan asiakkaan kokoonpanolinjalle.

Haluamme toimia asiakkaittemme tuotannon saumattomana osana; tuotamme asiakkaillemme kustannushyötyä tuotannon läpimenoaikojen nopeuttamisella ja samalla vapauttamme asiakkaidemme resurssit ydintoimintoihin.

Olemme kustannustehokas ratkaisu, jos haluat ulkoistaa tuotannon esikäsittelypalvelut ja keskittyä ydintoimintojesi kehittämiseen. Haluamme vastaisuudessakin olla asiakkaidemme arvostettu yhteistyökumppani, jonka osaamiseen, palveluhaluun, toimitusaikaan ja tuotteiden laatuun voi luottaa. ”Valmisosassa on särmää"

Name: Aleon Renewable Metals
Description:
Aleon Metals, founded in 1973, is a leader in recycling catalyst and lithium-ion batteries, focusing on the recovery of strategic metals for infrastructure and renewable energy. The company operates two main divisions:

Name: SiderAlloys Italia Spa
Description:
La SiderAlloys Italia Spa, costituita nel febbraio del 2018, ha acquisito il complesso industriale “ex Alcoa” di Portovesme, sito nel comune di Portoscuso (SU), con lo scopo di riavviare la produzione di alluminio primario, unico stabilimento presente nel territorio Italiano. Il progetto consiste nel rinnovare un   impianto obsoleto con nuove tecnologie e a minor impatto ambientale. Il complesso stabilimento SiderAlloys Italia può essere suddiviso in macroaree:
Rodding: dove gli anodi collegati mediante inghisaggio a dei conduttori elettrici (aste e nippli anodici) vengono inviati alla sala elettrolisi per il loro utilizzo. 
Conversione: costituito da una complessa rete di cabine elettriche di trasformazione che converte l’energia elettrica alternata in corrente continua necessaria per il funzionamento del reparto Elettrolisi. 
Sala Elettrolisi rappresenta il  cuore dello stabilimento e attraverso un processo elettrochimico-endotermico, le celle elettrolitiche, formate da anodo-catodo-bagno,  danno origine all’alluminio liquido.
Ricostruzione/Demolizione celle è il reparto dove vengono ricostruite le celle di elettrolisi una volta finito il ciclo di vita in esercizio. Legato alla ricostruzione celle vi è il reparto demolizione celle, dove terminato il ciclo di vita tecnica, le celle vengono scisse tra parti non più riutilizzabili e quelle che, dopo manutenzione, possono essere reimpiegate.
La Fonderia e l’impianto Vergella Properzi trasformano l’alluminio liquido proveniente dal reparto Elettrolisi miscelato con alluminio solido acquistato sul mercato, in prodotti ad elevato valore aggiunto destinati al mercato dei Profilati Estrusi (Billette), dei Laminati (Placche per laminazione), dell’ Automotive ed Industriale (Pani in leghe speciali) e Applicazioni Elettriche e Meccaniche (Vergella in Colata continua).

Especializada em corte, dobra, preparação e fornecimento de aço para aplicações industriais e agroindustriais, a Delta Aços opera com foco em precisão dimensional, rastreabilidade, padronização, e compliance técnico, assegurando que cada componente entregue mantenha o nível de segurança e responsabilidade exigido pelos processos Montarsul.

Nossa estrutura produtiva foi construída para eliminar gargalos, reduzir dependência de terceiros e oferecer ao mercado a robustez de uma operação que integra fabricação, engenharia e execução em campo. Isso nos permite entregar peças e componentes metálicos com qualidade consistente, prazos controlados e total alinhamento às necessidades de obras, montagens e manutenções industriais.

Atendemos indústrias, empreendimentos agroindustriais e empresas que exigem confiabilidade em fornecimento metálico para estruturas, equipamentos, suportes, reforços, caldeiraria leve e componentes técnicos. Cada entrega segue padrões rigorosos de conferência, documentação e responsabilidade técnica.

A Delta Aços atua como um facilitador operacional: somos o ponto onde a engenharia encontra a fabricação com agilidade. Nossa missão é transformar o aço em resultado — com precisão, previsibilidade e compromisso direto com a segurança operacional dos nossos clientes.

La société Dejoie, est une fonderie d'aluminium créée en 1929,  bien plus qu'une fonderie d'aluminium : de la pièce brute aux sous-ensembles montés.

Notre savoir-faire :


Activité Aluminium :

De la conception à la série en passant par les prototypes, nous vous accompagnons dans vos projets. Nous pouvons vous fournir depuis la pièce brute ou finie (traitement thermique et de surface), jusqu’à des sous-ensembles montés et intégrés.


Activité scellés :

Huta Bankowa jest największym polskim producentem obręczy kolejowych, niezbędnych do zespołów kół kolejowych pociągów i tramwajów. Odbiorcami obręczy produkowanych przez firmę – oprócz polskich przewoźników – są również takie koleje jak: tajskie, egipskie, ukraińskie. Firma posiada nowoczesną walcownię produkującą pierścienie i obręcze, co umożliwia stałe poszerzanie oferty, a wysoka elastyczność linii produkcyjnej pozwala na dobór wielu niestandardowych produktów w krótkich – nawet jednostkowych – seriach. Firma specjalizuje się w produkcji innych specjalistycznych wyrobów stalowych. Oprócz w/w obręczy – są to pierścienie kuto-walcowane oraz wyroby długie, takie jak: pręty okrągłe oraz kęsy kwadratowe. Wyroby długie produkowane przez Hutę Bankową znajdują zastosowanie w takich sektorach jak : maszynowy, motoryzacyjny, budowlany, offshore. Pręty okrągłe znajdują zastosowanie w zaawansowanych architektonicznie projektach budynków użyteczności publicznej, czy podziemnych tunelach w Skandynawii. Huta Bankowa oferuje również szeroki wybór kęsisk walcowanych i kęsisk do dalszej obróbki – głównie do kucia dla przemysłu lotniczego i motoryzacyjnego. Ponadto 70 % produkcji firmy jest eksportowana do całej Europy.

Name: GM Iron & Steel Company Limited
Description:
About Us
GM Iron and Steel Company Limited (GMISCL) is a leading manufacturer of premium-grade structural and rolled steel products in India. Established with a vision to contribute meaningfully to India’s infrastructure and industrial growth, GMISCL has grown into a trusted name in the steel sector by delivering high-quality, reliable, and sustainable steel solutions to diverse industries.

Our commitment to innovation, quality, and customer satisfaction has positioned us as a preferred supplier to sectors such as construction, power, railways, heavy engineering, and infrastructure development. With state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities and a highly skilled workforce, we are capable of producing a wide range of steel products that meet Indian and international standards.

Vision and Mission
Vision
To become a leading force in the Indian steel industry by setting benchmarks in product quality, customer satisfaction, and sustainable practices, while supporting national infrastructure development.

Mission
Deliver durable and high-performance steel products using cutting-edge technology.

Ensure customer-centric services backed by timely delivery and technical support.

Maintain a safe and eco-friendly workplace committed to sustainable development.

Promote innovation, workforce empowerment, and inclusive growth.

Our Products
GMISCL’s product portfolio is engineered to support key sectors of the economy. Each product is manufactured under stringent quality standards to ensure strength, durability, and compliance.

1. Structural Steel
Mild Steel Angles

Channels (ISMC)

I-Beams and H-Beams

Flats and Square Bars

TMT Bars (Fe 500/550)

2. Rolled Steel Products
Billets and Blooms

Rounds and Squares

Mild Steel Rods

Wire Rods

Conclusion
GM Iron and Steel Company Limited is more than just a steel manufacturer—it is a symbol of trust, strength, and national pride. Through consistent product quality, ethical operations, and forward-looking leadership.

Description: Adoption of Aluminum-Scandium (AlSc) alloys has been limited to-date by the high cost of making the alloy which requires both expensive raw materials and complicated manufacturing processes. Nos services s'adressent aux entreprises de l'industrie du décolletage actives dans les secteurs automobile, dentaire, horloger, lunetterie, médical, téléphonie et sport.

Chez PMF Metals SA, nous croyons en une approche personnalisée et un accompagnement individuel de chaque projet. Notre équipe de 10 collaborateurs utilise des équipements modernes et des processus rigoureux pour garantir une précision irréprochable.

Nous façonnons des matières premières de haute qualité : aciers doux et trempables, inox, titane pur et allié, ainsi que des métaux non ferreux et alliages spéciaux. Grâce à nos fournisseurs attitrés, nous assurons un approvisionnement régulier et une disponibilité élevée.

Notre flexibilité nous permet de nous adapter rapidement aux demandes variées de notre clientèle. Cette capacité d'adaptation est renforcée par notre engagement en innovation, qui nous pousse à concevoir ou modifier nos outils de production.

PMF Metals SA valorise la relation de partenariat avec ses clients. Nous sommes un véritable allié dans la réalisation de vos projets. Notre slogan, « La haute précision à votre écoute », reflète notre philosophie : chaque détail compte et chaque client mérite une attention particulière.

Notre savoir-faire se concentre sur l’étirage, tréfilage, redressage, laminage, appointage et chanfreinage. Nos travaux respectent les standards les plus exigeants de l'industrie.

Nous garantissons un approvisionnement régulier et un haut niveau de disponibilité de nos produits. 

Notre volonté d’amélioration continue assure une innovation constante et une adaptation rapide aux évolutions du marché et des besoins de nos clients.

Name: MEG Eletromecânica Indústria e Comércio LTDA
Description:
Fundada em 1987 e sediada na Zona Leste de São Paulo, a MEG Eletromecânica é referência no desenvolvimento, fabricação e fornecimento de componentes para sistemas de rede aérea ferroviária e de trolleybus. Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, combinamos tradição e tecnologia de ponta para oferecer soluções que garantem segurança, durabilidade e desempenho superior.

Por que escolher a MEG?

Especialização setorial: Peças projetadas especificamente para ferrovias, metrôs, bondes e sistemas de transporte por via aérea.

Qualidade certificada: Processos de fundição e usinagem de alta precisão em máquinas ferramenta modernas com rigoroso controle de qualidade.

Inovação constante: Investimento contínuo em automação, impressão 3D e testes avançados para o desenvolvimento de protótipos e novos produtos.

Suporte técnico dedicado: Equipe de engenheiros e especialistas pronta para acompanhar projetos desde o desenho até o pós-venda.

Missão e valores
A MEG tem como missão oferecer componentes que assegurem a continuidade operacional dos transportes sobre trilhos e via aérea, contribuindo para a mobilidade urbana sustentável e eficiente. Atuamos com ética, transparência e compromisso com a preservação ambiental.

Vamos conectar?
Siga nossa página para acompanhar lançamentos, cases de sucesso e novidades do setor ferroviário e de trolleybus. Entre em contato pelo LinkedIn ou pelo e-mail meg@meg-eletromec.com.br para saber como podemos colaborar com o seu próximo projeto!

Description:
Localizada estrategicamente em Campinas-SP, a TR METAIS se destaca como uma indústria dedicada à fabricação de torneiras com compromisso inabalável com a qualidade e a sustentabilidade.
Missão
Na TR METAIS, nossa missão é clara e inspiradora: oferecer soluções em metais sanitários que atendam aos mais elevados padrões de qualidade. Com um foco incansável na inovação, buscamos constantemente superar as expectativas, proporcionando produtos que não apenas atendam, mas excedam as necessidades de nossos clientes.
Valorização de Colaboradores e Clientes
Entendemos que o coração da TR METAIS bate graças ao esforço e dedicação de nossa equipe. Valorizamos cada membro, proporcionando um ambiente de trabalho positivo, oportunidades de crescimento e reconhecimento pelo seu empenho. Acreditamos que colaboradores felizes e engajados são a chave para oferecer produtos e serviços excepcionais aos nossos clientes.

Contribuindo para a Qualidade de Vida
Na TR METAIS, não estamos apenas comprometidos em fornecer produtos de alta qualidade, mas também em melhorar a qualidade de vida de nossos clientes. Acreditamos que um ambiente sanitário bem projetado e funcional contribui significativamente para o bem-estar e a harmonia dos lares. Nosso objetivo é ser parte integrante desse processo, oferecendo soluções que não apenas atendam às expectativas, mas que também enriqueçam a experiência diária de nossos clientes.

Junte-se a nós na TR METAIS, onde a qualidade, a inovação e o respeito ao meio ambiente convergem para criar um futuro mais sustentável e uma vida mais confortável para todos.

Name: PRO-MAR S.A.
Description:
Historia firmy PRO-MAR S.A. sięga do połowy lat 90-tych. Wówczas to, Pan Mariusz Jędrzej Święs, obecny Prezes spółki i jej główny akcjonariusz, posiadając wieloletnie doświadczenie w handlu wyrobami hutniczymi, podjął decyzję o przekształceniu dobrze prosperującej działalności handlowej w działalność o charakterze produkcyjnym. Szybki rozwój firmy PPHU PRO-MAR S.C. oraz stale umacniająca się jej pozycja na rynku pozwoliły w roku 2001 na przekształcenia firmy rodzinnej w spółkę akcyjną. Od tego momentu działalność spółki PRO-MAR S.A. cechuje pasmo dynamicznego i nieprzerwanego wzrostu oraz sukcesu. Firma efektywnie wdraża plany rozwoju oraz efektywnie realizuje kolejne inwestycje produktowe i technologiczne. W ramach tych planów obecnie realizowana jest budowa hali wykańczalni, która pozwoli naszej firmie znacząco podnieść jakość oraz stopień przetworzenia produktów gotowych. Oprócz zakładu produkcyjnego w Poznaniu, Spółka posiada również centrum dystrybucyjno-magazynowe w Tarnowskich Górach, a obecny zakres działalności firmy obejmuje m.in.:

• PRODUKCJĘ STALI ŁUSZCZONEJ W PRĘTACH I KRĘGACH (własna łuszczarnia)
• PRODUKCJĘ STALI CIĄGNIONEJ W PRĘTACH I KRĘGACH (własna ciągarnia)
• PRODUKCJĘ ODKUWEK SWOBODNIE KUTYCH (własna kuźnia)
• ZAKUP, MAGAZYNOWANIE I HANDEL MATERIAŁAMI HUTNICZYMI
ORAZ KUZIENNYMI (z produkcji krajowej, UE oraz innej)
• USŁUGI w zakresie łuszczenia, ciągnienia, kucia swobodnego stali oraz cięcia gazowo-plazmowego do wysokości h=300 mm

W tych dziedzinach jesteśmy jednym z liderów na polskim rynku oferując wyroby o najwyższych parametrach jakościowych, wysokiej dokładności wykonania oraz 100% rozpoznawalności produktowej (nawet po 20 latach) !

Nos produits sont utilisés en Europe et dans le reste du monde dans des domaines diversifiés et pour n’en citer que quelques-uns dans l’industrie automobile et pharmaceutique, la construction, l’aérospatial.

Type de matériaux que nous distribuons et usinons: 

Acier de construction avec alliage, Acier de construction sans alliage, Acier inoxydable, Acier d'outillage, Aluminium avec alliage, Alliage de cuivre

Capacité de production:

Gamme de diamètres que nous pouvons usiner: rond de 8 à 100 mm ; Longueurs des barres de 3000 à 8000 mm

Dureté: En conformité avec la norme standards 0,5 mm/m ; Sur demande du client 0,1 mm/ m

Tolérances: h9 / h10 / h11 ; Autres tolérances sur demande du client 0,1 mm/m

Rugosité: 
• Ra 1,6 après écroutage et dressage 
(Ra 0,2 à 0,6 max. sur demande du client, en fonction de la matière)
• Ra 3,2 après écroutage sans dressage 
Contrôle de la matière:
* Test de résistance de classe 2 à classe 4
* 100 % de test sur le diamètre et l'ovalisation par mesure laser
* 100 % de test par ultrason sur l'acier brut KSR < 1,5 <1 < 0,7

Usinage d'extrémité
* Chanfreins et dressage sur des gammes de diamètre allant de 8 mm à 90 mm
*Rectitude des chanfreins de 0,2 mm à 5 mm /30° à 45°

Moyens de production

• 4 lignes d’écroutage entièrement automatisée
• 3 machines de dressage 
• 100 % des contrôles assistés par laser pour contrôle de diamètre et ovalisation sur 2 axes 
• 2 déchargements automatiques avec élimination des barres non conformes 
• 2 lignes de production pour chanfreins et usinage d’extrémités 
Sciage et usinage lopin
• 5 machines de coupe 
• 4 machines de centrage automatique

Name: Pacific Metal Powders Company Ltd
Description:
INTRODUCTION

Pacific Metal Powders (PMP) produces a range of non-ferrous Metal Atomise Powders for use in Friction Lining materials.
All products are produced from pure raw materials with known chemical composition to ensure that the final product has the minimal Heavy Metal Content and low environmental impact when used in the final Friction Lining.

PMP gives technical support to customers and has a policy of
customizing products to meet specific application demands. Both new
production techniques and new products are actively being developed in the
Company’s R & D projects.

PRODUCTS
PMP produces Spherical, Irregular and Needle Atomise metal
powders. The Metals and alloys range from those with low melting point materials such as Zinc to higher melt point materials such as Copper and its alloys.
Using our process spherical atomise particles of Copper and Bronze (Cu/Sn alloy) are produced. Irregular atomise particles of Brass are produced.
Needle atomise particles of Brass, Bronze, Aluminium and Zinc are produced.

NEEDLE ATOMISE AND ITS ADVANTAGES
Needle atomise as produced by PMP has been specially
developed to combine the low Heavy Metal Content of normal atomise powder with the elongated particle shape of Chippings. 

Some of the advantages of the Needle atomise process is that it is produced direct from the molten metal; careful selection of raw
material and control of the melting process ensures that the products have the minimal Heavy Metal Content. The needle atomize process is a 100% oil and grease free process.
Since the particle shape is similar to Chippings, Needle atomise can be used as a substitute without major changes to the formulation. Elongated particles also give much better dispersion within the formulae resulting in superior processing. The elongated particle shape the metal powders have more adhesion and better long term stability in the brake system than spherical or irregular.

Our work is based on the principles of the circular economy. Through an integrated corporate policy for quality, environment, safety, energy, and ethics, we can guarantee the quality of our products while contributing to protecting the environment and the well-being of everyone.

That is why in 2021, with our transformation to a Benefit Company, we wanted to officialize the company's role in promoting the circularity of the material by including it in our articles of association.

Piomboleghe is also:
> 47 employees hailing from all over the world
> Production plant and offices in Brugherio (MB), Italy
> A facility area of more than 19,000 m²
> 2 rotary kilns of about 8,000 liters each

Name: Applied Fracture Mechanics
Description:
AFM is a global leader in the fields of fracture mechanics and accelerated corrosion testing. Our founders conceived and developed the Rising Step Load method which is now widely used for measuring hydrogen embrittlement, especially in the aerospace industry. The same methodology is now being applied to evaluate stress corrosion, sour stress corrosion, corrosion fatigue, and other environmental cracking mechanisms. 

Historically, these environmental cracking tests have been performed by applying a specific load (for example 75% of maximum load) and holding for an extended period of time to see if cracking occurs. The end result is a pass/fail data point that may take weeks or months. 

In comparison, rapid testing with the step loading method can be completed in a matter of hours and provides a highly reproducible quantitative measurement. This data can then be used for R&D, batch-by-batch testing, engineering calculations and design, and failure analysis.

Kurulduğumuz günden bu yana müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımızla, hem yurt içi hem de yurt dışındaki iş ortaklarımıza yüksek standartlarda ürünler sunmayı hedefliyoruz. Geniş ürün portföyümüz, inşaat projelerinden sanayi uygulamalarına kadar birçok farklı alanda kullanılan çelik çözümlerden oluşmaktadır.

Ürün yelpazemizde T Profiller, Asansör Kılavuz Rayları, Lama Demirler, Kare Demirler, Eşkenar Köşebentler, Altıköşe Demirler, NPU Profiller ve NPI Profiller yer almaktadır. Her bir ürünümüz, dayanıklılığı, uzun ömürlü yapısı ve uluslararası standartlara uygunluğu ile öne çıkmaktadır. Özellikle asansör kılavuz raylarında sunduğumuz çözümler, yüksek güvenlik gerektiren projelerde tercih edilmekte; NPU ve NPI profiller ise endüstriyel yapılardan altyapı projelerine kadar geniş bir kullanım alanı bulmaktadır.

Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına en uygun ürünleri doğru zamanda, doğru fiyatla ve güvenilir bir lojistik ağıyla ulaştırmak, işimizin merkezinde yer alır. Zey Demir olarak sadece ürün satışı değil, aynı zamanda uzun vadeli iş ortaklıkları kurmayı hedefliyoruz. İhracata yönelik güçlü altyapımız sayesinde dünya genelinde farklı pazarlara hizmet veriyor, işbirliği yaptığımız kurumlara rekabet avantajı sağlıyoruz.

Metal sektöründeki deneyimimiz, kaliteli üretim anlayışımız ve müşteri memnuniyetine verdiğimiz önem, bizi sektörde ön plana çıkarıyor. LinkedIn üzerinden sektör profesyonelleriyle bağlantı kurarak yeni fırsatları değerlendirmekten memnuniyet duyarız.

Siz de projelerinizde güvenilir, kaliteli ve sürdürülebilir çelik çözümleri arıyorsanız, Zey Demir doğru adresinizdir. Daha fazla bilgi almak ve işbirliği fırsatlarını değerlendirmek için bizimle iletişime geçebilirsiniz.

Thessco is part of the Galliani Industrie group, a European leader in the production of silver, copper, and aluminum alloys, as well as the British group SolPro. Our sales and logistics offices are located in Saint-Thibault-des-Vignes, France, strategically positioned to ensure service and accessibility for our European customers. Our manufacturing of precious metal alloys takes place at our site in Italy.

With our historical experience and modern production control methods, we ensure that all of our products meet the stringent quality standards required by our most demanding customers.

We are ISO 9001 certified and have received the ECOVADIS Bronze Medal.

Lauréat du Défi Transfert Robotique – France 2030, le projet vise à lever les verrous technologiques qui limitent aujourd’hui l’automatisation de ces opérations, encore largement manuelles, complexes et exigeantes en précision.

𝗟𝗲𝘀 𝗮𝗺𝗯𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗱𝘂 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝘁

 Automatiser les phases d’assemblage préalable à la soudure
 Garantir un positionnement précis et fiable de pièces de grandes dimensions
 Développer des solutions robotiques flexibles, adaptées aux contraintes industrielles réelles
 Faciliter le transfert des innovations vers l’outil de production

𝗨𝗻 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝘁 𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗮𝗯𝗼𝗿𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗳
AMATSUMARA s’appuie sur un consortium réunissant industriels, centres de recherche et experts en robotique et en intégration, afin de croiser les compétences et d’accélérer l’industrialisation des solutions développées.

AMATSUMARA s’inscrit pleinement dans la dynamique de l’industrie du futur, au service de la performance industrielle, de la compétitivité et de la souveraineté technologique.
