Name: BALAJI NIRYAAT (P) LTD.
Description:
Balaji Niryaat Pvt. Ltd. is one of Eastern India’s fastest-growing stainless steel manufacturers, distributors, and interior solution providers. Headquartered in Kolkata with a state-of-the-art warehouse and fabrication unit in Howrah, the company brings together manufacturing excellence, advanced processing, and innovative design to serve industries across construction, infrastructure, hospitality, and residential projects.

From high-grade stainless steel coils, sheets, pipes, fittings, and chequered plates to PVD-coated decorative materials and custom fabrications, Balaji Niryaat has established itself as a trusted name in the industry. The company also delivers turnkey stainless steel kitchen solutions including counters, hoods, storage systems, and complete industrial kitchen setups. In addition, its growing expertise in interior décor solutions allows it to offer railings, claddings, partitions, gates, and a wide range of bespoke PVD-coated designs tailored to both functional and aesthetic requirements.

The journey of Balaji Niryaat began with industrial supplies and has transformed into a one-stop destination for stainless steel and décor solutions. Each day, our team, comprising of individuals as dedicated as they are dynamic, meticulously crafts this vision into reality. Our ethos is steeped in the principles of industriousness, creativity, and a relentless pursuit of progress. In our quest to surpass conventional expectations, we relentlessly push the boundaries of what is deemed feasible within metal manufacturing.

The distinguishing hallmark of Rock MFG lies in our unyielding drive for innovation within the metals industry.  In today’s fast paced commercial world we are looking for more than just a material supplier. You want a supply partner to understand and share your goals and business strategies, who can offer a range of bespoke solutions to meet the needs of whatever specific business sector you are in!

Name: Tecnoaço l Fundição de Aço
Description:
Somos uma empresa comprometida com a excelência e a inovação no mercado de aços e ligas especiais. Localizada no coração do Parque Industrial do distrito de Caravaggio, em Nova Veneza/SC, nossa trajetória é impulsionada pela paixão em dar continuidade a uma história de sucesso iniciada em 2020.

Com uma unidade dedicada à fundição de metais não ferrosos e mais de duas décadas de experiência na fabricação de alumínio fundido e bronze, ampliamos significativamente nossas fronteiras. Em apenas quatro anos, conquistamos a confiança de clientes em diversos estados do Brasil e no Mercosul, o que motivou a expansão de nossa infraestrutura para uma área construída de 5 mil m², em um terreno de 12 mil m².

Atualmente, contamos com uma equipe de 50 colaboradores altamente capacitados, que contribuem diariamente para o fortalecimento e a continuidade da nossa história de sucesso.

Trabalhamos com uma ampla gama de itens e ligas ferrosas e não ferrosas, em diversas formas geométricas, com destaque para aplicações que exigem alta resistência e desempenho em temperaturas elevadas. Nossa capacidade de produção abrange desde pequenas peças de 0,5 kg até componentes robustos de até 1.200 kg, posicionando-nos como uma empresa versátil e diferenciada no setor. Além disso, desenvolvemos ligas personalizadas em parceria com nossos clientes, adequando-nos às especificidades de cada aplicação.

Na TecnoAço, acreditamos que cada cliente é único. Por isso, dedicamo-nos a entender profundamente suas necessidades e a otimizar nossa capacidade produtiva para oferecer soluções eficazes e personalizadas.

Nossos valores – qualidade, integridade, responsabilidade, respeito, foco no cliente e desenvolvimento de pessoas – norteiam todas as nossas ações. Nossa missão é clara: fornecer soluções de fundição em aço com alto padrão de qualidade, confiabilidade e personalização, superando as expectativas de nossos clientes.

Name: NEOSTEEL MÜHENDİSLİK ENERJİ İNŞAAT İMALAT SANAYİ VE TİCARET  ANONİM ŞİRKETİ

Name: Niles International
Description:
Niles International is The Expanded Metal Companies and The Advanced Composites Group, manufacturers and distributors of expanded metals, plastics, polymers, security products, Nano-based custom blended resins, and heating solutions.

All Niles International business groups operate under ISO 9001 quality standards and our Aerospace division is further certified to AS9100. All groups are committed to continuous improvement in processes and product to efficiently deliver the best world-class solutions that improve our customers business.

The Expanded Metal Companies are a portfolio of businesses that manufacture the most complete selection of product offerings for expanded metal. Operating under three divisions: Industrial, Security, and Precision, we push the levels of imagination to show what we can achieve together with expanded metal.

The constant reinforcement of this reality forms the standards for our work and the path from the concept to finished product. Every challenge is a further incentive for us to efficiently utilize our knowledge and technical skills in the wide range of markets we serve.

Our mission is to be the worlds leading source for expanded metal production, development and information. We will be driven by creative innovation and working together with you our customers to develop the endless possibilities of our products.

The Expanded Metals Companies are an experience and products, prepare for the experience of expanded metals perfected.

The Advanced Composites Group is a joint venture between Niles International and Boyce Components. We develop a suite of technologies using Nano-enhanced resins, films, and non-woven fabrics for integration into composite materials. Specifically, our process integrates Expanded Copper Foils (ECF) as electrodes and a proprietary dispersion of Carbon Nano Fibers (CNF) or Carbon Nano Tubes (CNT) with commercially available resins to make heaters, heated surfaces, tooling, and composite structures.

Entregamos soluções que combinam engenharia, design, tecnologia e escala industrial para transformar espaços, fortalecer marcas e criar experiências urbanas e comerciais de alto impacto.
Desenvolvemos estruturas inteligentes — de abrigos de ônibus, convencionais, tecnológicos e Smart City, a totens, fachadas, retail media e mobiliário institucional — sempre alinhadas às especificações técnicas e aos prazos dos nossos clientes, com alto padrão de qualidade em cada detalhe.

Se você pode imaginar, nós podemos construir.

Convi — Onde suas ideias acontecem.

A rápida consolidação de seus serviços logo proporcionou a migração de suas atividades para o mercado doméstico nacional, passando a fabricar e operar IBCs e outros modelos de tanques portáteis. Desde então a Intertank dedica-se a desenvolver novos produtos e serviços visando atender às necessidades de expansão e diversificação de seus clientes.

Description:
STEEL Company doo was founded at the end of 2017 with the aim of meeting the needs of machining products that are placed on the market of the European Union and beyond.

STEEL Company doo is a company with equipment and experienced staff capable of a large number of types of machining of different materials (primarily metal and plastic), with a clear vision of the founder to achieve the quality of the entire service, process and end product, while meeting the strict requirements of an increasing number of clients as in country, as well as abroad.

The main activity of our company is metal machining at several processing centers, the number of which is constantly increasing as our company develops. They are used in gas industry (especially for the construction of transfer and distribution pipelines), district heating sector, water and sewages (for sewage, drinking water and soline water trans), engineering and construction industry.

Description:
Filiales d’un groupe industriel américain, nos usines de Douai et Châtenois-Les-Forges sont de véritables usines à taille humaine, auxquelles nos salariés sont fidèles.

L'usine de Douai est spécialisée dans la production de barres stabilisatrices et fournit les principaux constructeurs de camions européens. Les barres stabilisatrices, éléments de suspension du camion, sont des produits en acier, dont le rôle est d’améliorer la stabilité des camions dans les virages et de solidariser les roues installées sur un même essieu.

L'usine de Châtenois-Les-Forges est spécialisée dans la production de ressorts à lames et de bras de suspension et fournit les principaux constructeurs de camions en Europe. 

Entreprises du secteur de la Métallurgie, nos usines Hendrickson proposent de nombreux avantages à ses salariés, qu’il s’agisse d’avantages sociaux (transport, mutuelle, CSE…) ou de flexibilité du travail (horaires variables, télétravail notamment), afin d’assurer un véritable équilibre vie personnelle – vie professionnelle.

Tamminiitty on monipuolinen metalliteollisuuden asiantuntijayritys Satakunnassa.

Vahvuutemme on kokonaisvaltainen palvelu, joka takaa kattavan ratkaisun esivalmistuksesta koneistukseen ja aina pintakäsittelyyn saakka. Erikoisosaamistamme ovat laserteknologia, särmäys, koneistus, hitsaus sekä muut esikäsittelypalvelut. Olemme asiakkaamme sopimusvalmistaja ja vakaa kumppani metalliteollisuuden alihankintaketjussa. Sopimusasiakkaillemme tarjoamme myös varastointipalvelua, jolloin sarjatuotteita on aina saatavilla.

Kokonaisvaltainen palvelukokemus, jossa ystävällisyys ja asiantuntijuus paiskaavat kättä on meille kunnia-asia. Osaava henkilökunta onkin meidän suurin pääomamme ja avain laadukkaaseen työnjälkeen ja tuotantovarmuuteen. 

Seuraamme laatua jatkuvasti ja toimimme sertifioidun ISO:9001-2015 -laatujärjestelmän mukaan. Investoimme myös vuosittain uusiin ja moderneihin tuotantolaitteisiin ja tehdastiloihin.

Name: JISCO·JUDE
Description:
Jiuquan Iron & Steel Group Limited Company (hereinafter JISCO), founded in 1958, has appeared as the earliest and largest diversified modern enterprise in northwest China, which produces both ferrous and non-ferrous metals. With 63 years of construction and development, JISCO has begun to take shape a new pattern with six synergetically developing industries, namely steel, non-ferrous metals, electric energy, equipment manufacturing, productive service, and modern agriculture.
The steel industry boasts an annual production capacity of 11.05 million tons of crude steel (including 1.2 million tons of stainless steel). The non-ferrous industry possesses a production capacity of 1.7 million tons of electrolytic aluminum, 600,000 tons of aluminum sheet and strip casting, and rolling material annually, which has emerged as the sixth-largest domestic aluminum enterprise. The electric energy industry has formed a total installed power capacity of 3,446 MW of installed thermal power capacity. The enterprise has ranked 209th among the top 500 Chinese enterprises and 86th among the top 500 Chinese manufacturing enterprises. By the end of 2020, the total assets of JISCO amount to 20 billion dollars.
Jude Group was established in October 2007 as JISCO international sales company with over 40,000 m²of warehousing space. In March 2020, Jude Group started JISCO's stainless steel, carbon steel (zinc-aluminum-magnesium coated steel), and aluminum export business to serve more customers worldwide. To match customer needs more precisely, Jude Group is committed to providing total solutions for steel products, steel processing, logistics, and technical services to meet customers’ needs most efficiently and cost-effectively.

We are centrally located between Calgary and Vancouver and just a few hours more to Edmonton, giving us excellent access to both the Canadian and US markets.

We specialize in high-end, tight tolerance machined products. We can also squeeze every last bit of efficiency out of your production parts ensuring quality and cost-effectiveness.

 Notre savoir-faire :

 Expertise locale avec des standards de qualité internationale

Description: STERINOKS, which produces solutions for sterile inox systems, especially for pharmaceutical, food and chemical companies; manufacturing of all sterile area equipment from scratch, including manufacturing tanks, sterilization tanks, IBCs, mixers and settling tanks, 316 sieves, sampling containers, transport buckets and drum containers, mirror polishing processes including reactor tanks and manufacturing of certified stainless equipment, panel protective wall stainless barriers, stainless sealed screen panels, all installation welding assembly and installation services including sterile areas with our experienced teams, we work devotedly for health, grow and progress with the aim of being a pioneer in the sector.

Name: BNALP B.V.
Description:
BNALP BV is een jong dynamisch bedrijf ontstaan uit de groeiende behoefte vanuit klanten naar kosten gunstigere oplossingen voor de productie van (half) fabricaten en hoogwaardige kwaliteit van onderdelen voor een goede kwaliteit / prijs verhouding. Drie ondernemers met geruime ervaring op het gebied van producten in de zware metaalindustrie en zwaar belaste machineonderdelen, zijn samen het bedrijf BNALP BV gestart met de visie om klanten te voorzien van kosten gunstige productie oplossingen met een hoogwaardige kwaliteit. BNALP BV heeft ruim 25 jaar ervaring in internationale inkoop en verkoop van machineonderdelen en productie van zware machinebouw voor de off-shore industrie.

BNALP BV is a young, dynamic company that arose from the growing need from customers for cost-effective solutions for the production of (semi) finished products and high-quality parts for a good quality/price ratio. Three entrepreneurs with extensive experience in the field of products in the heavy metal industry and heavily loaded machine parts, together started the company BNALP BV with the vision to provide customers with cost-effective production solutions with high quality. BNALP BV has over 25 years of experience in the international purchase and sale of machine parts and the production of heavy machinery for the offshore industry.

Name: Aços Continente Indústria e Comércio
Description:
Fundada em 1994, a Aços Continente é uma empresa líder no fornecimento de soluções em aço, com uma trajetória marcada por inovação, qualidade e compromisso com a excelência. Com sua matriz localizada em Curitiba, PR, e uma filial estratégica em Guarulhos, SP, estamos posicionados de maneira a atender eficientemente nossos clientes em todo o território nacional.
Nosso portfólio de produtos inclui uma ampla variedade de itens, como perfis estruturais, cantoneiras, barras e tubos, todos desenvolvidos para atender às necessidades específicas de diferentes setores da indústria. Operamos em uma área de 25.000m², equipada com tecnologia de ponta, preparada para atender as demandas dos mais diversos segmentos.
A Aços Continente orgulha-se de trabalhar com materiais que possuem certificações rigorosas, atendendo a todas as normas nacionais e internacionais. Nossa dedicação à qualidade e à conformidade com os padrões de segurança e desempenho reflete nosso compromisso em proporcionar soluções confiáveis e duradouras para nossos clientes.

Name: Riverside Foundry Inc.
Description:
Riverside Foundry Inc. is a leading non-ferrous sand-casting foundry located in New Hamburg, Ontario, known for its commitment to exceptional craftsmanship and superior metallurgical quality. Our state-of-the-art facility spans 77,000 square feet and is fully equipped with computer-controlled systems designed to manage large production runs. This advanced infrastructure allows us to maintain unmatched control and quality for medium to large-scale casting projects across a wide range of alloys.

With over five decades of expertise, Riverside Foundry Inc. delivers high-quality non-ferrous castings while offering comprehensive technical services. Our experienced team is dedicated to exceeding customer expectations, providing personalized guidance to optimize product quality with an unwavering focus on attention to detail. Riverside is also a member of the Foundrion Group, a group of eleven sandcasting foundry businesses in North America committed to growth and excellence.

Description: By raising the standards of its products and services, it achieved ISO9001:2015 certification, further strengthening the existing trust of the regions. TEKNİK MAKİNA, aiming to increase annual production volumes through short- and long-term development plans, continues to maintain its upward trend with the same enthusiasm and enthusiasm of its early days, further solidifying its place in global and Turkish markets, and contributing to national economies.

Name: ArcelorMittal Tubular Products North America
Description: Ensuring steel continues to be the world’s most used and versatile material is what drives us every day. For that to remain the case steel must decarbonise. We are embracing this with energy and determination, excited to have the opportunity to make a very significant contribution to reducing global emissions. Harnessing our technical capabilities with an innovative mindset and a passion to make a positive difference for people and planet, we intend to lead the decarbonisation of our industry.

Our operations are designed to align with global environmental standards, ensuring that our processes help conserve natural resources, reduce environmental impact, and promote sustainability across all levels of our business.
We strive to continuously innovate and expand, not just within the lead recycling industry, but also into broader resource recovery and sustainability efforts in the future. With the backing of Sharaf Group, we are well-positioned to make a meaningful impact in the world of recycling and environmental stewardship.

Name: Safework Engenharia
Description:
Somos uma empresa dedicada à gestão de NR-12, especializada em oferecer soluções abrangentes para garantir a conformidade e a segurança nos ambientes de trabalho. Nosso foco está em implementar e orientar em todas as etapas do processo, desde a Apreciação de Risco até a execução de Projetos Conceituais e Treinamentos em máquinas e equipamentos em geral. 
Nosso compromisso é fornecer serviços de excelência que atendam às necessidades específicas de cada cliente. Por meio de uma abordagem consultiva e personalizada, trabalhamos lado a lado com as organizações para identificar e mitigar riscos, garantindo ambientes de trabalho seguros e em conformidade com as regulamentações vigentes.
Seja qual for o setor ou a complexidade dos desafios enfrentados, estamos aqui para fornecer soluções sob medida que impulsionem o sucesso e promovam um ambiente de trabalho seguro e produtivo. Entre em contato conosco hoje mesmo para saber mais sobre como podemos ajudar sua empresa a cumprir com eficácia os requisitos da NR-12 e promover uma cultura de segurança duradoura.

Name: INBRAELL - INDUSTRIA BRASILEIRA DE ELETROCALHAS LTDA
Description:
Inovação, sustentabilidade e segurança em soluções metálicas para a construção civil.

Na Inbraell, há mais de 23 anos, desenvolvemos e entregamos soluções inteligentes e eficientes em eletrocalhas, perfilados, perfis galvanizados, linhas de sustentação para cabos e estruturas metálicas leves, como drywall e steel frame. Atendemos todo o Brasil com produtos que aliam qualidade técnica, versatilidade, segurança e compromisso ambiental.

Nosso foco é ser parceira estratégica de engenheiros, arquitetos, especificadores e empresas da construção civil que buscam agilidade, praticidade e alto desempenho em seus projetos.

Nossos diferenciais:

Portfólio técnico completo:
Eletrocalhas, perfilados, drywall, steel frame, suportes, perfis de aço galvanizado, acessórios e sistemas de sustentação de cabos.

Inovação na construção a seco:
Apoiamos a industrialização e racionalização da construção civil com soluções para obras mais limpas, rápidas e sustentáveis.

Sustentabilidade como pilar:
Prezamos  a redução de emissões de carbono, o uso responsável de recursos e  o compromisso com o ESG.

Atendimento especializado B2B:
Equipe comercial técnica e preparada para atender engenheiros, construtoras e compradores com agilidade e precisão.

Produção nacional e distribuição eficiente:
Atendemos com excelência em todo o território nacional, com prazos competitivos e estoque estratégico.

Vamos construir o futuro juntos?

Se você é engenheiro, arquiteto, comprador ou profissional da construção civil que busca eficiência técnica, qualidade e responsabilidade socioambiental, a Inbraell é sua parceira ideal.

  Fale com nosso time e conheça o catálogo completo de soluções.

  https://inbraell.com.br/

این شرکت در راستای اهداف اسلامی، انسانی و ملی سهامدارن، خود را متعهد میداند که با نگاهی به آینده در حوزه صنعت و اقتصاد، نسبت به آبادانی منطقه و کشور اقدام نموده و در راستای تحقق رویای " ایران آباد " تلاش کند؛ که در این مسیر خود را متعهد به رعایت موارد زیر میداند:
About Paya Foolad Kavir Yazd• ایجاد فضایی ایمن از نظر خطرات حرفهای، محیطی و صنعتی

• تعهد در قبال جوانان مناطق محروم کشور در زمینه آموزش علمی و فنی و جذب آنها در حوزه صنعت معدن
• متعهد در قبال توسعه و پیشرفت مناطق ضعیف کشور با مشارکت مالی و فکری و مدیریتی
• رقابت سالم با شرکتهای مشابه با تحقق اصل بهبود مستمر کیفیت محصول
• مشتریمداری و تعامل بهینه با ایشان
• گسترش حلقهی ذینفعان شرکت در حوزههای اجتماعی، فرهنگی و اقتصادی

Name: MG Centro de Serviços.
Description:
Após décadas de atuação no mercado de transformação de resíduos, o Grupo MG funda em 11/05/2012, a empresa MG Centro de Serviços , com o propósito de suprir as crescentes demandas do setor metalúrgico. Focada na distribuição de matéria-prima e na prestação de serviços especializados de corte em aço, a MG Centro se consolidou como um parceiro estratégico para a indústria.

Nosso parque fabril, estrategicamente localizado em São Bernardo do Campo, se estende por uma área de 7.500 metros quadrados, com fácil acesso às rodovias Anchieta, Imigrantes e ao Rodoanel (Trecho Sul). Essa localização privilegiada nos permite oferecer agilidade e eficiência logística, atendendo com rapidez as necessidades dos nossos clientes.

Para garantir um diferencial competitivo, a MG Centro de Serviços investiu fortemente em tecnologia de ponta. Nossas máquinas de alta precisão, aliadas a um sistema de produção inovador e uma equipe técnica altamente qualificada, asseguram a excelência na comercialização e no corte de aços planos. Combinamos agilidade, flexibilidade e qualidade em cada projeto, sempre buscando superar as expectativas de nossos parceiros.

The company was established in 1994 and is based in Richard’s Bay, South Africa. It has built a reputation for its process knowledge and expertise through our team of metallurgists, chemical engineers and global technology partners.

We work with a dedicated focus to understand our customer's process needs and offer appropriate solutions.

We are 51% Black Owned.

Industries we engage with include:

Heavy Mineral Sands

Coal and Anthracite

Other Minerals, Paper, Food and Quarries

Primary and Secondary Aluminium

Foundries

OUR KEY ACTIVITIES

Process equipment supply through our global partners

Consulting, design, technical support and troubleshooting

Own and operate mobile and fixed crushing, screening, blending and bagging operations

Name: Aurubis Berango
Description:
Aurubis Berango es parte del Grupo Aurubis, un proveedor líder a nivel internacional de metales no ferrosos y el mayor reciclador de cobre del mundo. Aurubis produce anualmente más de 1 millón de toneladas de cátodos de cobre, y un número de otros metales también, incluyendo metales nobles, selenio, plomo, níquel, estaño y zinc.

Somos una compañía de reciclaje que valoriza materiales complejos no férricos devolviendo los metales a la cadena de valor. Nos preocupamos del futuro y de nuestro planeta. Combinamos nuestra tecnología y “know-how” para minimizar el impacto de nuestras actividades sobre el medio ambiente, el clima y las personas, para preservar nuestros recursos naturales y construir un brillante futuro para el día de mañana.

Aurubis Berango se centra exclusivamente en materiales de reciclaje complejos y de baja calidad para producir cobre negro, soldadura y Elmix. La empresa se fundó como Elmet S.L.U. en 1991 siendo pionera en el ámbito del reciclaje y actualmente un ejemplo en materia de sostenibilidad en País Vasco.

Description:
Henan Yongsheng Aluminum Co., Ltd. is located in the industrial cluster of Gongyi City, Henan Province. Yongsheng is an aluminum sheet/coil/foil/strip factory with 24 years of experience. Our factory focuses on the production and development of aluminum products such as aluminum sheet/coil, aluminum foil, aluminum strip, color-coated aluminum sheet/coil, aluminum circle, embossed aluminum, aluminum checker plate, mirror aluminum plate, anti-skid aluminum plate and so on. The factory covers an area of 10,000 square meters and has 276 employees.
All our products are independently produced to provide you with excellent service, fast delivery, high quality assurance, factory prices and professional customer service staff. You are welcome to visit the factory and look forward to establishing a long-term good business relationship with you.

Name: LASERE SA
Description:
Le groupe Lasere, spécialiste de la découpe laser industrielle, de la découpe au jet d’eau et du pliage depuis plus de 30 ans, vous garantit un service de qualité et des délais de production rapides. Les équipements de pointe permettent de répondre avec précision à tous vos besoins, de la pièce unique aux grandes séries.

Composé de quatre entités réparties en Belgique (Namur et Péruwelz), au Luxembourg (Ehlerange) et dans le sud-ouest de la France (Pons), le groupe Lasere bénéficie d’une implantation stratégique.

Certifié EN 1090, Lasere assure la conformité et la traçabilité des pièces usinées, une exigence essentielle pour les secteurs de la construction et de l’industrie.

Doté d’un parc machines à la pointe de la technologie, Lasere est capable de traiter une large variété de matériaux avec une précision optimale : acier jusqu’à 25 mm, inox jusqu’à 20 mm, aluminium et bien d’autres, y compris des matériaux épais jusqu’à 130 mm grâce à la découpe par jet d’eau.

Au-delà de la technologie, l’engagement envers la satisfaction de nos clients reste notre priorité. Nous mettons un point d’honneur à être réactifs et à adapter notre savoir-faire aux besoins spécifiques de chaque projet, garantissant ainsi une qualité de service qui fait notre réputation.

Name: Isfahan Casting Industries_ICI Co.
Description: Isfahan Casting Industries (ICI) Company is a leading company for the production of sophisticated steel castings with a wide range of alloys. We have been in the forefront of continuing growth of casting technology in Iran for over 40 years. Our company holds ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015, OHSAS 18001:2007 certified by SGS, which assures consistency of quality of our products while maintaining standards in the environment and workplace health and safety. ICI produces more than 6000 ton/year of various casting alloys. Our company can facilitate casting parts weighting between 5 to 20,000 Kg (net casting weight).ICI is able manufacturing all steel grades that confirm to ASTM/AISI, GOST, ISO, DIN, B.S, JIS and any other international/national standards. Production for Mining, Pelletizing, Railway and Cement Industries not only requires a state-of the-art manufacturing facility and experienced staff, but more importantly, it demands direct engagement with the costumer’s process. This allows producing parts, which meet standards and unique requirement of the costumer’s process. This is the approach in ICI, which resulted in the selection of our company as one of the best manufacturing of casting parts for five consecutive years from 2009 by Iranian Trade, Mining and Industrial Ministry. Furthermore, ICI was awarded the best Iranian R&D center title in 2014 by the same authority.

Name: PT Ditraco Bangun Sarana Internasional
Description:
PT Ditraco Bangun Sarana Internasional (DBSI) is an LLC that specializes in brass and bronze processing using CNC and forging machines. We produce custom industrial parts for both local and international clients ranging from aeroplane components to highly specialised valves for over 23 years. Additionally, our company extensively uses pyrometallurgical units to produce high purity ingots by extracting brass and bronze from locally-sourced scrap metal.

Our units include, but not limited to, electric arc furnaces, CNC lathe machines, CNC mill machines, forging machines, centrifugal casting machines, salt spray machines, sand blasting machines and vacuum pyrolysis furnaces. We also employ the use of various quality control systems such as the spectrometery machine, video measuring system machine, univestal testing machine, hardness tester machine, and surface roughness tester machine. These equipment allows us to manufacture complex orders with exceptional precision. Furthermore, our technical expertise in 3D drawings using AutoCAD is useful in bridging accuracy between the final product and the client's mechanical drawing.

PT Ditraco Bangun Sarana Internasional has manufacturing plants in Bekasi and Kedep.

Founded in 2004, Kentucky Smelting Technology, Inc. supplies aluminum to manufacturers that produce aluminum wheels for the automotive industry.  Operating in Paris, KY, our facility runs 24/7, 350 days a year and employs approximately 60 people.

The company prides itself on bringing a spirit of innovation to a process and service that can be very similar from company to company. For example, we use 70-75% recycled aluminum in our smelting process.

Kentucky Smelting Technology, Inc. also has a passionate focus on safety. The creation, handling, and transportation of molten aluminum comes with inherent dangers, but our employees describe their work as “the safest, most dangerous job you can have.”  Automation has been incorporated where possible, reducing human exposure and potential contact. We always put our employee’s safety first and foremost.

Name: Duranium (YC S25)
Description: For the U.S. to regain critical metal independence, it must reshore production, and do so at globally competitive prices. Name: Mures Magnesium Srl
Description:
Mures Magnesium (MMg) is developing a mineral reprocessing project in Mures county Romania to produce magnesium (Mg) metal - a EU Critical Raw Material, chrome oxide green (Cr2O3) and calcium chloride (CaCl2) by extraction these metals from a stored mineral waste.  The new processing facility to be built in 2025-2027 will use the well-known and proven low-carbon footprint MgCl2 process and will be the first magnesium metal produced in the EU for over 20 years.  This will give Europe a much-needed security supply of Mg metal which is currently 100% imported from China.  The project will require no mining as the feedstock is an above ground stored waste to be processed on the future processing facility to be built directly beside the waste storage facility so requires no feedstock transportation and further adds to the low carbon footprint.   Mg metal is a strategic EU metal having applications in the automotive, aviation and military industries and the project fits the EU Commission's strategic objectives to ensure reduced dependence on non-EU sources of CRM's with the aim of 40% of processing within the EU (EU CRM Act).   MMg by using a mineral waste will assure circa 15% of the EU demand for Mg metal and in addition produce a chrome product also in high demand within the EU, Japan and the US.  The principles followed by MMg mean that it feeds into the EU circular economy philosophy being sustainable by secondary resourcing and will use renewable energy from the adjoining 53 MW solar park development.   As the MMg process technology uses CO2 as a reagent in its process wherever produced our process captures CO2 for reuse in the technological process.
MMg will provide long term employment for 270 people from an area where unemployment is high due to the reduction of industrial activity over the past years.  MMg currently runs an EIT Raw Materials co-funded project (EU Magnesium - project Nr 21105) for upscaling its process to BAT.

Name: Atacama Copper Foils S.p.A.
Description:
Pondremos a Chile en centro de la transición enérgica fabricando en Chile un insumo crítico para baterías y equipos de alta tecnología.
Nuestra tecnología puede triplicar el precio del cobre electrolítico produciendo en Chile copper foil (lámina de espesor micrónico). Produciremos un insumo crítico para la electrónica avanzada y para la descarbonización, usado en circuitos impresos y baterías
El nuevo método permite producir desde descartes de electro obtención y no desde soluciones de cátodos de cobre disueltos. Ventajas: 
•  Menor costo de producción del foil, 25% respecto del método actual, se elimina un proceso de electro obtención y la energía requerida, mayor eficiencia.
•  Menor huella de carbono y costo de proceso marginal vs producción mina.
•  Recuperación de  Cu desde pasivos ambientales, mayor eficacia.
•  Mínimo impacto sobre las operaciones existentes que no se tocan, es una adición externa, pero retorna al proceso agua y ácido.
Produciremos copper foil directamente desde descartes de plantas de SX-EW y electro refinación. Estas "soluciones no convencionales", son una fuente de cobre con costos marginales de explotación, pero contienen impurezas complejas para la producción tradicional.
Con esto: las mineras aumentarían su valor y márgenes, con una "nueva fuente de cobre", se habilitan menores leyes de corte, aumenta la oferta mundial de copper foil, se aprovecha la capacidad de hidrometalurgia no utilizada, se recupera puestos de trabajo y se reduce huella de carbono al eliminar una etapa del proceso actual del foil.
El equipo está formado por una sociedad de innovadores que combina competencia en ciencia y tecnología (CyT) con experiencia real en emprendimiento en la minería. Atacama Copper Foils (ACF) es un caso inédito en Chile, mezcla innovación local basada en CyT, emprendimiento empresarial, capacidad manufacturera (la mayor parte de los componentes son manufactura local), liderazgo femenino en STEM y asociación empresa academia.

Contando com mais de três décadas de experiência acumulada pelos seus sócios na área de conformação mecânica, a Forjas Caxiense dispõe de uma equipe altamente qualificada em áreas-chave como projeto, desenvolvimento e fabricação de forjados, moldes e matrizes, além de especialistas em estudos de redução de custos e engenharia reversa.

Name: PETROINOX PIPE & TUBES PVT LTD
Description:
Petroinox Pipes & Tubes Pvt. Ltd is manufacturer of superior quality Stainless Steel, Duplex Steel, Nickel Base Alloys Seamless and Welded Tubes, Pipes & U-Tubes. The company is equipped with modern production facility with in-house bright-annealing and in-built capability of manufacturing the products matching international standards. 
“PETROINOX” literally means to give someone power, status, or recognition and to provide harmony/consistency. 
At Petroinox Pipes & Tubes Pvt. Ltd, we indulge into creating “Customized Tubing Solutions” which provides the consistency in your production process through our quality tubing solutions. 
  
The Pipes, Tubes & U-Tubes manufactured by us are completely custom-built for industries confirming to various international standards like ASTM A-.106, A-179, A-192, A-210, A-213, A-53, A-333, A-334, A-335, BS 3059, BS 3602, BS 6323, DIN 2391, DIN 17175, EN 10305 etc. 
Size of the Pipes, Tubes & U-Tubes range from 6mm OD to 101.6 mm OD in a wall thickness range of 1.00mm to 7.00mm and in the length up to 26 Mtr. 

The production set-up has in-built facilities for U-Bending, Stress Relieving, DP testing, Pilgering, Drawing, Annealing, Pickling, Finishing and Eddy Current Testing of Pipes, Tubes & U-Tubes. All our Pipes, Tubes & U-Tubes are Hydraulically tested at our plant. The raw material undergoes a stringent inspection to ensure best quality output.

To know more about the product ranges, properties of product and to pick the most suitable product for your application, connect with us for further discussion. 

We assure you the best quality Pipes, Tubes & U-Tubes at competitive rates with on-time delivery (OTD).

Name: Metallouça Esmaltados
Description:
A Metallouça foi fundada em 1970 no Distrito Industrial da cidade de Campina Grande no Estado da Paraíba, com o objetivo de desenvolver uma grande variedade de produtos esmaltados, ou seja, desde peças técnicas para fogões, passando por produtos do segmento da construção civil, produtos do segmento médico-laboratorial e por fim produtos de utilidades domésticas. Com o passar dos anos a empresa sentiu a necessidade de manter o foco em um segmento específico.

A partir deste momento a empresa especializou-se em utilidades domésticas com ênfase na qualidade e beleza de seus produtos, estando sempre atualizada com os formadores de opinião da moda internacional.

A empresa está instalada em sua sede própria de aproximadamente 77.000 metros quadrados, sendo 15.000 metros quadrados de área construída, entre prédios para administração e para benefícios dos colaboradores, prédios para as plantas industriais e prédios para matérias primas, produtos semi-acabados e produtos acabados.

Ao longo dos anos a empresa exportou para vários países e consolidou-se como um dos principais provedores do mercado brasileiro dentro de seu segmento.

A Metallouça apresenta seu novo catálogo de produtos em consonância com a atualidade do design e das cores, com o objetivo de agregar valor aos nossos clientes bem como qualidade, beleza, saúde e satisfação para os consumidores.

Description:
شرکت صنعتی معدنی پایا فولاد کویر یزد با سرمایهگذاری بخش خصوصی و رویکرد اشتغالزائی نیروهای بومی و همچنین رونق اقتصادی طریق الرضا، اقدام به احداث و راهاندازی مجتمع کارخانجات سنگشکن (با ظرفیت چهار میلیون تن در سال) و فرآوری کنسانتره سنگ آهن (با ظرفیت یک میلیون تن در سال) و طرح توسعه خط تولید کنسانتره سنگشکن به همراه زیر ساختها، تأسیسات و ساختمانهای جنبی مربوطه در زمینی به مساحت شصت هکتار، همجوار معادن بزرگ کشور همچون چادرملو، چغارت و چاهگز نموده که در این فاز بیش از سیصد نفر به صورت مستقیم و دو هزار نفر مشغول به کار شدهاند.
در راستای برنامههای توسعه، این شرکت در تلاش است به کمک بومیسازی به اهداف والاتر اعم از احداث کارخانجات مشابه دیگر، گندلهسازی، احیاء، ذوب، نورد و تولید مقاطع فولادی از بدو استخراج تا ارائه به مصرفکننده نائل آید.
این شرکت در راستای اهداف اسلامی، انسانی و ملی سهامدارن، خود را متعهد میداند که با نگاهی به آینده در حوزه صنعت و اقتصاد، نسبت به آبادانی منطقه و کشور اقدام نموده و در راستای تحقق رویای " ایران آباد " تلاش کند؛ که در این مسیر خود را متعهد به رعایت موارد زیر میداند:
About Paya Foolad Kavir Yazd• ایجاد فضایی ایمن از نظر خطرات حرفهای، محیطی و صنعتی
• ایحاد محیطی آرام و دوستانه همراه با رعایت الزامات کاری
• تلاش در جهت حفظ محیطزیست و اکو سیستم با رعایت استانداردهای مربوطه و بالا بردن سطح استانداردهای اجرایی
• متعهد در قبال شایسته سالاری و رعایت حرفهایگری در استخدام نیروی انسانی مورد نیاز
 • تعهد به حفظ کرامت انسانی کارکنان با رعایت اصول اخلاقی و برآورده کردن تمامی نیازهای به حق ایشان
• تعهد در قبال جوانان مناطق محروم کشور در زمینه آموزش علمی و فنی و جذب آنها در حوزه صنعت معدن
• متعهد در قبال توسعه و پیشرفت مناطق ضعیف کشور با مشارکت مالی و فکری و مدیریتی
• رقابت سالم با شرکتهای مشابه با تحقق اصل بهبود مستمر کیفیت محصول
• مشتریمداری و تعامل بهینه با ایشان
• گسترش حلقهی ذینفعان شرکت در حوزههای اجتماعی، فرهنگی و اقتصادی

Name: PI-METAL Metal Industry Ltd.
Description:
PI-Metal #Metal Industry Ltd. was established in 1999, and it's a 100% privately-owned company, located in Central-Europe - Szeged, Hungary.
Our main portfolio is to execute complex and all-round metalwork services around the region.
We provide wide-range of services related to metal-works and metal parts manufacturing. We plan, design, and execute ideas from scratch. Our services range from waterjet & fiber laser sheet cutting to precision parts production, onsite welding, and so on. We make everything in metal such as finished products, parts, and finally, construction works.
Our success comes from the people we work with. We employ and work together with a lot of talented people. Our priority is: focusing on quality over quantity. We own an extensive range of machinery of the highest industry standards – which is unique in the region. We constantly develop and expand our production environment, which currently covers 4500 square metres.
-  /  -
A PI-METÁL Fémipari Kft. egy 1999-ben alapított 100%-ban magántulajdonban lévő vállalkozás, melynek telephelye Magyarországon, Szegeden található.  Szolgáltatások rendkívül széles skáláját nyújtjuk, ami kiemelkedő a magyarországi fémipari cégek tekintetében. Lemezvágásra a magas minőség és a költséghatékony gyártás érdekében fiber lézer,- plazma,- láng,- és vízsugaras vágási technológiát is alkalmazunk. Képesek vagyunk nagy, akár 6 méteres hosszon történő hajlítási munkálatokat elvégezni, gépparkunk alkalmas vastag,- és vékony lemez hajlításokra valamint precíziós élhajlítási feladatok kivitelezésére is. A síklemezek megmunkálása mellett csövek, profilok ívelése, hajlítása, lézervágása, valamint hengerítés is a szolgáltatásaink részét képezi. Minősített hegesztő csapatunk acél, rozsdamentes, saválló és alumínium hegesztést végez MIG, MAG, AWI eljárásokkal, cégünk EN1090-2 EXC3-ig hegesztő üzemi tanúsítással rendelkezik. A gyártás során pemelés és csaphegesztés technológiákat is alkalmazunk.

Name: CycloSteel
Description: Steel is infinitely reusable: Cyclosteel does not produce new steel but recycles scrap metal into steel. At Cyclosteel we turn scrap into high quality alloyed steel, locally and on a regional scale. We produce steel bars in a totally carbon neutral way.

Aluminum Alloys is a member of Foundrion Group, a group formed from the merging of eight top sandcasting businesses in North America.

Name: Globe Resources FZE
Description:
Greetings from Globe Resources FZE!

As a trade & industry recognised metal expert with a combined hands-on experience of over 30 years in metal trading & recycling industry and with operations extending throughout the Globe, we are committed to preserving the environment & building a greener future. Globe Resources FZE today is one of the vital links for many national and international metal manufacturers and foundries in the recycling industry. We procure, process and recycle all kinds of non-ferrous and ferrous metals.

Our commitment to recycling has been reinforced by having an industrial license and leaping towards the forward integration. We have the capability and infrastructure to handle large volumes of most of the primary, secondary metal scraps and alloys. We can fulfil any demand on a timely basis with strict adherence to the international quality and safety standards. Globe Resources FZE today has its own scrap processing yard, recycling facility along with an alloy manufacturing plant in the UAE and an extensive network of associated yards spread across the Globe.

Product Profile – We currently and regularly deal with all sorts of scraps of Aluminium, Brass, Copper, Lead, Nickel, Stainless Steel and Zinc along with the Primary & Secondary Alloys of the various non-ferrous grades. Also, under the ferrous grade we handle MS pipes, tubes, fittings & flanges as well as HMS mix scraps.
 
As we continue to expand globally, our mission at Globe Resources FZE is to continuously offer world class customer service. We welcome you to contact us for all your requirements of metal scraps, primary & secondary alloys; and we will be happy to assist and associate with you.

We look forward to having a long term mutually beneficial business relationship with your esteemed organization.

Name: Foshan Yongjin New Material Co., Ltd
Description:
Yongjin Stainless Steel is a leading global manufacturer specializing in high-quality cold-rolled stainless steel products. With a strong focus on innovation and excellence, we offer a comprehensive range of stainless steel grades, including 304BA, 430BA, 410BA, and 316, catering to diverse industries worldwide.

Our Expertise

304BA Stainless Steel: Renowned for its excellent corrosion resistance and smooth finish, ideal for kitchenware, elevators, and architectural applications.

430BA Stainless Steel: Offers superior formability and aesthetic appeal, commonly used in home appliances and decorative trims.

410BA Stainless Steel: Known for its high strength and wear resistance, suitable for automotive parts and industrial equipment.

316 Stainless Steel: Provides exceptional corrosion resistance, especially in marine and chemical environments.

Global Presence

Our state-of-the-art production facilities are strategically located to serve customers efficiently. Notably, our upcoming plant in Yalova, Türkiye, represents a significant investment of USD 257 million, aiming to produce 400,000 tons of cold-rolled stainless steel sheets and strips annually .

Commitment to Quality

At Yongjin, quality is paramount. Our advanced manufacturing processes and stringent quality control measures ensure that our stainless steel products meet and exceed international standards.

Connect with Us

Stay updated on our latest developments, product offerings, and industry insights by following our LinkedIn page. Discover how Yongjin Stainless Steel can be your trusted partner in delivering premium stainless steel solutions.

Ao longo dos anos, temos orgulho de fornecer produtos de máxima qualidade, atualizando constantemente nossos projetos e modernizando nosso pátio industrial. Nossa missão é oferecer o melhor produto com o melhor custo-benefício do mercado, levando toda a tecnologia moderna de tampões e grelhas para uma ampla gama de setores, incluindo saneamento, elétrica, indústria química e petroquímica, plataformas de petróleo, exploração marítima, portos e aeroportos, arenas e estádios esportivos, pátios de transporte, autoestradas, condomínios, hotéis, indústria de alimentos, telecomunicações e muito mais.

MS79 est reconnue pour son sérieux et sa fiabilité. Nous construisons des relations de confiance avec nos clients en leur offrant des solutions adaptées à leurs besoins.
 
Contactez nous pour découvrir comment nous pouvons vous accompagner dans vos projets industriels.

Name: Académie Industrielle - HaPy
Description: À l’Académie Industrielle HaPy, nous croyons en l’importance de fournir une formation complète et équilibrée. Notre programme unique combine à la fois des connaissances théoriques approfondies et des compétences pratiques essentielles pour réussir dans le monde professionnel. Grâce à notre approche pédagogique innovante, nos étudiants bénéficient d’une expérience d’apprentissage enrichissante et concrète.

Name: Resind Indústria e Comércio LTDA
Description:
A Resind Indústria e Comércio Ltda é uma empresa que se situa no meio da cadeia produtiva do setor metalúrgico, abastecendo seus clientes com matérias primas importantes para seus respectivos processos.
A empresa foi fundada em 1996 e hoje conta com excelente estrutura e profissionais qualificados. Possuímos laboratório próprio, fornos de indução, fornos de redução, fornos para Nitrogenação de Ferro – Manganês, equipamentos para processamento de minérios e escórias (circuito de peneiramento, britagem, moagem, jigagem, etc).
O desenvolvimento de tecnologias para a produção de metais sempre teve papel decisivo em nossa empresa. Nossos parceiros de pesquisa nos auxiliam no desenvolvimento de novos processos e produtos. Dentre eles, destacamos a Duisburg Essen Universität, na Alemanha, a Universidade Federal de Ouro Preto (UFOP) e a Fundação Gorceix.
Por meio de processos tecnológicos, produzimos diversas ferro-ligas especiais como ferro-manganês nitrogenado, manganês metálico nitrogenado, ligas contendo estanho (Sn), tântalo (Ta) e nióbio (Nb), dentre outras. Nossa credibilidade no mercado e a qualidade de nossos produtos nos permite exportar ligas metálicas diversas para o mercado externo. Além disso, prestamos serviços para várias empresas importantes no mercado interno, por meio de contratos de industrialização.
Location: São João del Rei, Minas Gerais

Description:

Name: Dynamic-Materials Group
Description:
Dynamic-Materials Group is a world leading manufacturer of advanced materials, comprising of trading subsidiaries in the UK, Europe and USA. 
Across the Group, manufacturing capabilities are focussed on the production and distribution of fibres and filaments in stainless-steels and other alloys utilising proprietary manufacturing technologies as well as a manufacturing a range of ceramic composite materials for use in challenging industrial applications across a wide range of industries.

Fibre Technology (Fibretech)
World-leading manufacturer of 300 and 400 series stainless-steel fibres using Rapid Solidification Technology (RST) for more than 40 years. Novel advancements to the RST process created i-melt, a truly unique process designed to manufacture product of the highest quality on a consistent basis.  Primarily services the automotive, aerospace, refractory, petroleum refinery and mining industries.

Ribbon Technology (Ribtec)
US-based pioneer of RST manufacturing to produce a range of 300 and 400 series stainless-steel filaments & fibres for more than 50 years. Long-established partner in numerous research and development projects, which included NASA, MIT and Orton to name a few. Novel advancements to the traditional ME process have resulted in superior quality products suitable for extreme applications, including petrochemical, refractory and automotive. 

Fiberstone Products
A centre of technical excellence and manufacturer of Fiberstone advanced composite material for a range of aggressive, high temperature applications across several industries, including steel-making, Aluminium and other Alloy processing in addition to both catalytic and chemical refining applications.

Microtex Products
Manufacturer of non-woven metallic textile materials used by the automotive industry and B2C markets for Firemizer – an innovative fuel-saving product targeted at domestic consumers for use in stoves or hearths.

Name: voestalpine High Performance Metals Iberica
Description: voestalpine High Performance Metals Ibérica, S.A.U es la filial española del grupo voestalpine. Producimos aceros especiales de alto rendimiento, garantizando la trazabilidad y calidad total de nuestros productos.

Name: PRIMALUM CANALES | Extrusión de aluminio
Description: Con más de 20 años de experiencia en el sector, en Primalum Canales creamos soluciones arquitectónicas en aluminio a través de la innovación, comprometiéndonos con el medio ambiente y el desarrollo sostenible.

Name: PERFOMETAL - Perfurações Metálicas Sociedade Unipessoal, Lda.
Description:
A Perfometal - Perfurações Metálicas Sociedade Unipessoal, Lda. é uma empresa portuguesa fundada em 1984, atualmente com capital 100% da empresa multinacional espanhola RECA Rejillas Calibradas S.L. Fundada em 1951, a RECA tem as suas instalações com 50.000m2 em Barcelona.
A Perfometal é desde há alguns anos um nome conhecido no mercado português de chapa perfurada, estampada, metal distendido, quadrícula, pisos metálicos galvanizados e degraus.
O nosso sucesso está baseado nos mais modernos equipamentos produtivos no perfeito conhecimento da indústria e na qualificação técnica dos nossos colaboradores. Oferecemos uma gama completa de produtos perfurados, desde micro perfuração, filtros, passando por perfurações decorativas para edifícios, estações de metro e caminhos de ferro, e para as mais diferentes aplicações. Fazemos chapas perfuradas e estampadas à medida, conforme desenhos.
Com mais de 70 anos de experiência da nossa unidade produtiva, os mais modernos equipamentos e o mais avançado sistema de ferramentas de perfuração tornam a Perfometal, o parceiro ideal para a chapa perfurada.

Description: STCI Soudure est une entreprise spécialisée dans la soudure industrielle, la tuyauterie, la chaudronnerie et la fabrication de pièces métalliques sur mesure, au service des professionnels du secteur industriel

Name: Mito Industria Metalúrgica
Description:
Há mais de uma década, consolidamo-nos no setor metalúrgico, pautando nossa atuação na entrega ininterrupta de serviços de excelência. 
Ao longo desse período, destacamo-nos nas áreas de fabricação, corte a laser, dobra de materiais, usinagem, e diversos outros serviços metalúrgicos. 
A nossa trajetória é marcada pelo comprometimento com a qualidade e pela incessante busca pela satisfação dos nossos clientes.

Name: Anushree Electrical Engineers (P) Ltd.
Description: Started in 1996, as a sister concern company Electrical Engineers. We have assiduously developed our skills in manufacturing quality Parts of Transformers. Our timely upgraded & technologically advanced manufacturing facilities has always been our strength in delivering the promises we made to our customers in quality. With a portfolio of more than 1000 products. We specialise in manufacturing machined, critical, high accuracy parts & assemblies.

Name: Indian Supercraft Industries
Description:
Indian Supercraft Industries is today one of the oldest manufacturers of steel in the private sector in Eastern India, with a vibrant history spanning over 6 decades. 
We have a splendid reputation in the Indian Railways as supplier of various fabricated and structural steel products, established over 40 years.

Our state of the art plant in Howrah manufactures a chain of value-added products which include Alloy and Mild Steel Ingots, Structural Steel products, Alloy and Mild Steel Heavy Rounds & Flats, and Engineering Equipment including Gears for a variety of uses. Fabrication of specialized Railway equipment for the Indian Railways is also done at our factory. We draw our strength from an old tradition of reliable customer service and quality products.
We have also established a good network and a reliable supply chain for import of Ferrous Scrap used for recycling and re-melting, from all across the globe, working closely with suppliers from Germany, Poland, Netherlands, Malaysia and Singapore.

With vibrant and dedicated employees forming the core of our system, we have grown from strength to strength under the dynamic leadership of Shri Ajay Maheshwari and Shri Sanjay Maheshwari. Their combined experience has helped us diversify into Steel Melting and Engineering Equipment, having started out as a Rolling Mill in 1950.

Name: LTSS
Description:
LTSS est le Spécialiste Français du tube acier et des structures mécano soudés.
Actif dans les domaines de la construction civil et maritime, de l'eau, du gaz & du pétrole, LTSS vous apportera des solutions pour réussir au mieux vos projets de construction ou d'investissement. 

Nous sommes aussi agent exclusif de Tosçelik Spiral Boru pour la fourniture des canalisations aciers pour le marché de l'eau (potable, usée, conduite forcée) et du gaz.

Name: SKA Logística
Description:
SKA Distribuição: Sua Parceira para Aço de Qualidade

Somos uma distribuidora credenciada pela ArcelorMittal, líder mundial na produção de aço e mineração. Destacamo-nos como uma peça fundamental na cadeia de distribuição, garantindo acesso eficiente aos produtos da ArcelorMittal no centro-oeste do Brasil.

Nossa parceria oferece vantagens aos clientes, proporcionando acesso simplificado a uma ampla gama de produtos siderúrgicos de alta qualidade, entregues com pontualidade e eficiência. Para a ArcelorMittal, somos um parceiro essencial para expandir e aprimorar sua presença no mercado.

Comprometemo-nos com a excelência em qualidade e eficiência, compartilhando os valores da ArcelorMittal. Nossa equipe capacitada e instalações de armazenamento garantem que cada produto seja tratado e entregue de maneira impecável, atendendo aos mais altos padrões da indústria.

A parceria entre SKA Distribuição e ArcelorMittal é sólida, baseada na confiança, eficiência e compromisso com a qualidade. Juntos, fortalecemos nossas posições no mercado, oferecendo soluções excepcionais aos clientes e contribuindo para o sucesso da indústria siderúrgica no Brasil.

Name: Florida Finishers Corp
Description:
The Florida Finishers Corp is a non-profit organization bringing together the combined metal finishing, plating, and electroplating associates of the Mid-West Florida, Orlando, and South Florida Branches of the AESF. They are dedicated to education for the future of finishing and extend an invitation to join our efforts in providing informative and educational information for the finishing industries.

The FFC’s primary educational function is the annual Mid-Winter Conference and Exposition. This conference highlights several technical sessions and exhibits from metal finishing industry suppliers.

Name: Laxmi Kripa Steel & Power Limited
Description: Laxmi Kripa Group, established in 2008 with Laxmi Kripa Ispat, has rapidly grown from an initial production capacity of 18,000 tonnes of finished goods to a combined 324,000 tonnes annually across three units in and around Raipur, Chhattisgarh. With a workforce of over 1,000 and an annual turnover of ₹1,000 crores, we are committed to becoming a leader in the steel and wire manufacturing industry. Our diverse product range includes billets, MS angles, channels, rounds, flats, Z angles, and a variety of wires such as hot dip GI wires, binding wires, HB wires, barbed wires, nails, and chain links. In line with our commitment to sustainability, we have installed 109.5 MW of solar panels to meet our energy needs and are actively involved in recycling industrial waste, processing 2,600 tonnes of slag and 86,400 tonnes of tyre wire scrap per annum. Our dedication to innovation, quality, and green practices continues to drive our growth and industry leadership.

Name: PURE ISPAT PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
PURE ISPAT PRIVATE LIMITED operates an mini steel plant producing mild steel products, company based in Gujarat, India. 
Originally known as "Mahagujarat Industries" (GVM-Odhav) since 1972.

Name: Metalúrgica Ger
Description:
Desde 2016, a Metalúrgica Ger atua com excelência na fabricação de produtos voltados para Casas Lotéricas e o setor de comunicação visual. Somos homologados pelo Exército Brasileiro e pela Caixa Econômica Federal, o que reforça nosso compromisso com a segurança e a qualidade em cada entrega.

Oferecemos soluções em blindagens, mobiliário padronizado e sinalização, sempre com fornecedores criteriosamente selecionados e processos conduzidos com rigor técnico. Cada projeto é único, e por isso oferecemos um atendimento próximo e personalizado, conduzido por uma equipe altamente qualificada.

Com atuação em todo o território nacional, nos destacamos pela confiabilidade, profissionalismo e foco em resultados. Conte com a Metalúrgica Ger para desenvolver soluções seguras, eficientes e sob medida para o seu negócio.

Description: Feronart est une entreprise spécialisée dans la conception et la réalisation d'ouvrages métalliques vitrés sur mesure. Née de la continuité d'une expertise de plus de 22 ans dans le métier (chez un acteur majeur de la façade et de l'enveloppe du bâtiment), notre mission est d'apporter une solution clé-en-main, agile et hautement technique à tous vos défis de métallerie.

Name: Apexwork – Turnkey Services
Description: A Apexwork é especializada na prestação de serviços de excelência em diversas áreas industriais, incluindo mecânica, automação, energia, soldadura e metalomecânica. Com uma equipa altamente qualificada e experiente, oferecemos soluções personalizadas e inovadoras que atendem às necessidades específicas de cada cliente. Desde a construção de equipamentos de pressão até à montagem de estruturas metálicas, comprometemo-nos a fornecer resultados de alta qualidade, promovendo a eficiência operacional e a sustentabilidade em todos os projetos.

Name: JMV Estruturas
Description:
JMV Fabricação, Montagem e Manutenção
"Projetando o agora, estruturando o futuro."

Somos uma metalúrgica especializada na fabricação, montagem e manutenção de estruturas e equipamentos metálicos. Com excelência técnica e comprometimento, transformamos projetos em soluções robustas, entregando qualidade e confiabilidade em cada etapa do processo.

Nossos serviços incluem:

Fabricação de estruturas metálicas: Precisão e durabilidade que atendem às mais altas exigências do mercado.
Montagem industrial: Integração eficiente para garantir o funcionamento pleno de suas operações.
Manutenção de equipamentos: Soluções rápidas e seguras para minimizar paradas e aumentar a produtividade.
Na JMV, combinamos inovação e experiência para atender às demandas da indústria com responsabilidade e eficiência. Nosso compromisso é ser referência no setor metalúrgico, criando estruturas sólidas para o presente e para o futuro.

 JMV: Metalurgia que transforma, soluções que duram.

Description: Créée en 1960, l’Entreprise Amouroux est spécialisée dans les travaux de ferronnerie, serrurerie et de métallerie.

Name: Andradina compressores | Recuperadora
Description:
Lider no mercado, a Andradina realiza consertos e recuperação de Compressores industriais há mais de 30 anos. Qualidade e excelência em todos os serviços prestados.

Com um estoque de peças completo, e atualizado a Andradina oferece uma linha completa em peças para Compressores. garantindo ao cliente o funcionamento perfeito dos equipamentos recuperados.

Name: DJ INDUSTRIAL
Description:
A partir de conhecimentos adquiridos ao longo de 30 anos, no ano de 2012 surge a DJ MONTAGENS. Inicialmente, o objetivo era executar pequenas obras e reparo de peças e equipamentos industriais. Devido à aprovação de seus produtos no mercado, em 2015 a empresa inaugura sua nova instalação no distrito Industrial I, na cidade de Ourinhos SP. A partir de então, nasce uma estrutura nova e organizada, com os departamentos administrativos e técnicos.

No ano de 2016, com o objetivo de expandir suas atividades, inicia-se um novo ciclo. A partir de então a DJ INDUSTRIAL, ingressa no mercado de maquinas e equipamentos para Beneficiamento de Sementes e Amidos.

Devido a aceitação no mercado, dos equipamentos produzidos pela DJ INDUSTRIAL, esta resolve lançar um novo desafio. No ano de 2018, a partir de um estudo técnica de viabilidade econômica a DJ INDUSTRIAL, ingressa no seguimento de equipamentos para Preparação e Extração de Oleaginosas.

Atualmente a DJ INDUSTRIAL, atende todo o território nacional e países do Mercosul, como Paraguai e Bolívia, fornecendo soluções diretas aos nossos clientes. Soluções estas, que agregam tecnologia de ponta e alta eficiência aos nossos produtos, aliados a minimização de custos de produção de nossos clientes.

Venha nos conhecer!

Description:
The "Amco Steel And Alloys" is  a well known Stainless Steel Round Bar Stockiest Company, established in 2010. We involve in Stocking and trading of SS Round Bars. We have a team of young and multi-talented people who endeavor hard for any challenges offered by clients to help them complete their projects. We are well equipped with technical know-how and expertise to cater to the growing demand globally.

Being importer, exporter, dealer & stockiest with Best Quality in huge stocks, the Amco Steel has become one of the most popular and reliable source to the clients for every requirement in Stainless Steel Round Bars. Over the years, we have received recognition from the best of Govt., Semi Govt., Private and MNCs for quality supplies.

The "Amco Steel" has developed good relationship with leading Stainless Steel manufacturers across the globe. This has helped clients procure high quality & testified Stainless Steel Round Bars strictly adhering to their specific need and at a competitive price as well.
As a procedure, we provide original Test Certificates from the Manufactures and can also arrange for the most essential Chemical/Physical/Mechanical/Ultrasonic/Micro/IGC or any other test as may be required from the best Govt. approved Laboratories. A third party inspection of our Stainless Steel Round Bars is also acceptable to us. While Amco Steel is an ISO 9001:2008 Certified Company, the rest are in the process of getting their individual ISO Certification. It would be our privilege to have the affiliated companies of the Group registered as one of the vendors on your approved list of supplies. We promise to provide you with only quality solutions for your every need in Steel.

"Amco Steel" uncompromising commitment to quality, integrity and reliability has earned it an enviable reputation as INDIA's leading provider of stainless steel solutions. Complete sourcing connects our customers to the best stainless steel suppliers worldwide.

Name: Argento Metalúrgica
Description:
Na Argento Metalúrgica, somos especialistas em criar soluções metálicas de alta qualidade. Com anos de experiência, oferecemos uma vasta gama de produtos e serviços, desde peças personalizadas até componentes industriais, sempre utilizando materiais de primeira linha e tecnologia avançada.

Description: We, D&D Metal was established in the year 2018 in Delhi (India), Director Mr. Puneet Gupta is with experience of about 13 years, into the field of Cable Trays manufacturing from 2005. Name: Forman Metal Cast
Description:
Forman Metal Cast One stop Foundry is a leading sand casting facility based in Rajkot, Gujarat, with a monthly capacity of 350 tons. We specialize in providing high-precision sand castings for a wide range of industries including automotive, pumps, valves, railways, machinery, and infrastructure.
With years of domain experience, we deliver robust cast iron and ductile iron parts tailored to client designs and strict industry standards. Our advanced manufacturing, rigorous quality control, and commitment to on-time delivery have earned us longstanding relationships with reputed buyers across India and abroad.
We work closely with OEMs, component manufacturers, and project contractors to supply both high-volume production runs and complex custom jobs. Our team combines technical expertise with personalized service—from raw material selection to final inspection and packaging.
As a trusted supplier to leading Indian and international brands, our core strengths include:
	•	Flexible production for small to large batch sizes
	•	In-house pattern making and rapid prototyping
	•	Adherence to ISO and quality certifications
	•	Cost-effective solutions and transparent processes
If you are seeking a reliable sand casting partner for pumps, railway parts, automotive components, or engineered products, connect with us to discuss your needs. Let’s shape ideas into durable solutions—on spec, on budget, and on time.

Name: Pipex Energy
Description: Pipex Energy S.r.l. è una start-up italiana focalizzata sulla decarbonizzazione dei processi industriali e sull'innovazione tecnologica. Fondata nel 2021 per affrontare le sfide ambientali e promuovere soluzioni sostenibili, Pipex Energy si concentra principalmente sulla produzione di materiali innovativi per ridurre le emissioni di CO2 nei processi siderurgici che permettano una transizione ecologica efficace nel settore dell'acciaio, contribuendo così agli obiettivi climatici globali. L'azienda collabora strettamente con istituzioni accademiche e partner industriali per garantire che le loro soluzioni siano non solo tecnicamente valide, ma anche economicamente sostenibili e pronte per l'adozione su larga scala.

Name: Studio Fibra
Description: A STUDIO FIBRA está comprometida com a qualidade e durabilidade de seus produtos e satisfação de seus clientes, assegurando que todo seu processo de fabricação siga padrões rígidos de controle de qualidade, determinados por uma engenharia especializada em fibra de vidro. Os tubos e conexões são projetados e desenvolvidos em conformidade com normas nacionais e internacionais, que garantem excelente desempenho operacional e longevidade.

Name: MXA ENGENHARIA LTDA
Description: A MXA é uma empresa especializada em projetos, engenharia e soluções metálicas.

Name: Bushings & Bars Direct
Description:
Bushings & Bars is a leading supplier of high-quality bushings, bars, and machined components, serving a diverse range of industries with precision-engineered solutions. Our extensive product line includes cast bronze bushings and thrust washers, cast bronze bars, SAE841 powdered metal bars and plates, powdered metal sleeve and flanged bushings, PTFE and nylon bushings and washers, and steel-backed PTFE-lined bushings. 

We are committed to delivering products that meet the highest standards of durability and performance. Our cast bronze bushings and thrust washers are designed for heavy-load and high-wear applications, providing exceptional wear resistance and shock-load handling capabilities. 

In addition to our product offerings, we provide valuable resources to our customers, such as guidance on preventing bushing and bearing failure. 


At Bushings & Bars, we prioritize customer satisfaction by offering same-day shipping and free standard UPS ground shipping on all orders over $60. 

 Our streamlined operation utilizes the speed and efficiency of an online outlet, ensuring fast direct delivery service.

We serve a wide range of industries, including oil and gas, aerospace, industrial machinery, marine and defense, tool and die, plastic mold tooling, and heavy-duty equipment. Our products are designed to meet the specific demands of each industry, providing reliable performance in even the most challenging environments. 

Our mission is to supply customers with a range of bushings and bronze bars direct from US manufacturers, ensuring the highest quality and performance. We are dedicated to continuous improvement and innovation, striving to meet the evolving needs of our customers and the industries we serve.

For more information about our products and services, please visit our website at bushingsandbars.com.

Name: D K SONS
Description:
Our company was established in the early 1990s as a metal foundry. Name: O. K. Foundry Co., Inc.
Description:
OK Foundry makes gray and ductile iron sand castings from 1 lb. to 400 lbs. using cope and drag phenolic urethane bonded sand molding also known as “no-bake”.

The no-bake molding line at OK Foundry is most efficient for short runs of 25, 50 or 100 castings of 50 to 250 lbs. in gray or ductile iron. No-bake molding has the least expensive tooling of any sand molding process and is a good process for heavy equipment castings like pumps, volutes, gear cases and heavy boiler grates.

Name: Refracast Metallurgical Private Limited

At RMPL, our expertise spans across a broad spectrum of metallurgical processes, with a significant emphasis on sustainable practices and zero waste technology. Our deep-rooted experience in spent catalyst recycling has not only enriched our knowledge but has also positioned us as the benchmark for recycling practices within the industry. Our ability to handle the most complex catalysts showcases our technical prowess and commitment to environmental stewardship.

Our stronghold in the steel-making sector is marked by our innovative contributions and the development of specialty products that address specific industry needs. As a heavy R&D-based company, we have dedicated substantial resources to developing advanced materials and processes that significantly enhance the efficiency and quality of steel production across India.

RMPL’s rich history is defined by our successful track record and our forward-thinking approach. We continue to lead with innovation, ensuring that each advancement contributes to a more sustainable and efficient metallurgical landscape. Join us at RMPL, where tradition meets innovation, and every challenge is an opportunity to excel.

Description:
Depuis 2014, l’entreprise TPF, offre différentes prestations de qualité , tant au niveau national qu'international avec un effectif moyen de 15 techniciens.

Ses nombreux corps de métiers et son personnel qualifié, lui permettent de répondre aux attentes de la clientèle, aussi bien dans des secteurs comme la chimie fine, que dans l’agroalimentaire.

Nos compétences couvrent tous les travaux de Chaudronnerie, de Métallerie, d'Inox et d'Acier. Nous sommes particulièrement efficaces dans la réalisation de travaux spécifiques en acier, inox, cuivre et la réalisation de chaufferie vapeur.

Ce qui nous permet d'être présent dans de nombreux domaines d'activités :

Tuyauterie, Chaudronnerie, 

Chaufferie vapeur,

Installations agro-alimentaires,

Installations chimiques et pétrochimiques,

Skids divers,

Traitement d'eau,

Utilités pharmaceutiques, 

Blanchisseries,

Barilets vapeur... 

Dotés d’une solide expertise, nous assurons la prise en charge complète de votre projet, depuis la phase d’étude jusqu’à la livraison finale.

Nous sommes une entreprise certifiée MASE (valable jusqu’en 2024) afin de répondre aux exigences SSE de nos clients.

TPF lors de sa création, a souscrit à une garantie Décennale ; ce qui nous habilite à traiter des dossiers soumis à la DESP 68 UE.

Hautement qualifiés, tous les membres de notre équipe sont titulaires d'agréments et de licences, nécessaires à la bonne réalisation de vos travaux. Afin de permettre à nos clients de suivre l’évolution des travaux, nous assignons un responsable sur chaque chantier.

Nos certifications :

Agréments soudeurs QMOS/QS suivant les normes européennes et le code ASME

Permis nacelle CACES TYPE 3B : 6 opérateurs

Personnel habilité chimie Niveau 1/ 2 agrées Niveau 2

Habilitation jointage RC1/RC2

Notre force réside dans notre maîtrise des différentes contraintes liées à notre métier. Notre capacité à s'adapter à divers domaines d'activités nous permet de garantir un accompagnement personnalisé de vos projets.

Name: CASTMET Foundry
Description:
CASTMET Foundry, located in Gorlice, Poland, is a leader in high-quality casting production. Specializing in gray iron, aluminum alloys, and bronze castings, we cater to both individual and corporate clients. Our expertise lies in crafting meticulously hand-made castings using bentonite and chemically hardened molds to ensure the highest standards of precision and durability.


**Our Product Range:**

- **Gray Iron Castings:** Up to 200kg, Grades: EN-GJL-150, EN-GJL-200, EN-GJL-250

- **Bronze Castings:** Up to 100kg, Grade: B 101 (CuSi10P)

- **Aluminum Alloys Castings:** Up to 80kg, Grades: AK9 (AlSi9Mg), AK11 (AlSi11)


**What We Offer:**

- Municipal architecture castings

- Industrial and decorative castings

- Street lamps, bench and table legs

- Hunting pots, grills, and grates

- Plates and panels

- Machine and equipment parts

- Fireplaces


**Why Choose Us:**

- **Efficient and Comprehensive Service:** We manage every aspect of your order with utmost attention to detail.

- **Quick Turnaround:** Timely delivery of all projects.

- **Reliable Transport:** We ensure secure delivery with our own transportation.

- **Competitive Pricing:** Attractive rates without compromising quality.

- **Superior Craftsmanship:** High standards in every casting we produce.


At CASTMET Foundry, we are committed to excellence and dedicated to meeting the unique needs of our clients. Connect with us to explore how our casting solutions can enhance your projects. Visit our website or contact us for more information.

Com profundo conhecimento dos desafios enfrentados na linha de produção deste setor, desenvolvemos o sistema de engate rápido para refrigeração de moldes, uma solução que prioriza eficiência e durabilidade. Fabricado integralmente em latão, nosso engate rápido elimina a necessidade de braçadeiras e cortes frequentes em mangueiras, reduzindo desperdícios e simplificando operações.

O resultado? Economia de tempo e dinheiro para sua indústria, com ganhos significativos em produtividade e redução de custos operacionais.

Na USIENGATE, não apenas entregamos produtos – oferecemos soluções inteligentes que impulsionam o sucesso do seu negócio.

Description:
Optimize Your Work with Our Adjustable Sand Leveling Bucket

Our Sand Leveling Bucket for 1T-2T excavators is designed to make your work easier, faster, and more precise. With an adjustable width from 120 cm to 220 cm using interchangeable side pieces (10 cm, 20 cm, 30 cm, 40 cm, and 50 cm), our bucket offers maximum flexibility. It comes standard with two 50 cm side pieces, and additional side pieces can be purchased separately.

The adjustable height from 5 cm to 8 cm ensures perfect adaptation to the most commonly used aluminum rails. The Sand Leveling Bucket fits S30 and MH30 mounts, and its wheels prevent the rails from being dragged, increasing work efficiency and convenience.

With our bucket, you can achieve a smooth and seamless transition, even over several centimeters of sand, thanks to the swivel brackets. It is not only efficient and precise but also gentle on the body, reducing the physical strain of manual work. Our bucket adapts to various terrains and paving needs, making it the ideal solution for pavers, landscapers, and machine dealers.

Contact us today for a quote and experience how our Sand Leveling Bucket can revolutionize your workday!

Name: NovAureus AB
Description:
We are NovAureus AB, a new deep-tech company specializing in advanced, green hydrometallurgical recovery of precious metals from electronic waste (e-waste). We are currently establishing our pilot-scale accelerating the recovery of precious metals from urban mine streams like e-waste, spent catalysts, and industrial residues—using cutting-edge, modular innovative reactors. Our systems combine controlled hydrometallurgy and electrochemical extraction to maximize yield 99.999% and selectivity while reducing reagents, energy, and waste. We turn complex feedstocks into high-purity Au, Pt-group, Ag and more, with built-in process analytics for real-time control. The result: higher recovery, lower footprint, and a scalable path to circular materials.

At NovAureus, the spirit of renewal that once reshaped history now drives us to build a greener, more sustainable golden age.
