Description: The concentrate production plant, based on the use of scattered iron ore reserves in the region, and with the aim of providing input feed for the Ghadir Iranian pelletizing plant in the Bahabad region, was approved as a priority project in the Chador Malo Mining and Industrial Company in the second half of 2020. The Bahabad Asr Novin Mining Industries Company was provided with the opportunity to construct iron ore concentrate production lines adjacent to the Ghadir Pelletizing Plant. The construction of a concentrate production plant with a capacity of one million tons was put on the agenda in the second half of 2020 with the support of the Chador Malo Mining and Industrial Company and the Ghadir Iranian Iron and Steel Company to ensure the supply of raw materials for the Ghadir Iranian Company's pelletizing plant under construction and to be a step towards the development of the steel industry in the region. Through a competitive selection process, the most suitable and cheapest contractor (Fakor Sanat Tehran Company) has become our partner, and it is scheduled that this plant will be put into production within a maximum of 20 months. Pars Land Industries and Mines Construction Company is the consultant for this project

Name: Tribomaster Industrial e Comercial LTDA
Description:
Somos uma empresa especializada em fabricação e desenvolvimento de componentes e peças autolubrificantes com insertos de lubrificante sólidos à base de grafite ou PTFE (politetrafluoroetileno).
A TriboMaster possui um corpo de técnicos com décadas de experiência e know how no segmento da indústria de componentes e peças industriais. Surgiu com a premissa básica de desenvolver melhorias nos componentes para as ferramentarias e dispositivos industriais. Em sua atuação, atende algumas maiores indústrias de ferramentarias e estamparias, realizando projetos, consultoria, fabricação de componentes para indústria de dispositivos e ferramentas de estampo, corte e repuxo.
Todos os nossos produtos são fabricados baseados nas normas internacionais, como, Norma DIN, ISO, VDI, NAAMS, padrão: VW, Ford, GM, etc. e também conforme nomenclaturas estabelecidas por fabricantes de componentes de moldes e porta moldes como: Sankyo, Oiles, Voest Alpine, MDL entre outros.
Em virtude das normas internacionais, algumas não obrigam a adotarem a nomenclatura específica. A maioria dos fabricantes adotam nomenclatura própria, a TriboMaster adota nomenclatura baseada conforme as normas internacionais para facilitar o relacionamento e entendimento com os nossos clientes.
As cotações e consultas podem ser efetuadas conforme o vosso banco de dados do material que iremos identificar o material ora consultado e fabricamos também conforme desenho e especificações do cliente.
DIN – Deutsches Institut für Normung (Germany)
ISO – International Organization for Standardization (Switzerland)
NAAMS – North American Automotive Metric Standards (USA)
VDI – Verein Deutscher Ingenieure (Germany)
ASTM – American Society for Testing and Materials

Dans le domaine de la  TREMPE, nous assurons la fourniture de capteurs trempe suivant ISO 9950 / ASTM D 6200 / ASTM D 6549 / ASTM D 6482-99 et suivant autres d'autres spécifications à la demande, ainsi que les prestations liés à l'expertise et à l'audit de votre ligne de trempe ainsi que l'offre de matériels associés.

Ces collaborations témoignent de notre réputation et de notre savoir-faire reconnu dans le domaine des ascenseurs.

Notre usine, située stratégiquement à Nice, à proximité de l'autoroute et de la voie rapide, s'étend sur une superficie de 600 mètres carrés. Elle est le cœur de notre activité, où une équipe de 12 salariés qualifiés met tout en œuvre pour garantir la qualité et la fiabilité de nos produits et services.

ETS Lisa & Fils, c'est avant tout une entreprise familiale qui a su évoluer avec son temps tout en conservant les valeurs qui font sa force : l'expertise, la confiance et l'engagement envers nos clients. Nous sommes fiers de perpétuer cette tradition et de continuer à élever vos projets vers de nouveaux sommets.

Description:
Momentum Technologies est une société française spécialisée dans le développement et la fabrication de solutions technologiques dédiées à la protection des personnes face aux risques extrêmes et immédiats.
Elle conçoit et industrialise des équipements innovants à vocation civile, humanitaire et stratégique, capables de répondre aux catastrophes naturelles, aux crises climatiques et aux menaces majeures.
À travers le projet LIFEPODS, Momentum Technologies développe des capsules de protection autonomes et résilientes, pensées pour offrir un refuge immédiat lorsque le danger est imminent et inévitable
Sa mission : transformer l'innovation technologique en solutions concrètes de survie et de résilience accessibles à l'échelle internationale.

Momentum Technologies is a French company specializing in the development and manufacture of technological solutions dedicated to protecting people from extreme and immediate risks.
It designs and industrializes innovative equipment for civilian, humanitarian, and strategic purposes, capable of responding to natural disasters, climate crises, and major threats.
Through the LIFEPODS project, Momentum Technologies develops autonomous and resilient protection capsules, designed to provide immediate shelter when danger is near and inevitable
Its mission: transform technological innovation into concrete survival and resilience solutions accessible on an international scale.

Name: REELOTEK ESTATES

Our evolution continued with a strategic entry into the construction industry, focusing initially on the development of private family flats/homes. This expansion marked a pivotal moment in our journey, enabling us to leverage our expertise and contribute to the infrastructure and residential sectors.
Building on our success and market insights, we ventured into the trading of non-ferrous products, including zinc and aluminium. This move underscored our adaptability and responsiveness to market demands, further enhancing our portfolio and industry presence.
Driven by a vision of vertical integration and quality excellence, we subsequently embarked on the production of Zinc ingots and Aluminium ingots. Currently running two furnaces of Zinc ingots and two furnace of Aluminium Ingots. This step not only fortified our supply chain but also empowered us to meet the growing demand for high-quality non-ferrous metals.
Today, with a robust foundation built on decades of experience and a forward-looking approach, we continue to innovate and expand our offerings across multiple sectors. Our dedication to excellence, reliability, and customer satisfaction remains unwavering as we strive to redefine standards and create sustainable value in every endeavour.
At REELOTEK ESTATES we are committed to shaping a future where innovation meets reliability, and our journey continues to inspire progress in every facet of our operations.

MBS Metallbau d.o.o. započinje svoju priču u aprilu 2019. godine i sa prvim nalogom u januaru 2021. pokreće proizvodni proces.
Vlasnik i direktor Ettore Scheiflinger je za svoju drugu proizvodnu lokaciju izabrao Smederevsku Palanku u Srbiji i formirao pouzdan tim koji podržava njegovu viziju. Kompetencije firme MBS Metallbau d.o.o. leže u izradi nosećih i arhitektonskih čeličnih konstrukcija za industrijsku i komercijalnu namenu i garantujemo Vam najprofesionalniju realizaciju postavljenih zahteva.

Name: Resurge Alloys Limited
Description:
With a legacy of over 50 years in stainless steel manufacturing through my family’s well-established presence in India, I am proud to carry forward this tradition into a new chapter. While the foundation of trust, quality, and reputation has already been laid by the previous generation, my vision is to take it further by focusing on innovation, precision, and global competitiveness.

At Resurge Alloys Ltd, we are committed to introducing modern techniques, data-driven processes, and sustainable practices to redefine what stainless steel products can achieve. By combining my education and contemporary skills with the wisdom and values passed down through decades of experience, we are raising the standard of manufacturing for the future.

Manidhari Metal Industries is a distinguished name in the realm of premium Aluminium kitchen cookware. With a legacy spanning over 36 years, we've established ourselves as a trusted leader in the industry, driven by a passion for culinary excellence.

Our commitment to quality and innovation is evident in every product we create. From expert craftsmanship to lasting durability, each piece of cookware we offer reflects our dedication to providing kitchen essentials that elevate your cooking experience.

At Manidhari Metals, we believe in the art of combining traditional craftsmanship with modern design, resulting in cookware that not only meets the highest standards but also brings joy to your kitchen. Sustainability is a core value, and we strive to make responsible choices in our manufacturing processes.

Join us in exploring a world of culinary possibilities. Discover the difference that Manidhari Metals brings to your kitchen, making every meal a masterpiece of taste, quality, and creativity.

Name: Tubocerto Ltda.
Description:
A Tubocerto é uma empresa brasileira com mais de 60 anos de tradição na fabricação de tubos trefilados de aço carbono, reconhecida por sua precisão milimétrica e excelência em qualidade. Fundada em 1964, somos pioneiros no Brasil no fornecimento de tubos especializados para amortecedores e sistemas de suspensão do setor automotivo.
Com duas modernas unidades fabris próprias totalizando 13.000m² de área construída, combinamos tradição familiar com tecnologia avançada para atender aos mais rigorosos padrões de qualidade internacional. Nossa expertise se estende além do mercado automotivo, abrangendo a fabricação de hastes cromadas e polidas, peças usinadas de precisão e tubos hidráulicos para diversos segmentos industriais.
Certificados pela norma IATF 16949:2016 e ISO 14001,  atendemos tanto o exigente mercado nacional quanto exportamos direta e indiretamente para Estados Unidos, Ásia, Europa e Mercosul, consolidando nossa posição como referência em trefilação de precisão no cenário internacional.

At Lotus Metal Works, we partner with top-tier clients, offering customized solutions tailored to elevate your service standards. Join the industry leaders who trust us for quality, precision, and exceptional service.

Name: Barrotte Ortega Indústria Metalurgica LTDA
Description: Em abril de 1956, os visionários empreendedores José Lacy Barrotte e Antonio Ortega estabeleceram os alicerces da empresa Borrotte Ortega. Inicialmente dedicada ao ramo de ferramentaria e estamparia, a Borrotte Ortega rapidamente adaptou-se ao ritmo acelerado do mercado, abraçando avanços tecnológicos e modernizando suas práticas de produção. Com a passagem dos anos, a empresa evoluiu e diversificou suas especialidades, abraçando tecnologias como puncionadeira, eletroerosão a fio e penetração, além da eficiente técnica de pintura eletrostática. Desde então, a Borrote Ortega tem sido um líder no domínio completo do processo produtivo, desde a fase inicial até a soldagem final. Comprometida com a excelência e a qualidade, a empresa também se dedicou à padronização de seus processos, obtendo a cobiçada certificação ISO 9001. Essa jornada de inovação e comprometimento solidificou a reputação da Borrote Ortega como uma empresa de confiança e excelência, pronta para atender às demandas dos clientes mais exigentes.

Nosso parque fabril possui 3 centros de usinagem, 2 tornos e uma fresadora ferramenteira. A Caster tem feito inovações para a industria de modelos , fabricando moldes protótipos em impressção 3D .

Somos uma empresa nacional fabricante de máquinas e acessórios para a indústria de embalagens de fechamento: filme stretch, fita adesiva, papel e papelão.

Desde o início, em 2010, trilhamos um caminho de desenvolvimento constante. Nesta trajetória superamos desafios, fortalecemos nossa estrutura e passamos a investir ainda mais no mercado. Hoje, contamos com uma estrutura fabril de 800m², dispondo de maquinários completo para a fabricação de todos os componentes do nosso produto. Com essa expansão, além de fabricantes, nos tornamos uma empresa referência em manutenção industrial, mantendo em nosso DNA a responsabilidade e comprometimento com nossos clientes e amigos.

Name: EL Manar Trefilage
Description:
Ici chez El Manar, notre passion réside dans la transformation des métaux. Spécialisés dans le tréfilage, la pointerie, la fabrication de grillages, et la galvanisation, nous avons établi une réputation de fournisseur fiable de solutions métallurgiques de haute qualité adaptées à divers secteurs.

Nos expertises :

Tréfilage : Nous convertissons le métal brut en fils fins, offrant la force et la flexibilité nécessaires pour une multitude d'applications.
Pointerie : Notre production de pointes et clous est synonyme de précision, soutenant des projets de construction et bien plus encore.
Grillage : Nous fabriquons des grillages robustes, parfaits pour des applications allant de la clôture à la sécurité.
Galvanisation : Nos procédés de galvanisation protègent efficacement contre la corrosion, améliorant ainsi la longévité de vos investissements.
Notre promesse :

À El Manar, nous nous engageons à respecter les plus hauts standards de qualité et de précision. Nos technologies avancées et notre équipe dévouée nous permettent de satisfaire les besoins spécifiques de chaque client, en respectant les délais et les budgets prévus.

Contactez-nous pour découvrir comment nos solutions peuvent contribuer au succès de vos projets.

A Dunamis Metal nasceu com um propósito: ser uma empresa que vai além da produção de estruturas metálicas, gerando impacto positivo na vida das pessoas e contribuindo para um mundo mais justo, ético e comprometido com o bem.

Temos como alicerce valores sólidos, que nos acompanham em cada decisão e em cada projeto: honestidade, fidelidade, lealdade e comprometimento. Acreditamos que o verdadeiro crescimento acontece quando existe integridade, respeito e excelência em tudo o que se faz.

Construímos relacionamentos de confiança com nossos clientes, parceiros e colaboradores, sempre prezando por um trabalho transparente, feito com dedicação e responsabilidade. Nossa equipe é formada por profissionais que compartilham desses mesmos valores, buscando evolução contínua, tanto profissional quanto pessoal.

O nome Dunamis representa força em ação, e é exatamente isso que nos move: transformar desafios em oportunidades e trabalho em legado.

"A palavra grega "dunamis", usada no Novo Testamento, refere-se ao poder, às obras milagrosas e aos dons espirituais específicos manifestados em cada crente por meio da unção do Espírito Santo."

Name: Brown Metals Company
Description:
Brown Metals Company, founded in 1970, is a leading distributor of custom-slit and coiled thin-gauge stainless steel and high-temperature alloys. For over five decades of owner-operated leadership, we’ve built a reputation for technical expertise, precision processing, and dependable service.

Our team—including highly trained slitter operators, quality assurance specialists, and knowledgeable sales professionals—brings deep experience in thin-gauge stainless steel. We provide fast turnaround, competitive pricing, and custom-width slitting with tight tolerances. As an authorized distributor for U.S.-based mills, we supply 100% U.S.-produced stainless steel only, with no brokerage markups. All material is DFARS compliant, and we are AS9100D / ISO 9001:2015 certified to support customers requiring rigorous quality and documentation.

We maintain one of the most diverse inventories of thin-gauge coil on the West Coast, including 300 series (304, 301, 316, etc.) and 17-7 stainless steel. We specialize in precision-slit coil and custom sheared sheet, processing materials from .0005" to .035" thick and .020" to 36" wide, holding tolerances to ± .001". Our engineered equipment supports both high-volume production and small-batch requirements with consistent accuracy and packaging care.

With the largest on-hand inventory of thin-gauge stainless steel on the West Coast (1M+ lbs), customers can rely on true stock availability and rapid delivery. Materials listed are in stock and ready to ship.

Our products serve manufacturing across aerospace, automotive, biotech, electronics, equipment manufacturing, food processing, medical devices, petrochemical processing, and more. Every order, whether under one pound or more than 10 tons, includes full physical and chemical test documentation.

For 50+ years, our promise has remained the same:
Service. Dependability. Consistent quality.

Name: DECOUP'ACIER
Description:
L’origine de Découp’ Acier
La société DECOUPACIER a été créée en 2007 par Mr PENNISI Sylvain, après avoir passé 15 ans dans le milieu de la découpe industrielle.
Fils de parent d’ouvriers Siciliens dans la métallurgie, Sylvain PENNISI a baigné dans l'acier de la Lorraine au milieu de sa famille travaillant à 100 % dans l’acier, la fonte, les poutrelles de la lorraine.
Il se lança dans la création de DECOUPACIER et commença seul avec un employé (qui d’ailleurs fait toujours partie de l’équipe) à la conquête de banquiers, d’un bâtiment et de fournisseurs prêts à lui faire confiance.
La tâche n’a pas été facile, mais à force de persévérance et de croire en son projet il a pu avoir obtenir le financement de son projet, tout en se sacrifiant et en prenant d’énormes risques surtout en pleine crise de 2007.

With a strong foundation in technical expertise, global sourcing, and quality assurance, we deliver materials that meet the most demanding industrial standards.

Our extensive product line includes Stainless Steel, Copper Alloys, Titanium, Duplex & Super Duplex, Inconel, Monel, Hastelloy, and Wear-Resistant Plates, among others. We cater to diverse sectors such as oil & gas, petrochemicals, marine, power generation, refineries, process industries, EPC projects, and more.

 Our Core Product Offerings:

Ferrous & Non-Ferrous Grades: Brass Admiralty Tubes, Stainless Steel, Titanium, Copper, Brass, Gun Metal, Wear-Resistant Materials.

Raw Materials: Pipes, Pipe Fittings (SS & MS), Heat Exchanger Tubes, Instrumentation Fittings, Plates, Sheets, Coils, Flats, Channels, Angles, Round Bars, Fasteners, Flanges, Fabricated Tubes & more.

High Nickel Alloys: Nickel 200/201, Inconel 600/601/625/718, Hastelloy C22/C276/B2/B3/X, Monel 400/K500, Incoloy 800/800H/825/925.

Duplex & Super Duplex Steel: ASTM A790/ASME SA790 – S31803, S32205, S32750, S32760.

We believe in building long-term partnerships by offering competitive pricing, consistent quality, and timely delivery. Our team ensures every material meets international standards (ASTM, ASME, DIN, EN) and client-specific requirements.

At Kanaknidhi Alloyics LLP, we don’t just supply metals — we deliver performance, reliability, and trust.

 Connect with us for inquiries, collaborations, or to explore how we can support your industrial material needs.

Kanaknidhi Alloyics LLP – Engineering Excellence, Delivered.

Customers are central to Liberty’s operations. The company is built to adapt to changing market demands, providing stable and dependable supply.

All finishing and inspection are completed in-house, including blasting, grinding, heat treating, painting, and 100 percent visual inspection. Advanced inspection options such as 3D scanning, magnetic particle, dye penetrant, and ultrasonic testing are available when required. From melt to final shipment, Liberty maintains full in-house control to ensure quality, consistency, and reliable delivery.

Name: POUGET
Description:
La Société des Etablissements POUGET a été fondée en 1935 par M. Edmond Pouget et le savoir-faire Made In France s'y transmet de père en fils... et fille, depuis trois générations. 

A sa création, l’entreprise Séquano-Dionysienne s’est orientée vers la mécanisation des travaux ferroviaires en développant la première tirefonneuse à moteur utilisée en Europe en 1936. 
Cette invention a été le début d’une nouvelle ligne de machines toujours plus performantes destinées aux travaux et à l'entretien des voies ferrées : meuleuse, boulonneuse, tronçonneuse, strieuse, entailleuse, perceuse, chargeur de rail, groupe de bourrage, groupe de soudage, etc.

L'entreprise, soucieuse de répondre aux besoins de ses clients, propose également du matériel de transport sur voie (plateau lorry, vélorail, échafaudage roulants, etc.), de levage et de dressage de la voie, de soudure, de mesures et de contrôles, d'éclairage et de signalisation tel que les avertisseurs sonores, d'outillages à main et différents accessoires.

 N'hésitez pas à nous écrire pour tout renseignement !

Name: VMI Group Nepal
Description:
VMI Group is a pioneer of Non-Ferrous metals recycling in Nepal, boasting the largest manufacturing facility of its kind and the widest product range. We are known for our commitment to sustainable practices, utilizing recycled materials to create high-quality products while minimizing our environmental impact.

Our extensive product line ranges from traditional Bronze Utensils, Copper Utensils, Brass Utensils, and Aluminium Utensils to modern houseware and kitchenware items like Pressure Cookers, Gas Stoves, and more. Since our inception in 1981, we have been catering to a diverse client base in both national and international arenas under brand names Shalimar, Presto, Bluestar, and VMI. We also supply the domestic industries with a broad range of quality raw and semi-raw materials.

We are the first company in Nepal to receive the prestigious NS(Nepal Standard) certification in the Household Domestic Pressure Cookers category. Our flagship, Presto and Shalimar pressure cookers, have been recognized as world-class products, while the traditional Bronze Thali (Kansa/Charas Thaal) has earned us a significant identity among our customers. Our brand strategy focuses on delivering exceptional quality, durability, and customer satisfaction. We strive to build long-term relationships with our customers by consistently exceeding their expectations.

Driven by a steady passion to enrich the lives of people, our management is dedicated to designing and manufacturing products of premium quality. Our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, earned through four decades of experience, has rendered us one of the most sought-after and trusted brands. We believe in contributing to the well-being of our community and the nation. By providing employment opportunities, supporting local artisans, and promoting sustainable practices, we aim to make a positive social and economic impact.

Conte conosco para receber um serviço especializado, com padrão de qualidade superior e garantia em todos os serviços e produtos fornecidos. Juntos, buscamos superar expectativas e conquistar resultados excepcionais.

Ses 1200 collaborateurs se déploient partout dans le Monde au sein de 36 unités d’affaires dont 27 implantations en France métropolitaines. Nous accompagnons les entreprises dans la réalisation de leurs projets de conception, de fabrication et de maintenance de leurs équipements, pour assurer la maîtrise des risques et garantir la qualité des produits.

En tant que référent technique de l’assemblage et des contrôles associés en France, l’Institut de Soudure répond aux attentes des industriels de la filière en ce qui concerne la sécurité des hommes, la maîtrise des risques, la conformité aux réglementations, la veille documentaire, le déploiement des meilleures pratiques et la performance industrielle. L’association participe également à l’évolution des normes et des réglementations au niveau français, européen et international.

Name: ESP. EUROPEAN STEEL PRODUCTION
Description:
Founded in 2010, European Steel Production (ESP) has been delivering made-to-order metal structures for industrial clients across Northern Europe.

Headquartered in Latvia (the EU), ESP specializes in full-cycle manufacturing – from CAD design and engineering to laser cutting, bending, welding, surface preparation, coating, and certified inspection. All operations are housed under one roof at a 6,500 m² facility in Olaine, just 35 km from Riga, with direct rail and airport access.

What we produce:
– cabins and structural components for heavy-duty machinery
– snow removal and airport equipment
– reinforced transport containers
– custom frameworks for industrial and construction use

Production is never off-the-shelf. Each project is built to specification, optimized for real-world conditions, tolerances, and compliance.

The factory operates with advanced equipment:
 – BYSTRONIC laser cutters
 – DURMA and AMADA bending machines
 – TIG and GMAW welding stations
 – blasting chambers and powder/wet coating zones
 – in-house NDT testing to international standards

This setup enables tight-turnaround manufacturing and seamless handling of non-standard, large-format projects – start to finish.

ESP employs over 80 specialists, including certified welders and an IWE-qualified welding engineer. Ongoing training and mentoring are embedded in the production culture, supporting team growth alongside technical excellence.
Our clients come from machinery, construction, infrastructure, and logistics – sectors where reliability, speed, and precision matter most.

Looking for a production partner that delivers custom solutions with discipline and clarity? Let’s connect.

Située à Bex, la société PROJACIER SA est spécialisée dans le traitement des métaux, le rechargement par Métallisation, l'Usinage pièces mécaniques 1 avant et après la recharge ainsi que la rectification extérieure et intérieure de toute pièce mécanique n'excédant pas 20 tonnes, un diamètre de 2 300 mm et une longueur de 8 000 mm.

Le rechargement par métallisation est utilisé contre l'usure mécanique, la cavitation et la corrosion, soit en réparation sur des pièces usées, soit en prévention sur des pièces neuves. PROJACIER travaille dans différents domaines d'activités.

Name: L.E.F., Inc.
Description: L.E.F., Inc. is a multi-service manufacturing facility with over 20 processes performed at our Tulsa, Oklahoma locations. We were the first company in Northeast Oklahoma to introduce laser cutting technology and we have never stopped providing best in class laser cutting metal fabrication services. These include laser cutting, laser marking, bending, forming, machining, welding, media blasting, paint and powder coating.  Our list of equipment is numerous, versatile, and continuously updated allowing us to adjust precisely to customer needs. We are able to process carbon steel, stainless steel, alloys, aluminum, brass, copper, plastic, and many synthetics (SDS Required). AWS and AMSE Certified Welders on staff. MIL-I-54208A and ISO 9000 Standards compliant. We are your most efficient and cost effective option available.

Description:
Construimos seguridad y confianza con cada producto que fabricamos e instalamos; nuestra razón de ser es proteger la vida, el trabajo y el patrimonio de las personas, los negocios y las industrias.

Name: Leader of manufacturer for Titanium carbide for wear parts
Description:
As the leader of turnkey carbide solution, with large production base in China, Gungnir Industry Limited manufacture & supply Titanium carbide rods (inserts, plates), TiC rocs, TiC bars, TiC inserts for wear parts, steel-bonded carbide, tungsten carbide items, custom carbide components, including but not limited to:  carbide wear parts, carbide buttons, carbide composite welding rods , carbide drill bits,  carbide nozzles, carbide bushings, carbide rollers, carbide rods, carbide valves, carbide seal rings, carbide pins, carbide balls, carbide industrial knife/blade.

We have rich experiences of about 20 years in manufacturing & supplying carbide wear parts & precision/bespoke carbide components for many industries, such as mining & coal, oil & gas, energy, construction & cement, agriculture & forest, recycling, aggregate equipment, medical equipment.

Will be honored to be your supplier of  Titanium carbide rods (inserts, bars) for wear parts,  steel-bonded carbide,  carbide wear parts, custom/precision tungsten carbide items, etc.

Name: Prolaser - Serviços Metalúrgicos
Description:
A ProLaser teve início em 2024, quando um pequeno grupo de apaixonados por tecnologia e fabricação se uniu com a missão simples de oferecer serviços de corte a laser e dobra CNC de alta qualidade a preços acessíveis. Desde então, temos trabalhado duro para crescer, mas nunca perdemos de vista nossos valores fundamentais de honestidade, qualidade e serviço ao cliente.

Nossa Missão - 
Na ProLaser, nossa missão é bastante simples: queremos facilitar a vida de nossos clientes. Estamos aqui para ajudar empresas grandes e pequenas a transformar suas ideias em realidade, fornecendo soluções de fabricação precisas, confiáveis e acessíveis. Acreditamos que todos merecem acesso à tecnologia de ponta e estamos comprometidos em tornar isso uma realidade.
Location: Caxias do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul
